  ΈΣΡ thread Ά░Α ΈΠβΉΜε first-call ΉΜε distinct Lane instance Έ░εΆ╕ΚΈΡαΈΛΦ race
  Ή░ρΈΜρ. **10 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_audit_burst_fix.py`) έΑΦ argv
  4 (max-connections / max-samples / ΉΙεΉΕε / outer `geode audit` argv
  ΉΩΡΈΛΦ ΉΧΙ ΈΥνΉΨ┤Ά░ΑΉΧ╝ ΊΧρ) + lane 6 (singleton ΉΧΙΉιΧΉΕ▒ / capacity / sequential
  ΉπΒΈιυΊβΦ / ΈΠβΉΜε acquire blocking ΉΜεΆ░Ε Ή╕κΉιΧ / 8-thread lazy-init race
  thread-safety / source-level integration grep). Quality gates clean
  (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy + 10/10 pytest). Cost: audit wall
  time ΈΛαΉΨ┤ΈΓρ (10x parallel έΗΤ serial). Ά▒░Έηα Ά░ΑΉ╣α: 429 storm zero + ΉΜνΉιε
  sample ΉβΕΈμΝ. multi-account AccountPool ΈΠΕΉηΖΉΜε lane capacity knob Ήε╝Έκε
  ramp Ά░ΑΈΛξ.


- **PR-OL-OAUTH-COUNT-TOKENS έΑΦ Claude OAuth count_tokens 401 fallback.**
  Pattern-B subscription-routed Petri audit (Claude Max OAuth, OL-A2-data
  + OL-P1 unblock path) was aborting before any sample ran with
  `AuthenticationError 401 invalid x-api-key` on
  `/v1/messages/count_tokens`. Root cause: Claude OAuth tokens carry
  scope `user:inference` έΑΦ Anthropic gateway accepts for `/v1/messages`
  but rejects for `/v1/messages/count_tokens`. inspect_ai's class-method
  `count_tokens` (`AnthropicAPI` line 532+) propagates the 401 with no
  try/except έΗΤ `Task interrupted (no samples completed)`. **Fix**:
  override `count_tokens` in `plugins/petri_audit/claude_code_provider.py
  ::ClaudeOAuthAPI` to skip the API call and return inspect_ai's own
  documented fallback heuristic (`max(1, len(text) // 4)`). Heuristic
  extracted to module-level pure function `estimate_tokens_for_oauth(input)`
  so it is testable without instantiating the inspect_ai-wrapped class.
  Accuracy degrades from "exact" to "Anthropic-standard heuristic" έΑΦ
  operators needing exact pre-flight cost numbers should use PAYG path
  (`api_key` source). **9 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_oauth_count_tokens_fallback.py`)
  έΑΦ string/empty/None input + list-of-msg with str-content + list-of-msg
  with block-content (tool_use shape) + mixed shapes + skip-non-text-blocks
  + source-level pin on override+delegation + inspect_ai-gated class
  presence check. Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy
  + 9/9 pytest).

## [0.99.28] - 2026-05-22

> Tier 1 (Outer Loop) closure stamp. 2 PRs:
> OL-A3 (#1451) `geode outer-bundle` viewer + OL-P2 (#1452) Petri quota
> actual enforcement. Tier 1 *coding* slices are now 100% closed έΑΦ all
> remaining items (OL-A2-data / OL-P1) blocked by Anthropic credit;
> OL-C3.2 ADR-gated (selection policy / cost ceiling / disk cap).

### Added

- **PR-OL-P2 έΑΦ Petri quota actual enforcement (auto-trip + opt-in call gate).**
  Pre-OL-P2 Ήζα `SubscriptionQuotaBanner.abort_threshold` Ά░Α *display-only*
  έΑΦ `tier()` Ά░Α red Έ░αΊβα έΗΤ ΉΜεΆ░ΒΈπΝ Έ╣ρΆ░εΉπΑΉπΑΈπΝ ΉΜνΉιε abort ΈΛΦ credential
  resolver Ήζα strict-mode ΈπΝ Έ░εΊβΦ. ΉηΡΉΩ░ usage Ά░Α threshold Έξ╝ ΈΕαΉΨ┤ΈΠΕ
  enforcement ΉΩΗΉζΝ. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε 2 wiring**: (1) `set_state` Ά░Α ΉΔΙ ratio Ά░Α
  `abort_threshold` Έξ╝ cross ΊΧαΈσ┤ ΉηΡΈΠβΉε╝Έκε `aborted=True` + ΉιΧΈ│┤ΉΕ▒
  `abort_reason` Ή▒ΕΉδΑ. Ήζ┤Έψ╕ abort ΈΡε ΉΔΒΊΔεΈσ┤ Ά╕░Ήκ┤ reason Έ│┤Ήκ┤ (credential
  issue Ά░Α usage issue Έ│┤ΈΜν Ήγ░ΉΕι ΉΜιΊα╕). `clear_abort` ΊδΕ ΈΜνΉΜε breach ΊΧαΈσ┤
  Ήηυ-trip. (2) **`enforce_or_raise()` ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈσΦΉΕεΈΥε** έΑΦ `QuotaAbortError`
  (RuntimeError ΊΧαΉεΕ) Έξ╝ banner aborted ΉΔΒΊΔεΉζ╝ ΈΧΝ raise. Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α Ία╕Ή╢ε
  ΉπΑΉιΡΉΩΡ opt-in Ήε╝Έκε wrapping έΗΤ fail-fast. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε example caller**:
  `autoresearch/train.py::run_audit(dry_run=False)` Ά░Α `_build_audit_command`
  ΉπΒΉιΕΉΩΡ `current_banner() and current_banner().enforce_or_raise()` Ία╕Ή╢ε
  έΗΤ quota Ά░Α trip ΈΡαΈσ┤ audit subprocess ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έξ╝ spawn ΉΧΙ ΊΧρ (Ά░ΑΉηξ Έ╣ΕΉΜ╝
  caller Ήζ┤ΈψΑΈκε first wiring). Ά╕░Ήκ┤ caller ΈΥνΉζΑ unchanged (backwards-compat
  preserved). **ΉΜιΆ╖ε export**: `QuotaAbortError` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α, `__all__` Ά░▒ΉΜι.
  **Ά╕░Ήκ┤ test 1 Ά░ε Ά░▒ΉΜι** (`test_render_red_when_at_abort_threshold` Ά░Α
  pre-OL-P2 Ήζα "95% used" Ή╢εΈιξ ΈΝΑΉΜι ΉΔΙ "aborted" Ή╢εΈιξ Ά▓ΑΉοζ). **12 ΉΜιΆ╖ε
  invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_p2_quota_enforcement.py`) έΑΦ auto-trip
  x6 + enforce_or_raise x4 + autoresearch wiring x2. Quality gates clean
  (ruff + ruff format --check + mypy + 12/12 OL-P2 + 69 regression on
  adjacent quota tests).

- **PR-OL-A3 έΑΦ `geode outer-bundle` viewer (Tier 1 closure).**
  OL-A1.5 (#1446) Ά░Α `auto_trigger_history.jsonl` ΉζΕ ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΉΓ░Ή╢εΊΧαΈσ┤ΉΕε
  outer-loop Ά░Α ΈπΝΈΥεΈΛΦ 3 streams (`auto_trigger_history.jsonl` /
  `mutations.jsonl` / `baseline.json`) Ά░Α ΈςρΈΣΡ ΈπνΆ▓ρΉκΝΈΛΦΈΞ░, Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α ΉΖΜ
  ΉνΣ ΉΨ┤ΈΛΡ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ΉζΕ grep ΊΧ┤ΉΧ╝ ΊΧιΉπΑ ΈςρΈξ┤ΈΛΦ surface gap ΉηΦΉκ┤ έΑΦ Έ│╕ PR Ά░Α
  closure. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/cli/outer_bundle.py` (~280 LOC) έΑΦ Typer
  command `geode outer-bundle [--limit N] [--json]` Ά░Α 3 source Έξ╝
  chronologically merge έΗΤ Rich table (default) ΈαΡΈΛΦ JSONL (--json) Ή╢εΈιξ.
  `BundleEvent` dataclass (`ts: float`, `source: str`, `detail: str`)
  + `load_bundle_events()` public loader + `_parse_iso_or_epoch` (float/
  ISO-8601 dual-format) + `_tail_jsonl` (graceful partial-line skip).
  Source discriminator 3-Ά░Τ: `auto_trigger` / `mutation` / `baseline`
  (ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚΉζΑ synthetic 1-row from current promoted baseline.json). ΈΙΕΈζ╜
  ΊΝΝΉζ╝ έΗΤ empty bundle (raise ΉΩΗΉζΝ). **CLI ΈΥ▒Έκζ**: `core/cli/__init__.py`
  Ήζα `app.command(name="outer-bundle")` Έκε entry point. **15 invariant
  test** (`tests/test_ol_a3_outer_bundle.py`) έΑΦ BundleEvent round-trip
  + parse helpers x3 (float / ISO / garbage) + _tail_jsonl x3 (last-N /
  malformed skip / missing path) + load_bundle_events x5 (auto-trigger
  only / mutation row / baseline synthetic / 3-source chronological
  sort / all-missing empty) + CLI x3 (Typer registration / no-data
  callable / --json output). Quality gates clean (ruff + ruff format
  --check + mypy + 15/15 pytest). CLI smoke (`geode outer-bundle
  --help`) renders.

## [0.99.27] - 2026-05-22

> 51 PRs accumulated since v0.99.26. Headline arcs:
>
> - **Self-improving Outer Loop sprint 1** (8 PR, this session) έΑΦ
>   deception closure (OL-C1/C2/C3) + auto-trigger (OL-A1/A1.5) +
>   drift-prevention pins (OL-G/C2') + CB-FLAKE flake cleanup.
> - **Hermes absorption Phase 1** έΑΦ FTS5 + ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ╖╕Έηρ indexer (Hermes-1c)
>   + `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes-1d).
> - **M-sprint in-context wiring** έΑΦ M1-M4.4.3 (skill / agent contract /
>   few-shot pool / DPO publisher trilogy / 4-slot reader trilogy).
> - **PAPERCLIP** έΑΦ subscription billing pattern for self-improving
>   loop mutator (`claude-cli` / `openai-codex` subprocess dispatch).
> - **S3-S6 + T6** έΑΦ 4Ή╢Χ baseline.json ratchet + heuristic indicators
>   JSON mutation surface.

### Added

- **PR-OL-C2' έΑΦ Reflection node canonical-path pins (drift prevention).**
  Roadmap (2026-05-22) Ήζα OL-C2' Ά░Α `core/agent/reflection.py` ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙΉζΕ
  ΉγΦΆ╡υΊΨΙΉε╝ΈΓα GAP audit Ά▓░Ά│╝ reflection node Ά░Α **Ήζ┤Έψ╕** `core/agent/loop/
  _reflection.py` (321 LOC, PR-3 C-2 cognitive-loop-uplift) ΉΩΡ Ήκ┤Ήηυ + 3 Ά░εΉζα
  test file (`tests/test_reflection_node.py` / `test_reflection_cost_gate.py`
  / `test_s0b_reflection_reader.py`) Ά░Α Ή╗νΈ▓Ε. Έ│╕ PR Ά░Α OL-G ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ή░ρΉγσ έΑΦ
  4 Ά░εΉζα drift-prevention invariant pin Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. (1) canonical path Ά░Α
  `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` ΉηΕΉζΕ Ές╗ Έ░ΧΉζΝ. (2) parallel duplicate Ά░Α
  `core/agent/reflection.py` ΉΩΡ ΉΔζΆ╕░ΉπΑ Ές╗ΊΧαΆ▓Ν anti-presence assert (Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α
  stale roadmap Έ│┤Ά│ι ΉηυΆ╡υΊαΕ ΉΜεΈΠΕΊΧαΈσ┤ RED). (3) load-bearing surface
  (`reflect_async` / `REFLECTION_TOOL_NAME = "record_reflection"` /
  `_REFLECTION_TOOL` schema Ήζα hypotheses/confidence/next_action_hint
  3 ΊΧΕΈΥε) ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε Ά▓ΑΉοζ. (4) `HookEvent.COGNITIVE_REFLECT` enum entry +
  value ΈπνΉ╣α. **ΉΓυΉζ┤ΈΥε ΈΖ╕ΊΛ╕**: `core/agent/reflection_policy.py` (S0a-
  style policy reader for operator-local `reflection.json` overrides)
  ΈΛΦ *Έ│ΕΆ░ε ΈςρΈΥΙ* έΑΦ Ά░βΉζΑ ΈΦΦΈιΚΊΗιΈουΉΩΡ Ά│╡Ήκ┤ ΊΩΙΉγσ (ΉΩφΊΧι Έ╢ΕΈου: policy reader
  vs reflection-node implementation). 4/4 pytest pass, ruff + ruff
  format --check clean.

- **PR-OL-G έΑΦ Config drift invariant pins (G-B / G-D / G-E).**
  PR-1 G-B/G-D/G-E (2026-05-21) Ά░Α 3Ά▒┤Ήζα config drift Έξ╝ ΈΜτΉΧαΉπΑΈπΝ invariant
  test Ά░Α ΉΩΗΉΨ┤ ΊγΝΆ╖Α ΉεΕΊΩα Ήκ┤Ήηυ έΑΦ Έ│╕ PR Ά░Α 5Ά░εΉζα pin test Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.
  - **G-B**: `AutoresearchConfig.target_model` / `judge_model` ΊΧΕΈΥε +
    `autoresearch/train.py` Ήζα `TARGET_MODEL` / `JUDGE_MODEL` fallback
    ΉΔΒΉΙα + `_get_autoresearch_config` ΈκεΈΞΦ Ήκ┤Ήηυ (2 test).
  - **G-D**: `settings.learning_extract_model` ΉΕνΉιΧ ΊΧΕΈΥε +
    `core/hooks/llm_extract_learning.py` Ά░Α ΊΧ┤ΈΜ╣ ΊΧΕΈΥε grep-ΊβΧΉζ╕ (1 test).
  - **G-E**: `Settings.model` ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν-Ά╕░Έ│╕Ά░Τ έΗΦ `routing.toml [model.defaults]
    anthropic` ΈπνΉ╣α + claude-opus-4-7 family pin (2 test). G-E ΈΛΦ *runtime*
    Ά░Τ (`settings.model` έΑΦ env var ΉαΒΊΨξ) ΈΝΑΉΜι *class-level default* Έξ╝
    Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ έΑΦ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡ env override ΈΛΦ drift Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜα.
  **GAP audit Έ░εΆ▓υ**: roadmap Ήζα G-B/D/E Έ│╕ ΉηΣΉΩΖ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ PR-1 ΉΩΡ
  ΉζαΊΧ┤ ΉβΕΈμΝ ΉΔΒΊΔε. drift-prevention invariant ΈπΝ Έ│╕ PR Ά░Α Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. 5/5 pytest
  pass, ruff + ruff format --check + mypy clean.

- **PR-OL-A1.5 έΑΦ auto-trigger telemetry events + JSONL audit log.**
  PR-OL-A1 (#1445) Ά░Α cron-driven mutator firing ΉζΕ ΈΠΕΉηΖΊΧαΈσ┤ΉΕε `state`
  Ά░ΤΉζΕ INFO log ΈκεΈπΝ Ή╢εΈιξ έΑΦ Petri/Inspect viewer Ά░βΉζΑ ΈΜνΉγ┤ΉΛνΊΛ╕Έο╝Ήζ┤
  ΉΕ╕ΉΖαΉζΕ ΊΗ╡Ά│ΕΈκε Ά╖╕Έο┤ ΉΙα ΉΩΗΈΛΦ deception ΉηΦΉκ┤. Έ│╕ PR Ά░Α ΈΜτΆ╕░. **HookEvent
  5ΉλΖ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α** (`core/hooks/system.py`) έΑΦ `SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_{FIRED,
  LOCK_BUSY, INTERVAL_BLOCKED, RUNNER_ERROR, PARSE_ERROR}` Έκε Ά░Β terminal
  state 1:1 ΈπνΊΧΣ. `disabled` ΈΛΦ ΉζαΈΠΕΉιΒΉε╝Έκε enum Έψ╕ΊΠυΊΧρ (Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ
  off έΗΤ Έπν cron tick ΈπΙΈΜν Έυ┤ΉζαΈψ╕ event Έ░εΉΔζ Έ░σΉπΑ, wiring Ήζα startup log
  Ά░Α SoT). ΈπνΊΧΣ ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ `STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT` ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε έΑΦ runtime resolution
  ΉζΑ `getattr(HookEvent, name)`. **JSONL audit log** ΉΜιΆ╖ε writer
  `append_history_entry(*, state, detail, ts, trigger_id, history_path)`
  Ά░Α `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger_history.jsonl` ΉΩΡ append-
  only ΊΧε ΉνΕΈΜ╣ `{ts, state, detail, trigger_id}`. `ensure_ascii=False` Έκε
  ΊΧεΆ╕Α detail (`ΉΕ╣ΉΖα=ΊΧεΆ╕Α`) Έ│┤Ήκ┤. `mkdir + write_text` ΈΜρΉζ╝ try (PR-OL-C2
  Codex MCP lesson). OSError ΉΜε `False` Έ░αΊβα + WARNING log έΑΦ telemetry
  ΉΜνΊΝρΆ░Α state machine ΉαΒΊΨξ Ές╗ ΉνΝ. Path ΈΛΦ ``~/.geode/`` ΊΧαΉεΕ έΑΦ ΈιΙΊΠυ
  Ήβ╕Έ╢Α, gitignore N/A (PR-G5b #1350 "git-tracked but isn't" ΉΓυΈκΑ ΊγΝΊΦ╝).
  **`auto_trigger_mutator` ΈουΊΝσΊΗιΈπΒ** έΑΦ Έπν `return AutoTriggerStatus(...)`
  Έξ╝ `_finalize_status` helper Έκε ΈΜρΉζ╝ Ή╢εΆ╡υΉιΡ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝: hook emit + history
  append + status Έ░αΊβα 3Ά░ΑΉπΑ Έ╢ΑΉΙαΊγρΆ│╝Ά░Α drift ΉΩΗΉζ┤ Ά░βΉζΑ Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ΉΩΡΉΕε fire.
  `hooks: Any = None` Ά╕░Έ│╕Ά░Τ έΑΦ REPL/CLI ΉπΒΉιΣ Ία╕Ή╢ε graceful (telemetry
  sink ΉΩΗΉΨ┤ΈΠΕ ΉηΣΈΠβ). `_BrokenHooks` ΉΜεΈχυΈιΙΉζ┤ΉΖα test Έκε hook handler
  raise Ά░Α state machine crash Ές╗ ΉΜεΊΓρΈΜνΈΛΦ invariant Ά▓ΑΉοζ. **wiring**:
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` Ήζα `register_auto_trigger`
  Ία╕Ή╢εΉΩΡ `hooks=hooks` Ήζ╕ΉηΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΑΦ daemon Ήζα HookSystem instance Ά░Α
  callback closure Έκε Ή║κΉ│ΡΈΠ╝ cron fire ΈπΙΈΜν ΉηΡΈΠβ emit. **17 invariant test**
  (`tests/test_ol_a15_telemetry.py`) έΑΦ HookEvent enum x3 (5 variant value /
  STATE_TO_HOOK_EVENT 5-state coverage + disabled Έ╢ΑΉηυ / getattr resolve)
  + append_history_entry x5 (1 row write / multi-append / parent dir ΉΔζΉΕ▒
  / Unicode preserve / OSError graceful) + auto_trigger_mutator end-to-end
  x9 (fired/lock_busy/interval_blocked/runner_error/parse_error Ά░ΒΆ░Β hook+
  history Έ░εΉΔζ / disabled Ά░Α hook+history ΈΣα ΈΜν skip / hooks=None graceful /
  multi-call append-only / hook handler raise Ά▓σΈου). Quality gates clean
  (ruff + format-check + mypy + 43/43 pytest ΈΙΕΉιΒ OL-A1+A1.5).

- **PR-OL-A1 έΑΦ self-improving loop mutator auto-trigger (cron + 4-backend grounded).**
  Pre-OL-A1 Ήζα `SelfImprovingLoopRunner` ΈΛΦ *manual* Έ░εΊβΦΈπΝ ΉπΑΉδΡ (operator
  Ά░Α `geode self-improve mutate` Ία╕Ή╢ε, Ία╣ΉζΑ autoresearch sprint runner
  ΉΧΙΉΩΡΉΕε sync invoke). OL-A1 Ά░Α GEODE daemon scheduler ΉεΕΉΩΡ cron-Ά░ΑΈΛξΊΧε
  auto-trigger Έξ╝ ΉΨ╣ΉΨ┤ operator Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΔΒΊΔεΉΩΡΉΕεΈΠΕ wrapper-prompt / ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ
  ΉπΕΊβΦΆ░Α Ά│ΕΉΗΞΈΡαΆ▓Ν ΊΧρ. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/self_improving_loop/auto_trigger.py`
  έΑΦ pure ΉειΊΜ╕ `auto_trigger_mutator(*, enabled, min_interval_minutes,
  runner_factory=None, lock_path=None, timestamp_path=None, now=None)`
  Ά░Α 6 terminal state ΉνΣ ΊΧαΈΓα (`fired` / `lock_busy` /
  `interval_blocked` / `runner_error` / `parse_error` / `disabled`) Ήζα
  `AutoTriggerStatus` dataclass Έ░αΊβα. Έ░εΊβΦ ΉνΣ Έ░εΉΔζ Ά░ΑΈΛξΊΧε ΈςρΈΥι ΉαΙΉβ╕
  (factory raise / runner __init__ raise / `run_once()` raise)ΈΛΦ try/except
  Έκε ΉηκΊαΑ `runner_error` ΈαΡΈΛΦ `parse_error` state Έκε ΊβαΉδΡ έΑΦ scheduler loop
  crash Έ░σΉπΑ (Codex MCP fix-up). **2-layer ΈΠβΉΜεΉΕ▒ Ά░ΑΈΥε**: (1) `fcntl.flock`
  LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB advisory lock (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/auto_trigger.lock`)
  έΑΦ ΈΣΡ cron-fire Ία╣ΉζΑ cron + manual `geode self-improve mutate` race Ή░ρΈΜρ,
  kernel crash ΉΜε ΉηΡΈΠβ ΊΧ┤Ήιε. (2) `min_interval_minutes` ΊΔΑΉηΕΉΛνΊΔυΊΦΕ Ά▓ΝΉζ┤ΊΛ╕
  (`auto_trigger_last_run.txt`) έΑΦ clock-skew / restart re-fire ΊζκΉΙα. Ά▓ΝΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ΈΛΦ
  lock ΊγΞΈΥζ *ΉιΕΊδΕ* ΈςρΈΣΡ ΊΠΚΆ░Α (TOCTOU Έ░σΉΨ┤ έΑΦ Codex MCP fix-up). **4-backend
  source Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΝΖ Ά▓ΑΉοζ**: wrapper Ά░Α ΉηΡΉ▓┤ source vocabulary Έξ╝ Ά░ΑΉπΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ│ι
  `SelfImprovingLoopRunner.run_once()` ΉΩΡ dispatch. Runner ΈΛΦ PR-PAPERCLIP
  (#1433) Ήζα `[self_improving_loop.mutator].source` 4-enum (`auto` /
  `api_key` / `claude-cli` / `openai-codex`) ΉζΕ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ honour. Dispatch
  topology ΈΛΦ *ΈΣΡ Ά▓╜Έκε*: (a) `claude-cli` / `openai-codex` ΈΛΦ
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` Ήζα subprocess Έκε Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΝΖ
  (Claude Code Max / ChatGPT Plus subscription Ή▓φΆ╡υ έΑΦ `_ADAPTER_MAP` Ήγ░ΊγΝ),
  (b) `auto` / `api_key` ΈΛΦ `core/llm/adapters.py::_ADAPTER_MAP` Ήζα 3-provider
  (`anthropic` / `openai` / `glm`) + `openai-codex` ΉΨ┤ΈΝΣΊΕ░ Ά▓╜Ήει. Ή┤ζ 4 backend
  (Claude Code subscription / Codex CLI subscription / Anthropic PAYG / OpenAI
  PAYG) ΈςρΈΣΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α Ή╜ΦΈΥε ΉΩΗΉζ┤ ΉηΣΈΠβ.
  **ΉΜιΆ╖ε config** `[self_improving_loop.scheduler]` (`SchedulerConfig` in
  `core/config/self_improving_loop.py`) έΑΦ `enabled: bool = False` (opt-in
  default), `cron: str = "0 */6 * * *"` (5-field cron, every 6 hours),
  `min_interval_minutes: Annotated[int, Field(ge=1, le=1440)] = 60`.
  Pydantic v2 `extra="forbid"` έΑΦ ΉανΊΔΑ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α Έ░εΆ▓υ Ά░ΑΈΛξ. **Wiring** έΑΦ
  `core/wiring/automation.py::build_automation` Ήζα scheduler_service.start
  ΉπΒΊδΕΉΩΡ `register_auto_trigger(trigger_manager, enabled, cron,
  min_interval_minutes)` Ία╕Ή╢ε. Default `enabled=False` Ήζ┤Έσ┤ `TriggerConfig`
  ΈΥ▒Έκζ ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έξ╝ Ά▒┤ΈΕΙΈεΑ έΑΦ ΉοΚ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α `config.toml` ΉΩΡ `enabled = true` ΈςΖΉΜε
  ΉΧΙ ΊΧαΈσ┤ *Ή╜ΦΈΥε path Ά░Α dormant*. `try/except` Έκε wiring ΉανΈξαΆ░Α startup
  block ΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ▓Ν Ά░ΑΈΥε. **26 invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_a1_auto_trigger.py`)
  έΑΦ SchedulerConfig defaults x4 (off / 6-hour cron / 60-min interval +
  range validation + extra forbid + top-level config carries scheduler) +
  lock semantics x3 (acquire fd / contention rejection / parent dir
  creation) + timestamp x3 (missing έΗΤ None / round-trip / unparseable έΗΤ
  None) + min-interval x3 (no prior / recent blocks / old satisfies) +
  auto_trigger_mutator terminal states x9 (disabled / interval_blocked /
  lock_busy / fired / runner_error / parse_error / lock-released-after-
  raise / runner-factory-raises έΗΤ runner_error / post-lock interval re-check
  blocks fresh timestamp) + lazy runner import x1 + register_auto_trigger
  wiring x3 (disabled skip / enabled registers SCHEDULED TriggerConfig /
  closure forwards into `auto_trigger_mutator`). Quality gates clean (ruff +
  mypy + 26/26 pytest + 403 adjacent scheduler/wiring/trigger/automation
  regression). **Telemetry deferred** (`HookEvent.SELF_IMPROVING_AUTO_TRIGGER_*`
  + outer-loop bundle viewer) έΑΦ OL-A2/OL-A3 scope.

- **PR-OL-C3 έΑΦ `memory_recall` MD writer (close M4.4.1 reader's write-side).**
  M4.4.1 (#1436) Ά░Α `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.load_memory_entries`
  + `in_context_wiring.py:123` Έκε reader ΈπΝ Ή╢εΉΜε έΗΤ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α ΉπΒΉιΣ `.md`
  ΊΝΝΉζ╝ΉζΕ ΉΗΡΉε╝Έκε Ή▒ΕΉγ░ΉπΑ ΉΧΛΈΛΦ ΊΧε `memory_recall` in-context slot Ήζ┤ ΉαΒΆ╡υ
  empty list ΉεΕΉΩΡ ranking ΉηΣΈΠβ (PR-OL-C2 Ήζα few-shot pool Ά│╝ ΈΠβΉζ╝ΊΧε
  reader-without-writer deception). **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ**
  `core/memory/recall_writer.py` έΑΦ pure ΉειΊΜ╕ `write_recall_entry(*, name,
  description, body, type_label, recall_dir=None, overwrite=False)` Ά░Α
  M4.4.1 frontmatter parser Ά░Α Ά╕░ΈΝΑΊΧαΈΛΦ ΉιΧΊβΧΊΧε schema
  (`---\nname: έΑο\ndescription: έΑο\nmetadata:\n  type: έΑο\n---\n\n{body}\n`)
  Έκε ΊΧε ΉνΕΈΜ╣ `.md` Έξ╝ ΉηΣΉΕ▒. `_slugify_name` Ήε╝Έκε alnum+hyphen+underscore
  ΊΝΝΉζ╝ΈςΖ Έ│┤Ήηξ, `_escape_frontmatter_value` Έκε multi-line name/description/
  type_label ΈΜρΉζ╝ Έζ╝Ήζ╕ Ά░ΧΉιε (YAML-light parser Ήζα line-per-key Ά╖εΉΧ╜ έΑΦ
  type_label Ά╣ΝΉπΑ escape ΊΧαΈΛΦ Ά▒┤ Codex MCP fix-up ΊδΕ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α, frontmatter
  injection Έ░σΉπΑ). `mkdir(parents=True,
  exist_ok=True)` + `write_text` ΈΜρΉζ╝ try (Codex MCP PR-OL-C2 Ήζα mkdir-
  outside-try ΉΓυΈκΑ ΉιΒΉγσ). Idempotent έΑΦ `overwrite=False` (default) Ά░Α
  Ά╕░Ήκ┤ ΉΛυΈθυΆ╖╕ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ Έ│┤Ήκ┤, `True` ΉΜε ΈΝΑΉ▓┤. `resolve_recall_dir()` Ά░Α
  `$GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡ override > `~/.geode/memory/recall/`
  default έΑΦ reader ΉβΑ *Ά░βΉζΑ* env var Έξ╝ honour ΊΧ┤ΉΕε Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α dir ΊΧε
  Ά││ΈπΝ ΉαχΆ╕░Έσ┤ read+write ΈΣα ΈΜν ΈΦ░Έζ╝Ήα┤. 4 canonical type ΉΔΒΉΙα
  (`RECALL_TYPE_{USER,FEEDBACK,PROJECT,REFERENCE}`) + `VALID_RECALL_TYPES`
  frozenset ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε έΑΦ Claude Code Ήζα auto-memory schema ΉβΑ parity. Non-
  canonical type ΈΠΕ ΉηΣΉΕ▒ ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ ΊΩΙΉγσ (DEBUG log) έΗΤ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡ ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ Έ│Ε
  custom type ΈπΚΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ. **Auto-trigger Έ╢ΑΉηυ (ΉζαΈΠΕ)** έΑΦ `SESSION_ENDED`
  hook ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉηΡΈΠβ Έ░εΊβΦ / LLM-curator ΈΛΦ OL-C3.2 follow-up Ήε╝Έκε deferred,
  Ά╖╝Ά▒░: (1) ADR Έ╢ΑΉηυ (every session Ή▒ΕΊΔζ? promoted-only? curator?),
  (2) cost ceiling Έψ╕ΊΧσΉζα, (3) disk usage cap Έψ╕ΊΧσΉζα. ΊαΕΉηυ entry-point
  ΉζΑ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α CLI/REPL slash Έκε `write_recall_entry` ΉπΒΉιΣ Ία╕Ή╢ε. **17
  invariant test** (`tests/test_ol_c3_recall_writer.py`) έΑΦ resolve x2
  (env override / Ά╕░Έ│╕ path), slugify x3 (canonical / Ά│╡Έ░▒+punct /
  emptyέΗΤuntitled), writer x7 (ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΉΔζΉΕ▒ / M4.4.1 reader round-trip /
  idempotent skip / overwrite=True / multi-line frontmatter strip /
  parent dir ΉΔζΉΕ▒ / non-canonical type ΉηΣΉΕ▒ / type_label newline-escape
  injection Έ░σΉπΑ), list x2 (ΉιΧΈιυ / ΉΩΗΈΛΦ dir empty), batch x2 (ΉιΕΉ▓┤ ΉηΣΉΕ▒
  / Ά╕░Ήκ┤ slug skip). Reader-writer schema drift Έ░σΉπΑΉζα ΊΧ╡ΉΜυΉζΑ
  `test_write_round_trips_with_m4_4_1_reader` Ά░Α *ΉΜνΉιε* reader Έξ╝ import
  ΊΧ┤ΉΕε ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝΝΉζ╝ΉζΕ parsing έΑΦ ΊΧε Ής╜Ήζ┤ schema Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ΊΧαΈσ┤ ΉοΚΉΜε RED. Quality
  gates clean (ruff + mypy + 17/17 pytest).

- **PR-OL-C2 έΑΦ few-shot pool writer + autoresearch promote Ία╕Ή╢εΉηΡ.**
  M3 (#1426/#1428) Ήζ┤ reader (`_load_few_shot_pool_override` +
  `apply_few_shot_pool`) ΈπΝ Ή╢εΉΜεΊΧαΆ│ι writer Έ╢ΑΉηυΈκε exemplars in-context
  slot (M4.4 #1435) Ά░Α ΉαΒΆ╡υ empty pool ΉεΕΉΩΡ ΉηΣΈΠβΊΨΙΈΞα deception ΊΧ┤ΉΗΝ.
  **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΊΧρΉΙα** `core/llm/few_shot_pool.append_exemplar(user_msg,
  assistant_msg, fitness_delta, source, pool_path, max_size)` έΑΦ
  16-hex SHA256 signature idempotent dedup + FIFO eviction
  (`MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE = 1000`). ΈςρΈΥΙ `__all__` ΉΩΡ
  `append_exemplar` + `MAX_EXEMPLAR_POOL_SIZE` ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε. **autoresearch
  caller** έΑΦ `autoresearch/train.py::main()` Ήζα OL-C1 eval emit ΉπΒΊδΕ
  `args.dry_run is False` AND `"true" in promoted_line.lower()` ΉΜε
  `append_exemplar(source="autoresearch_audit_promote", fitness_delta=
  fitness - mean(baseline_means))` Ία╕Ή╢ε (rejected pile ΉζΑ in-context
  exemplars Ή▒ΕΈΕΡΉΩΡ ΈΥνΉΨ┤Ά░ΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΆ▓Ν gate). ΉιΕΉ▓┤ try/except Έκε Ά░ΡΉΜ╕Ήι╕
  audit cycle Έ│┤Ία╕. **mkdir + write_text ΈςρΈΣΡ ΈΜρΉζ╝ try ΉΧΙ** (Codex MCP
  FLAG fix έΑΦ mkdir OSError ΈΠΕ graceful False Έ░αΊβα, raise ΉΧΙ ΊΧρ).
  **14 invariant test** έΑΦ signature x2 (determinism + field sensitivity)
  + writer x4 (one row / idempotent / multi-pair / round-trip with
  `_parse_jsonl`) + FIFO x2 (eviction at over-cap + cap constant
  exposed) + graceful x2 (parent dir creation + Unicode preserve) +
  train.py source Ά▓ΑΉοζ 4ΉλΖ (import Ήκ┤Ήηυ / promote gate /
  try/except wrap / OL-C1 emit ΊδΕ ΉεΕΉ╣α έΑΦ order pin). **ΈσΦΊΔΑ-level exemplar caveat**:
  audit cycle Ήζα `(prompt, response)` ΈΛΦ meta-level έΑΦ ΊΨξΊδΕ OL-C2.2
  follow-up ΉΩΡΉΕε AgenticLoop-turn-level + Petri-per-turn writer Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.

- **PR-OL-C1 έΑΦ `eval_response_recorded` Ία╕Ή╢εΉηΡ wiring (autoresearch audit cycle ΈΜρΉεΕ).**
  M4.0 (#1429) Ήζ┤ "deferred to caller wiring" Ήε╝Έκε ΈΓρΆ╕┤ emit ΊΧρΉΙαΆ░Α
  ΈΥεΈΦΦΉΨ┤ production ΉΩΡ Ή▓τ Ία╕Ή╢εΉηΡ ΊγΞΈΥζ. `autoresearch/train.py::main()`
  Ήζα audit_finished journal emit ΉπΒΊδΕ `emit_eval_response_recorded(...)`
  Ία╕Ή╢ε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. Έπν audit cycle ΈπΙΈΜν 1 event ΉΔζΉΕ▒ έΑΦ prompt = "audit cycle
  on commit X (seed_select=Y, description=Z)", response = "verdict=W
  fitness=F promoted=P dim_means_count=N", fitness_score = aggregate
  fitness, axis_scores = `{dim_means_aggregate, bench_means_aggregate}`,
  source = `"autoresearch_audit"`, **rollback_flag = `fitness == 0.0 OR
  verdict.lower() in {"reject", "regression"}`** (chosen pile = ΉΨΣΊα╕ΊΧε
  mutation, rejected pile = critical regression ΈαΡΈΛΦ ΈςΖΉΜε reject).
  Emit ΉιΕΉ▓┤Ά░Α try/except Έκε Ά░ΡΉΜ╕Ήι╕ audit cycle ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ ΉιΙΈΝΑ break ΉΧΙ ΈΡρ.
  Response payload ΈΛΦ `verdict=<v> fitness=<f> promoted=<p>
  dim_means_count=<N> bench_means_count=<M>` 5 ΊΧΕΈΥε. **DPO ΊΝΝΉζ┤ΊΦΕΈζ╝Ήζ╕
  deception ΊΧ┤ΉΗΝ** έΑΦ M4.1 build_dpo_pack Ήζα journal walker Ά░Α ΈΥεΈΦΦΉΨ┤
  *non-empty* stream ΉζΕ Ήζ╜ΉζΝ έΗΤ M4.2 publisher Ά░Α ΉΜνΉιε TRL / OpenAI /
  Bedrock ΊΧβΉΛ╡ ΈΞ░Ήζ┤ΊΕ░ ΉΔζΉΕ▒ Ά░ΑΈΛξ. Ά░βΉζΑ commit ΈΣΡ Έ▓Ι audit ΉΜε
  chosen/rejected pair ΉηΡΈΠβ ΊαΧΉΕ▒. **8 def / 14 runtime case invariant
  test** έΑΦ chosen pile + rejected pile + no-scope no-op + train.py
  source Ά▓ΑΉοζ 4ΉλΖ (import Ήκ┤Ήηυ / main ΈΓ┤Έ╢Α / rollback heuristic ΉιΧΊβΧ /
  try/except wrap) + rollback heuristic matrix 1 def ├Ω 7 parametrize.
  **OL-C1.2 (Petri per-turn emit) ΈΛΦ ΊδΕΉΗΞ** έΑΦ `.eval` log walker API
  Ά░Α stable ΊΧε ΊδΕ ΉπΕΉηΖ.

- **PR-Hermes-1d έΑΦ `session_search` LLM tool (Hermes absorption Phase 1d, minimal).**
  Phase 1c (#1439) Ήζα FTS5 Ήζ╕ΈΞ▒ΉΛν ΉεΕΉΩΡ LLM-ΈΖ╕Ή╢ε ΈΠΕΆ╡υ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ
  `core/tools/session_search.py` έΑΦ `SessionSearchTool` Ήζ┤
  `SessionManager.search_messages` (1c ΉΜιΉΕν) Ία╕Ή╢ε, Ά▓░Ά│╝Έξ╝ `matched` /
  `count` / `hits[{session_id, message_id, seq, role, timestamp, snippet,
  score}]` ΊαΧΊΔεΈκε Έ░αΊβα. **5 input field**: `query` (ΊΧΕΉΙα, sanitizer ΊΗ╡Ά│╝) +
  `session_id` (ΉΕιΊΔζ έΑΦ ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΉΕ╕ΉΖα scope) + `limit` (default 20, max 100
  clamp) + `prefer_trigram` (CJK / Έ╢ΑΈ╢Ε Έυ╕ΉηΡΉΩ┤ recall). ΈΠΕΆ╡υΈΛΦ
  `core/wiring/container.py::build_default_registry` ΉΩΡ ΈΥ▒Έκζ +
  `core/tools/definitions.json` Ήζα `memory_search` ΉπΒΉιΕΉΩΡ schema entry
  Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. **Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡ ΊζΡΈοΕ**: Έπν turn M4.4.1 Ήζα memory_recall ΉΛυΈκψΉζ┤
  *passive* Έκε `<memory-recall>` Έ╕ΦΈκζ Ήμ╝ΉηΖ. agent Ά░Α ΈΞΦ Ά╡υΉ▓┤ΉιΒΉζ╕ *active*
  recall Ήζ┤ ΊΧΕΉγΦΊΧι ΈΧΝ `session_search(query="DPO training",
  prefer_trigram=False)` ΉπΒΉιΣ Ία╕Ή╢ε Ά░ΑΈΛξ. ΈΣΡ Ή▒ΕΈΕΡ Έ│┤ΉβΕ έΑΦ passive ΈΛΦ Έπν
  turn ΉηΡΈΠβ, active ΈΛΦ LLM ΉζαΈΠΕ ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ. **Scope (1d-minimal)**: ΊαΕΉηυ
  ΊΦΕΈκεΉιζΊΛ╕ `sessions.db` ΈπΝ; cross-project (`global.db`) + async
  `SearchIndexer` thread + `geode reindex` CLI ΈΛΦ PR-Hermes-1d.2 Έκε
  defer. **14 invariant test** έΑΦ surface 2 (name + schema ΊΧΕΉΙα ΊΧΕΈΥε) +
  ΉηΖΈιξ validation 3 (empty / whitespace / non-str query) + round-trip 1
  + scope filter 1 + trigram CJK recall 1 + empty DB no-hit 1 + limit 2
  (honored / clamped) + invalid limit fallback 1 + registry ΈΥ▒Έκζ 1 +
  definitions.json schema 1.

- **PR-Hermes-1c έΑΦ FTS5 + ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ╖╕Έηρ Ήζ╕ΈΞ▒ΉΛν (Hermes absorption Phase 1c).**
  Phase 1a (#1338) Ήζα messages ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ + Phase 1b Ήζα SoT flip ΉεΕΉΩΡ full-text
  search Ήζ╕ΈΞ▒ΉΛν ΉΜιΉΕν. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/storage/fts_helpers.py` έΑΦ
  `sanitize_fts5_query` (Hermes `hermes_state.py:1796` ΊΝρΊΕ┤ absorb έΑΦ ΊΧαΉζ┤ΊΦΙ/
  ΈΠΕΊΛ╕/Ή╜εΈκι ΊΠυΊΧρ ΊΗιΊΒ░ΉζΕ double-quote escape, pure-meta ΊΗιΊΒ░ drop, Unicode
  letter bare ΉειΉπΑ) + `has_trigram_support` (SQLite 3.34+ trigram tokenize
  capability probe; graceful False on `OperationalError`). **`session_manager.py`
  ΊβΧΉηξ** έΑΦ `__init__` Ά░Α `messages_fts` (unicode61 tokenizer) ΉβΑ 3 ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░
  (insert/delete/update) Έξ╝ ΊΧφΉΔΒ ΉΔζΉΕ▒, trigram Ά░ΑΈΛξ ΉΜε `messages_fts_trigram`
  + ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░ 3Ά░ε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (graceful degrade). ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░ΈΛΦ generator `_fts_trigger_block`
  Ήε╝Έκε ΈΜρΉζ╝ SoT έΑΦ unicode/trigram ΈΣΡ ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ Ά░Ε drift Ή░ρΈΜρ. ΉΜιΆ╖ε method
  `search_messages(query, session_id=, limit=, prefer_trigram=)` Ά░Α sanitize έΗΤ
  FTS5 `MATCH ?` Ή┐╝Έου έΗΤ `bm25` ΉιΡΉΙα + `snippet()` highlight Έ░αΊβα. **18
  invariant test** έΑΦ sanitize 7Ά░ε (empty / bare alnum / hyphenated / dotted /
  internal quote escape / pure-meta drop / Unicode letter bare) + capability
  probe 2Ά░ε (modern OK / bad-conn graceful) + FTS schema 2Ά░ε (tables ΉΔζΉΕ▒ /
  triggers ΉΔζΉΕ▒) + sync 4Ά░ε (insert έΗΤ index / round-trip search / session_id
  scope / hyphen query via sanitizer) + trigram 1Ά░ε (Korean Έ╢ΑΈ╢ΕΈυ╕ΉηΡΉΩ┤
  recall) + delete cascade 1Ά░ε + empty query 1Ά░ε. 5 critical guarantees:
  default ΈΠβΉηΣ byte-equal (Ά╕░Ήκ┤ sessions/messages ΊΨΚΉεΕ Έψ╕Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ έΑΦ ΉΜιΆ╖ε FTS
  table ΈπΝ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α) / trigram ΉΩΗΈΛΦ SQLite Έ╣ΝΈΥεΉΩΡΉΕεΈΠΕ graceful (unicode61 ΈπΝ
  ΊβεΉΕ▒) / Ή┐╝Έου ΉΓ░ΊΜ░ΊΔΑΉζ┤ΉιΑΆ░Α FTS5 grammar ΉΓυΆ│ι Ή░ρΈΜρ / contentless FTS
  (`content='messages'`) Έζ╝ ΈΦΦΉΛνΊΒυ ΉΓυΉγσ Ή╡εΉΗΝ / ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░Ά░Α Ήζ╕ΈΞ▒ΉΛν ΉηΡΈΠβ
  ΈΠβΆ╕░ΊβΦ (operator ΉΙαΈΠβ reindex Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ).

- **PR-M4.4.3 έΑΦ `tool_hints` slot reader ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ + M4 sprint ΉλΖΈμΝ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) Ήζα ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ stub ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ έΑΦ **ΈςρΈΥι 4 in-context slot Ήζ┤Ήιε
  ΉβΕΉιΕ wired**. ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ `core/self_improving_loop/tool_hints.py` έΑΦ
  `~/.geode/memory/episodes.jsonl` (episodic ledger, `core.memory.episodic.EpisodicStore`
  populates) Έξ╝ `RECENT_WINDOW=200` Έ▓ΦΉεΕΈκε Ήζ╜ΉΨ┤ per-tool ΉπΣΆ│Ε έΗΤ
  `MIN_INVOCATIONS=3` + `FAIL_RATE_THRESHOLD=0.34` ΈΠβΉΜε ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ tool ΈπΝ
  surface έΗΤ `fail_rate desc, total desc` ΉιΧΈιυ έΗΤ top-K έΗΤ `<tool-hints>`
  block Ήε╝Έκε system prompt ΉΧηΉΩΡ prepend. Ά░Β tool Ήζα *Ά░ΑΉηξ Ή╡εΆ╖╝*
  non-empty error Ή║κΉ│Ρ (episodes Ά░Α newest-first Ήζ┤Έζ╝ dict Ή▓τ ΉπΕΉηΖΉζ┤
  recent), 80ΉηΡ + ellipsis trim. **Frontier signal**: `stuck_in_loops`
  / `redundant_tool_invocation` Έζ╝Έ▓ρΉζ┤ punish ΊΧαΈΛΦ ΊΝρΊΕ┤ΉζΕ *Ά╖╕ ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έκε
  in-context prevention* έΑΦ agent Ά░Α "Bash Ά░Α Ή╡εΆ╖╝ 3Έ▓Ι ΉΜνΊΝρΊΨΙΈΕν" Έ│┤Ά│ι
  ΈΜνΈξ╕ ΉιΕΈη╡ ΉΕιΊΔζ Ά░ΑΈΛξ. **Graceful** έΑΦ `EpisodicStore` import ΉΜνΊΝρ /
  ledger ΉΩΗΉζΝ / read error / non-str tool_name ΈςρΈΣΡ silent skip.
  **18 invariant test** έΑΦ `load_recent_episodes` x2 (store ΉΜνΊΝρ /
  ΉΕ▒Ά│╡) + `find_failing_tools` x8 (top_k=0 / min_invocations cap /
  fail_rate threshold / surface / most-recent-error Ή║κΉ│Ρ / desc sort
  + tiebreak / top_k cap / non-str tool_name skip / 80-char trim) +
  `format_tool_hints_block` x3 (empty / with-error / without-error) +
  orchestrator x2 (block prepend / no-failing no-op). **M4 sprint
  ΉλΖΈμΝ** έΑΦ M4.0 (#1429 event) έΗΤ M4.1 (#1430 pack) έΗΤ M4.2 (#1431
  publisher) έΗΤ M4.3 (#1434 redaction/stats) έΗΤ M4.4 (#1435 orchestrator) έΗΤ
  M4.4.1 (#1436 memory_recall) έΗΤ M4.4.2 (#1437 rubric_excerpts) έΗΤ
  **M4.4.3 Έ│╕ PR (tool_hints + closure)**.

- **PR-M4.4.2 έΑΦ `rubric_excerpts` slot reader ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) Ήζα ΈΣΡ Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ stub ΉΛυΈκψ ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ. ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ
  `core/self_improving_loop/rubric_excerpts.py` έΑΦ
  `autoresearch/state/baseline.json` Ήζ╜ΉΨ┤ `dim_means` vs
  `baseline_means` Ή░ρΉζ┤ Ά│ΕΉΓ░ έΗΤ `baseline_means[d] - dim_means[d] > 0`
  Ήζ╕ dim ΈπΝ (regression positive) top-K desc ΉιΧΈιυ έΗΤ ΈΓ┤Ήηξ 17-dim
  `DIM_RUBRIC` Ήζα directive ΉβΑ join έΗΤ `<rubric-warning>` Έ╕ΦΈκζ render έΗΤ
  orchestrator Ά░Α system prompt ΉΧηΉΩΡ prepend. `DIM_RUBRIC` ΉζΑ 5
  critical + 12 auxiliary = 17Ά░ε fitness dim ΈςρΈΣΡ cover (ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕Ά░Α
  `autoresearch.train.AXIS_TIERS` ΉβΑ ΈΠβΆ╕░ Ά▓ΑΉοζ). **Graceful** έΑΦ missing
  / malformed / non-dict baseline ΈςρΈΣΡ silent no-op. **Per-axis
  type-guard** έΑΦ `dim_means[d]` Ά░Α non-numeric Ήζ┤Έσ┤ Ά╖╕ dim ΈπΝ skip,
  ΈΓαΈρ╕ΉπΑΈΛΦ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝. **Frontier parity** έΑΦ Claude Code Ήζα
  `<system-reminder>` + Codex CLI Ήζα `<important_reminders>` ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝
  pattern. **17 invariant test** έΑΦ `DIM_RUBRIC` 17 cover + ΈςρΈΥι entry
  non-empty + `load_baseline` x4 (missing / malformed / non-dict /
  valid) + `find_worst_regressions` x7 (top_k=0 / improving skip /
  desc sort / top_k cap / missing means / non-numeric skip / DIM_RUBRIC
  attach) + `format_rubric_block` x2 (empty / render with unknown-dim
  fallback) + orchestrator x2 (prepend / no-baseline no-op).
  **Remaining stub count after this PR: 1** (tool_hints only,
  M4.4.3 follow-up).

- **PR-M4.4.1 έΑΦ `memory_recall` slot reader ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ (ADR-012).**
  M4.4 (#1435) Ήζα 4 ΉΛυΈκψ ΉνΣ Ή▓τ Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ stub ΉζΕ ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ. ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ
  `core/self_improving_loop/memory_recall.py` έΑΦ frontmatter-style MD
  ΊΝΝΉζ╝ (Claude Code Ήζα auto-memory ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ schema) ΉζΕ
  `~/.geode/memory/recall/` (ΈαΡΈΛΦ `GEODE_MEMORY_RECALL_DIR` env
  override) ΉΩΡΉΕε walk έΗΤ `MemoryEntry(name, type, description, body,
  mtime)` Έκε parse έΗΤ `rank_memory_entries(entries, query, top_k)` Ά░Α
  keyword overlap ├Ω recency_weight (`1 / (1 + age_days)`) Έκε ΉιΧΈιυ έΗΤ
  `format_memory_block` Ήζ┤ `<memory-recall>\n- [type] description\n
  ...\n</memory-recall>` Έ╕ΦΈκζ render. **Orchestrator wiring** έΑΦ
  `in_context_wiring.apply_in_context_slots` Ά░Α `SLOT_MEMORY_RECALL`
  cfg Έ░εΆ▓υ ΉΜε ΉεΕ 3ΈΜρΆ│Ε Ία╕Ή╢ε, Ά▓░Ά│╝ Έ╕ΦΈκζΉζΕ system prompt ΉΧηΉΩΡ
  prepend (per-slot try/except Έκε ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε graceful). `_latest_user_query`
  helper Ά░Α messages Ήζα ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ user-role string content Ή╢ΦΉ╢ε έΗΤ similarity
  ranking Ήζα query Έκε ΉΓυΉγσ. **Per-file graceful** έΑΦ frontmatter ΈΙΕΈζ╜ /
  unreadable file / ΉηαΈς╗ΈΡε YAML ΉζΑ silent skip. **No-op fast path**
  ΉειΉπΑ έΑΦ recall dir Έψ╕Ήκ┤Ήηυ ΉΜε `resolve_recall_dir()` Ά░Α None Έ░αΊβα έΗΤ
  reader Ά░Α `[]` Έ░αΊβα έΗΤ orchestrator Ά░Α system Έψ╕Έ│ΑΆ▓╜. **16 invariant
  test** έΑΦ resolve x3 (env override / env-missing-graceful / default-missing) +
  load x3 (no-dir / frontmatter parse / malformed skip) + rank x4 (overlap /
  recency tiebreak / top_k=0 / top_k cap) + format x4 (empty / type-tag
  render / **description-only with empty body** / **body-only fallback** έΑΦ
  Codex MCP Ά░Α ΉηκΉζΑ ternary precedence regression) + orchestrator ΊΗ╡ΊΧσ x2
  (block prepend / no-dir no-op).

- **PR-M4.4 έΑΦ In-context slot wiring orchestrator + provider wiring (ADR-012).**
  M4 DPO pipeline Ήζα closing piece έΑΦ S5 (#1425) Ήζα 4-slot schema ΉβΑ M3
  (#1426/#1428) Ήζα few-shot pool substrate Έξ╝ ΉΜνΉιε inference path ΉΩΡ
  ΉΩ░Ά▓░. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/self_improving_loop/in_context_wiring.py`
  Ήζα `apply_in_context_slots(messages, system="")` orchestrator έΑΦ
  S5 `_load_in_context_slots_override()` Ά░Α None Ήζ┤Έσ┤ input Ά░ζΉ▓┤
  **identity** Έ░αΊβα (zero-allocation no-op fast path; default GEODE
  operator ΈΛΦ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α Έ╣ΕΉγσ 0). slot ΊβεΉΕ▒ ΉΜε per-slot try/except Έκε Ά░Β
  reader/apply Ά░Α ΈΠΖΈο╜ graceful. **exemplars ΉΛυΈκψ = ΉΜνΉιε ΊβεΉΕ▒** έΑΦ
  M3 Ήζα `_load_few_shot_pool_override` + `apply_few_shot_pool` ΉζΕ
  Ία╕Ή╢ε, top-K (user, assistant) ΉΝΞΉζΕ messages head ΉΩΡ prepend.
  fitness_delta desc rank. **memory_recall / rubric_excerpts /
  tool_hints 3 ΉΛυΈκψ = ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ stub at PR-M4.4 merge time** έΑΦ
  orchestrator Ήζ┤ SoT ΉΩΡΉΕε Ά╖╕ Ήκ┤ΉηυΈξ╝ Ήζ╕ΉΜζΊΧαΉπΑΈπΝ reader Έψ╕Ά╡υΊαΕΉζ┤Έζ╝
  no-op; ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR Ά░Α 1Ά░εΉΦσ ΊβεΉΕ▒ΊβΦ (PR-M4.4.1 #1436 έΗΤ memory_recall,
  PR-M4.4.2 έΗΤ rubric_excerpts; tool_hints ΈπΝ PR-M4.4.3 ΈΝΑΆ╕░). **Provider
  wiring 2ΉπΑΉιΡ** έΑΦ `core/llm/providers/anthropic.py::ClaudeAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  + `core/llm/providers/openai.py::OpenAIAgenticAdapter.agentic_call`
  Ήζα api-key/circuit-breaker Ή▓┤ΊΒυ ΉπΒΊδΕ orchestrator Ία╕Ή╢ε, Ά▓░Ά│╝Έκε
  `(messages, system)` Ά░▒ΉΜι. ΈΣΡ path ΈςρΈΣΡ inspect.getsource grep
  assertion Ήε╝Έκε wiring Έ│┤Ήοζ. **11 invariant test** έΑΦ no-op
  identity 3 (no SoT / Έ╣Ι dict / reader exception) + exemplars
  prepend 1 + exemplars Έ╣Ι pool no-op + exemplars ΉΜνΊΝρ graceful +
  system passthrough + 3 stub slot non-error + provider import
  smoke 2 + __all__ minimal export. ContextVar / hook Έψ╕ΉΓυΉγσ έΑΦ
  Έπν LLM call ΈπΙΈΜν ContextVar lookup ΊΧε Έ▓ΙΈΠΕ ΉΩΗΈΛΦ stateless
  orchestrator. Frontier Έ╣ΕΆ╡Ρ: Claude Code system prompt /
  Codex CLI `<system-reminder>` Ήζα 4 layer wiring ΉζΕ mutator-target
  ΊβΦ ΊΧε explicit schema.

- **PR-M4.3 έΑΦ DPO pack PII redaction + stats (ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`) Ά░Α
  user prompts + assistant responses Έξ╝ verbatim Ήε╝Έκε Ά░ΑΉπΑΈψΑΈκε M4.2
  publish ΉιΕ PII / secret ΉΛνΊΒυΈθ╜Ήζ┤ ΊΧΕΉΙα. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_redaction.py` έΑΦ `redact_text(text)` Ά░Α 7
  Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου ΊΝρΊΕ┤ ΉιΒΉγσ: API key (Anthropic / OpenAI / Slack / GitHub /
  ZhipuAI έΑΦ `core/utils/redaction.py` Ήζα Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `_SECRET_PATTERNS` ΉηυΊβεΉγσ)
  + AWS access key (AKIA / ASIA) + Bearer token + Email + Phone (E.164 /
  dashed / parenthesised) + URL credentials (`https://u:p@host`) + POSIX
  home path (`/Users/<name>/` + `/home/<name>/`). `redact_pack_row(row)`
  Ά░Α 5 ΊΖΞΉΛνΊΛ╕ ΊΧΕΈΥε (`prompt` / `chosen` / `rejected` / `source_chosen` /
  `source_rejected`) ΈπΝ ΉΛνΊΒυΈθ╜, ΉΙτΉηΡ / signature ΊΧΕΈΥεΈΛΦ passthrough.
  `redact_pack(src, dst) -> int` Ά░Α read έΗΤ scrub έΗΤ write JSONL έΑΦ missing
  src έΗΤ empty dst ΊΝΝΉζ╝ (graceful), malformed line silent drop, re-run
  byte-equal Ά▓░ΉιΧΉΕ▒ Έ│┤Ήηξ. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_stats.py`
  έΑΦ `pack_stats(path) -> dict` Ά░Α pair_count / unique_prompts /
  fitness_delta {min,max,mean,median} / source_{chosen,rejected}_histogram
  Έ░αΊβα. missing / empty / all-malformed έΗΤ Έ╣Ι dict (graceful).
  **redaction layer ΈΛΦ ΊγρΆ│╝ΉιΒ 7 Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου** έΑΦ API key ΈΛΦ `redact_secrets`
  delegate Ήζ┤ΈψΑΈκε ΈςρΈΥΙΉζα `PII_PATTERNS` table ΉηΡΉ▓┤ΈΛΦ 6 entry (URL
  cred / AWS / Bearer / Email / home / Phone) + 1 delegate. **19 + 8
  = 27 invariant test** έΑΦ redaction 19 (ΊΝρΊΕ┤Έ│Ε 9 scrub + empty ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ +
  no-match unchanged + composed multi-secret + pattern table sanity +
  pack_row field-scope 2 + redact_pack 4) + stats 8 (missing / empty /
  malformed έΗΤ Έ╣Ι dict + Ά╕░Έ│╕ aggregate / unique_prompts / required
  field ΈΙΕΈζ╜ drop / int coerce / missing source histogram). Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ
  Έ│ΑΊβα + ΊΗ╡Ά│ΕΈπΝ; M4.2 publisher ΉβΑ ΊΧσΉ│ΡΉΕε Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α
  `redact_pack έΗΤ publish` ΊΝΝΉζ┤ΊΦΕΈζ╝Ήζ╕ ΉΙαΈΠβ ΉΩχΉΨ┤ ΉΓυΉγσ. CLI integration ΉζΑ
  M4.4 ΊδΕΉΗΞ.

- **PR-PAPERCLIP έΑΦ Paperclip pattern wiring for self-improving loop mutator.**
  ΉΓυΉιΕ PR (PR-1 G-A) Ά░Α `MutatorConfig.source = Literal["auto", "api_key",
  "claude-cli", "openai-codex"]` knob ΈπΝ ΈΠΕΉηΖΊΨΙΆ│ι runner ΈΛΦ source Έξ╝ *ΈκεΆ╖╕ΈπΝ*
  Ή░ΞΉΩΙΈΜν. Έ│╕ PR Ήζ┤ ΉΜνΉιε dispatch Έξ╝ ΉΩ░Ά▓░. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` έΑΦ `invoke_claude_cli` /
  `invoke_codex_cli` subprocess wrapper. `claude --print --output-format text
  --append-system-prompt <SYS> <USR>` / `codex exec --skip-git-repo-check
  <SYS+USR>` argv shape. binary path ΈΛΦ `$PATH` Ήζα `claude`/`codex` ΈαΡΈΛΦ env
  override (`GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_BIN` / `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_BIN`). missing έΗΤ
  `CliInvocationError` (ΉΕνΉ╣α hint ΈΠβΈ┤Κ). 180s timeout. **runner Έ│ΑΆ▓╜** έΑΦ
  `_default_llm_call` Ά░Α `cfg.mutator.source` Ά▓ΑΉΓυ ΊδΕ paperclip Ήζ╝ ΈΧΝ
  subprocess wrapper Ία╕Ή╢ε, else Ά╕░Ήκ┤ API path ΉειΉπΑ (zero-diff for default
  operators). **UI/UX** έΑΦ `/self-improving config` (interactive ΉΕνΉιΧΉ░╜,
  mutator + petri.<role> + seed_generation.<role> Ή╗┤ΊΠυΈΕΝΊΛ╕Έ│Ε provider /
  model / source ΉηΖΈιξ, Enter Έκε ΊαΕΉηυΆ░Τ ΉειΉπΑ, ΉβΕΈμΝ ΊδΕ `/self-improving run`
  Ή▓┤Ήζ┤ΈΜζ Ήα╡ΉΖα έΑΦ ΉηΖΈιξ ΊΧΕΈΥε *model + source*) + `/self-improving source`
  (ΊαΕΉηυ ΉΔΒΊΔε ΊΖΝΉζ┤Έ╕Φ) + `/self-improving source set <key>=<value>`
  (non-interactive mutator setter). **TOML ΉΥ░Ά╕░** έΑΦ `_splice_section`
  ΊΩυΊΞ╝Ά░Α `~/.geode/config.toml` Ήζα section header Έξ╝ Ή░╛ΉΧΕ in-place key
  Ά░▒ΉΜι, ΈΙΕΈζ╜ section ΉζΑ append, sibling section Έ│┤Ήκ┤. seed-generation
  role ΉΥ░Ά╕░ΈΛΦ **plural `roles.<X>`** path ΉΓυΉγσ (loader schema ΉβΑ ΈΠβΆ╕░
  έΑΦ Codex MCP catch). `atomic_write_text` + `_toml_escape_basic_string`
  (Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `cmd_config.py` ΊΝρΊΕ┤). **18 invariant test** έΑΦ argv shape 2 /
  missing binary / env override / Έ╣ΕΉιΧΉΔΒ exit / **timeout** / runner
  dispatch 3 (claude-cli + codex + api_key Έυ┤Έ│ΑΆ▓╜) / TOML splice 5
  (append + replace + insert + sibling Έ│┤Ήκ┤ + Ήζ┤ΉΛνΉ╝ΑΉζ┤ΊΦΕ) + source set
  3 + **seed-generation roles plural-path round-trip**
  (writer έΗΤ loader validate). ΉαΒΊΨξ Έ▓ΦΉεΕ έΑΦ paperclip ΉζΑ self-improving
  loop **mutator only** (Q1 ΉζΣΈΜ╡). Agentic Loop Ήζ╝ΉΔΒ Ία╕Ή╢εΉζΑ Ά╕░Ήκ┤ API
  path Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε.

- **PR-M4.2 έΑΦ DPO publisher adapters (TRL / OpenAI / Bedrock, ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack ΉζΕ per-provider DPO ΊΧβΉΛ╡ ΉηΖΈιξ ΊΠυΈπ╖Ήε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΊβα.
  **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_publisher.py` έΑΦ 3 adapter
  ΊΧρΉΙα (`to_trl_format` / `to_openai_format` / `to_bedrock_format`) +
  `publish_pack(target, pack_path, out_path) -> int` dispatcher. ΈςρΈΥι
  Έ│ΑΊβαΉζΑ **pure transform** έΑΦ network call / SDK import / API key
  read Ήζ╝Ή▓┤ ΉΩΗΉζΝ. Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΈΛΦ Ά▓░Ά│╝ JSONL ΉζΕ provider Ήζα upload tool
  (`openai files create` / `aws s3 cp` / `hf datasets push`) ΉΩΡ ΉιΕΈΜυ.
  **Idempotency** έΑΦ `publish_pack` Ά░Α destination ΉζΕ ΈπνΈ▓Ι overwrite
  ΊΧαΈψΑΈκε ΈΠβΉζ╝ (pack, target) ΉηΖΈιξΉζΑ byte-equal output ΉΔζΉΕ▒.
  **Adapter Έ│Ε row schema**: TRL = Ή╡εΉΗΝ triple `{prompt, chosen,
  rejected}` (TRL DPOTrainer ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉΗΝΈ╣Ε). OpenAI = messages ΉΛνΊΔΑΉζ╝
  `{input.messages, preferred_output, non_preferred_output}` (OpenAI
  preference fine-tuning guide Ήζα schema). Bedrock = generic
  passthrough `{prompt, chosen, rejected, signature, fitness_chosen,
  fitness_rejected, fitness_delta}` (base model family Έ│Ε schema
  ΊΟ╕Ή░ρΆ░Α Ή╗νΉΕε Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡΆ░Α ΊδΕΉ▓αΈουΊΧαΈΠΕΈκζ audit metadata ΉειΉπΑ). **Graceful**
  έΑΦ missing pack file έΗΤ 0 rows + empty out file. Malformed JSONL line
  + Έ╣Ε dict + prompt/chosen/rejected str ΈΙΕΈζ╜ row ΈΛΦ silently drop.
  **ValueError** έΑΦ `SUPPORTED_TARGETS = ("trl", "openai", "bedrock")`
  Ήβ╕ target. Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ transform ΈπΝ; CLI integration + network upload
  + PII redaction (M4.3) ΉζΑ ΊδΕΉΗΞ. **14 invariant test** έΑΦ TRL minimal
  triple / OpenAI messages schema / Bedrock fitness Έ│┤Ήκ┤ + ΈΙΕΈζ╜ graceful
  / SUPPORTED_TARGETS manifest / publish_pack one-row-per-pack-row /
  overwrite / byte-equal rerun / missing pack empty file / invalid
  target ValueError / malformed line drop / openai+bedrock dispatch /
  no-network import guard (forbidden SDK 8ΉλΖ stdlib Ήβ╕ Έψ╕ΉιΒΉηυ).

- **PR-M4.1 έΑΦ DPO canonical preference-pack JSONL writer (ADR-012).**
  Consumes M4.0 Ήζα `eval_response_recorded` event stream έΗΤ Ά░Β unique
  `prompt` group ΉζΕ chosen pile (`rollback_flag=False`) + rejected pile
  (`rollback_flag=True`) Έκε Έ╢ΕΊΧι έΗΤ **top-fitness chosen ├Ω bottom-fitness
  rejected** 1 pair Έξ╝ emit (Ά░ΑΉηξ ΉΕιΈςΖΊΧε fitness margin = DPO ΊΧβΉΛ╡ ΉΜιΊα╕
  Ή╡εΈΝΑ). **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_pack.py` έΑΦ
  `build_dpo_pack(journal_paths, pack_path) -> BuildResult` (appended /
  duplicate / events_seen / unpaired count) + `pair_signature(prompt,
  chosen, rejected)` 16-hex ΉΜζΈ│ΕΉηΡ + `BuildResult` frozen dataclass.
  **Idempotency** έΑΦ signature-keyed dedup Ήε╝Έκε ΉηυΉΜνΊΨΚ ΉΜε ΉΜιΆ╖ε pair ΈπΝ
  append; Ά╕░Ήκ┤ pack rows Έ│┤Ήκ┤. **Graceful** έΑΦ missing journal file έΗΤ
  empty Ή▓αΈου, malformed JSONL line ΉζΑ silently drop (per-line parse
  guard). Pack Ά▓╜Έκε `GLOBAL_DPO_PACK_PATH = ~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`
  (operator-local, NOT git-tracked έΑΦ preference data ΈΛΦ M4.3 redaction
  Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ-ΉΓυΉιΒ). **Pack schema** έΑΦ `signature` / `prompt` /
  `chosen` / `rejected` / `fitness_chosen` / `fitness_rejected` /
  `fitness_delta` / `ts_chosen` / `ts_rejected` / `session_id_chosen` /
  `session_id_rejected` / `source_chosen` / `source_rejected` (13
  field). Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ transform ΈπΝ; M4.2 publisher (OpenAI / Bedrock /
  HuggingFace TRL adapter) ΈΛΦ ΊδΕΉΗΞ. **12 invariant test** έΑΦ signature
  determinism + field-sensitivity / empty journal / missing-file
  graceful / pair-selection top├Ωbottom / chosen-only + rejected-only
  unpaired / idempotency ΉηυΉΜνΊΨΚ zero append / ΉΜιΆ╖ε prompt ΈπΝ append /
  multi-journal cross-session merge / malformed line drop. Rafailov
  2023 DPO formulation Ήζα `(x, y_w, y_l)` triple Ά│╝ ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉιΧΊΧσ.

- **PR-M4.0 έΑΦ `eval_response_recorded` SessionJournal event (ADR-012).**
  DPO pipeline (M4.x) Ήζα Ή▓τ piece έΑΦ Ά░Β (prompt, response) turn ΈπΙΈΜν
  fitness Ή╕κΉιΧΆ░Τ + ΊΠΚΆ░Α metadata Έξ╝ active SessionJournal ΉΩΡ emit.
  M4.1 Ήζα DPO canonical pack JSONL writer Ά░Α Ήζ┤ stream ΉζΕ ΈΦ░Έζ╝Ά░ΑΈσ░
  chosen/rejected pile Έζ╝Έ▓ρΈπΒ. **ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΈςρΈΥΙ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/eval_journaling.py` έΑΦ `EVENT_NAME` constant +
  `emit_eval_response_recorded(prompt, response, fitness_score,
  axis_scores, source, rollback_flag)` helper. Active scope Ήβ╕ΉΩΡΉΕε
  graceful no-op (False Έ░αΊβα) έΑΦ Ία╕Ή╢εΉηΡ try/except Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ. `rollback_flag`
  Ά░Α True Έσ┤ user revert ΉΜιΊα╕ (M4.1 rejected Έζ╝Έ▓ρ). `axis_scores` Ά░Α
  None / Έ╣Ι dict Έσ┤ payload key omit (forward-compat). int / bool Ά░ΤΉζΑ
  float coerce. Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ emit ΊΧρΉΙα + payload schema ΈπΝ; emit Ία╕Ή╢ε site
  (Petri audit / live session / replay test ΈΥ▒) ΈΛΦ ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR ΉΩΡΉΕε wiring.
  **11 invariant test** έΑΦ event name + no-scope no-op + minimal payload +
  full payload + rollback flag (true/default) + axis_scores omit (None /
  empty) + float coerce 2 + multi-event append. Voyager / STaR Ήζα
  successful-trajectory journaling ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε.

- **PR-M3 έΑΦ Few-shot exemplar pool ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉιΒΉηυ (ADR-012).** S5 (#1425)
  ΉΩΡΉΕε declared ΈπΝ ΈΡΡΈΞα `exemplars` slot Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε *ΉιΒΉηυ ΈσΦΉ╗νΈΜΙΉοα* ΉΜιΉΕν.
  fitness gate ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ΊΧε task-completion candidate Ήζα `(user_msg,
  assistant_msg, fitness_delta, source)` triple ΉζΕ JSONL append-only
  Έκε Ή╢ΧΉιΒ; runtime ΉΩΡ top-K ΉΕιΈ│ΕΊΧ┤ messages ΉΧηΉΩΡ in-context exemplar
  pair Έκε ΉΓ╜ΉηΖ. **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤**: SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/few-shot-pool.jsonl` + operator-local /
  `GLOBAL_FEW_SHOT_POOL_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_FEW_SHOT_POOL_PATH`
  Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/llm/few_shot_pool.py` reader (`FewShotExemplar` frozen
  dataclass + `_load_few_shot_pool_override` + `apply_few_shot_pool`) /
  inference entry ΈΛΦ M4.4 deferred (ΊαΕ PR ΉζΑ SoT + reader + apply
  ΊΧρΉΙαΈπΝ, anthropic.py / openai.py Ήζα message Ήκ░Έο╜Έ╢Α wiring ΉζΑ
  ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR) / `GEODE_FEW_SHOT_POOL_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` env pair.
  **Per-line graceful** έΑΦ JSONL ΊΧε ΉνΕΉζ┤ broken Ήζ┤ΉΨ┤ΈΠΕ ΈΓαΈρ╕ΉπΑ ΉνΕΉζΑ
  ΉειΉπΑ (`_parse_jsonl` ΈΜρΉεΕ). bool fitness_delta ΈΥ▒ type trap έΗΤ
  0.0 coerce. missing/empty user_msg/assistant_msg έΗΤ skip. T5 (cache
  policy) ΉβΑ Ία╕Ίβα έΑΦ exemplar prefix Ά░Α Anthropic cache breakpoint
  Ήζα stable prefix Έκε ΉηΡΉΩ░ΉΛνΈθ╜Ά▓Ν ΉιΧΈιυ. **23 invariant test** έΑΦ
  reader 11 (None / empty / blank / valid / per-line graceful /
  missing field / non-dict / fitness coerce / bool trap / strict /
  operator-local) + apply 6 (None / empty / max=0 / single insert /
  top-K rank / cap / no-mutate) + 3-layer wiring + path const +
  env wiring + ALIVE marker. Voyager / STaR Ήζα *successful trajectory
  pool* ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε έΑΦ ΉηΡΆ╕░ ΉΕ▒Ά│╡ ΉΓυΈκΑΈξ╝ ΈΜνΉζΝ cycle Ήζα in-context
  exemplar Έκε ΉηυΊΙυΉηΖ.

- **PR-M2 έΑΦ Agent contract mutation slot (ADR-012).** AgentDefinition
  Ήζα `role` / `system_prompt` / `tools` Έξ╝ mutator Ά░Α evolve. `model`
  field ΈΛΦ Tier 2 (ΉΧΙΉιΕΉΕ▒ invariants root) έΑΦ Έ│╕ surface ΉΩΡΉΕε ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ
  ΉιεΉβ╕ (mutator Ά░Α provider ΉηΕΉζα Έ│ΑΆ▓╜Ήε╝Έκε safety guardrail Ήγ░ΊγΝ Έ░σΉπΑ).
  5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤: SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/agent-contracts.json`
  (+ operator-local) / `GLOBAL_AGENT_CONTRACTS_PATH` +
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_AGENT_CONTRACTS_PATH` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α /
  `core/agent/agent_contracts_policy.py` reader (`_load_agent_contracts_override`
  + `apply_agent_contracts_policy(agent_def, policy)` έΑΦ `model_copy(update=...)`
  Έκε ΉΔΙ instance Έ░αΊβα, ΉδΡΈ│╕ immutable) /
  `core/agent/sub_agent.py:resolve_agent` Ά░Α `_agent_registry.get()` ΉπΒΊδΕ
  `apply_agent_contracts_policy(...)` Ία╕Ή╢ε / `autoresearch/train.py`
  env wiring + `core/self_improving_loop/policies.py:TARGET_KINDS`
  5 έΗΤ 6 (skill_catalog ΈΤν agent_contract Ή╢ΦΆ░Α). M1 Ήζα nested έΗΦ flat
  Έ│ΑΊβα helper Έξ╝ Ήζ╝Έ░αΊβΦ (`_BOOL_FIELDS_BY_KIND` / `_LIST_FIELDS_BY_KIND`
  / `_NESTED_KINDS` frozenset) έΑΦ `tools` field ΈΛΦ list[str] Ήζ┤ΈψΑΈκε
  comma-separated string Ήε╝Έκε flat έΗΦ list[str] Έ│ΑΊβα. `_coerce` Ά░Α
  `model` field ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ drop (Tier 2 guardrail in code). **18 invariant
  test** έΑΦ dispatcher 4 + reader 8 + apply 5 + dispatcher round-trip 2
  + M1 BC 1 + model preservation 1. **22 ΉΜιΆ╖ε test** (ΉηυΉπΣΆ│Ε έΑΦ Codex
  MCP correction). M1 Ήζα invariant test ΈΠΕ 5έΗΤέΚξ5 Ήε╝Έκε ΉβΕΊβΦ (count grow
  forward-compat). M2 ΊΧσΈξα ΊδΕ **4 stale test set Ά░▒ΉΜι** (m1 +
  policy_mutation + adr_012 + 5_slot_audit).

- **PR-M1 έΑΦ Skill mutation slot Ά░εΊΗ╡ (ADR-012).** T2 (#1418) Ήζα
  `skill-catalog.json` reader Έξ╝ mutator Ήζα mutation contract Ά░Α
  ΉΜνΉιεΈκε mutate ΊΧι ΉΙα ΉηΙΈΠΕΈκζ dispatcher ΊβΧΉηξ. `core/self_improving_loop/
  policies.py:TARGET_KINDS` Ά░Α 4 έΗΤ 5 (prompt / tool_policy /
  decomposition / reflection + **skill_catalog**). retrieval ΉζΑ S0d
  deprecation ΉειΉπΑ (ΊαΕ 5-slot ΉΩΡ ΊΠυΊΧρ X). ΈΜνΈξ╕ 4 kind ΉβΑ ΈΜυΈου
  skill_catalog Ήζα disk shape ΈΛΦ **nested**
  (`{skill_name: {description, user_invocable}}`) έΑΦ mutation row Ήζα
  `target_section` ΉζΑ string ΈπΝ ΊΩΙΉγσΊΧαΈψΑΈκε **dotted-key flat έΗΦ nested**
  Έ│ΑΊβα layer Ή╢ΦΆ░Α:
  - `_flatten_nested(disk_dict) έΗΤ flat dotted-key dict`: load_policy
    Ά░Α runner ΉΩΡ flat shape Έ░αΊβα (ΈΜνΈξ╕ 4 kind ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ contract).
  - `_unflatten_nested(flat) έΗΤ nested dict`: write_policy Ά░Α T2-reader
    Ία╕Ίβα shape Έκε ΉιΑΉηξ. `user_invocable` ΈΥ▒ bool field ΈΛΦ `"true"`/
    `"false"` έΗΤ bool coerce.
  **End-to-end consistency invariant** έΑΦ `M1 write_policy` Ά░Α ΉΥ┤ file
  ΉζΕ `T2 reader (_validate_schema + _coerce)` Ά░Α Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε parse ΊΧ┤ΉΧ╝
  ΊΧρ. 16 invariant test Ά░Α round-trip + BC + dispatcher state ΈςρΈΣΡ
  Ά▓ΑΉοζ. tests/test_self_improving_5_slot_reader_audit.py +
  test_adr_012_surface_tiers.py + test_policy_mutation.py Ήζα 4-slot
  expected set ΈΠΕ 5-slot Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι (M1 ΊΧσΈξα). ΉΜιΆ╖ε 18 invariant test
  (test_m1_skill_mutation_slot.py) + 3 stale set Ά░▒ΉΜι.

- **PR-S5 έΑΦ 4ΉλΖ in-context slot ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ schema (ADR-012).** GEODE Ήζα
  agent Ά░Α Έπν turn ΈπΙΈΜν system prompt + tool messages ΉΩΡ Ήμ╝ΉηΖΊΧαΈΛΦ
  dynamic context Ήζα **4 canonical slot category** Έξ╝ explicit JSON
  schema Έκε ΊΣεΈσ┤ΊβΦ. M4.4 ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR Ήζ┤ Ήζ┤ schema Έξ╝ inference path ΉΩΡΉΕε
  ΉΗΝΈ╣ΕΊΧι wiring ΉζΕ ΈΜ┤ΈΜ╣; Έ│╕ PR ΉζΑ schema + reader + validation ΈπΝ
  (no inference wiring έΑΦ explicit ΉζαΈΠΕ). **4 slot**: `exemplars`
  (Elo top-K), `memory_recall` (~/.geode/memory/), `rubric_excerpts`
  (Petri worst-dim rubric), `tool_hints` (RunLog Ήζα tool-specific ΊηΝΊΛ╕).
  **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤**: SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/in-context-slots.json`
  + operator-local / `GLOBAL_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_PATH` +
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_PATH` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α /
  `core/self_improving_loop/in_context_slots.py` reader
  (`_load_in_context_slots_override` + frozen `InContextSlot`
  dataclass) / inference entry M4.4 deferred /
  `GEODE_IN_CONTEXT_SLOTS_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` env pair. Per-slot
  `injection_point` ΉζΑ enum (`system_prompt` / `tool_descriptions`)
  έΑΦ mutator Ήζα typo Ά░Α silent injection Ήε╝Έκε Ά░ΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΈΠΕΈκζ graceful
  drop. `_coerce` Ά░Α unknown slot + invalid max_entries (negative /
  bool) + unknown injection_point ΉΖΜ ΈΜν per-axis graceful drop.
  **20 invariant test** έΑΦ canonical schema 4 + loader 11 + path 1 +
  env wiring 1 + ALIVE marker 1 + frozen dataclass 1 + operator-local
  priority 1. Frontier: Claude Code / Codex CLI Ήζα hardcoded layout
  ΉζΕ mutator-optimizable JSON schema Έκε ΊΣεΈσ┤ΊβΦ.

- **PR-S4 έΑΦ task-completion seed cohort (ADR-012).** seed-generation ΉΩΡ
  cohort Ά░εΈΖΡ ΈΠΕΉηΖ έΑΦ ΉΨ┤ΈΨν *axis* Ήζα regression ΉζΕ ΈΜνΉζΝ generation Ήζ┤ Ά│╡Ά▓σΊΧιΉπΑ
  Ά▓░ΉιΧ. `petri_17dim` (default, BC) ΉβΑ `task_completion` (S4 ΉΜιΉΕν) 2 cohort
  Έκε ΉΜεΉηΣ, Ή╢ΦΊδΕ `admire_routing` / `bench_capability` ΊβΧΉηξ forward-compat.
  **`plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`**: (a) 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε constant
  `PETRI_17DIM_COHORT` / `TASK_COMPLETION_COHORT` / `SEED_COHORTS` export,
  (b) ΉΜιΆ╖ε picker `pick_regression_target(snapshot, cohort)` έΑΦ cohort Έ│Ε
  signal direction Ή▓αΈου: petri ΈΛΦ MAX (ΈΗΤΉζΕΉΙαΈκζ concerning, rubric
  invariant), task_completion ΉζΑ MIN (ux_means Ήζα normalized-higher-is-better
  contract ΈΦ░Έζ╝ lowest Ά░Α worst). Tie-break alphabetical. Unknown cohort
  έΗΤ `ValueError`. **`plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.py:PipelineState`**:
  `cohort: str = "petri_17dim"` field Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (BC). **Ά╕░Ήκ┤
  `pick_regression_target_dim` unchanged** έΑΦ pre-S4 caller Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε.
  **13 invariant test** έΑΦ cohort enum 3 + petri picker 2 +
  task_completion picker 3 + validation 2 + BC 2 + export 1.
  Generator/critic/evolver Ήζα cohort-specific prompt + CLI `--cohort`
  flag ΉζΑ S4b ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR (Ήζ┤ PR ΉζΑ picker + state schema ΈπΝ).

- **PR-S3 έΑΦ Ά│╡ΈΠβ ratchet: 4Ή╢Χ baseline.json (ADR-012).** `baseline.json`
  schema Ά░Α pre-S3 `{dim_means, dim_stderr}` ΉΩΡΉΕε S3 Ήζα **5-field 4Ή╢Χ
  schema** `{dim_means, dim_stderr, ux_means, admire_means, bench_means}`
  Έκε ΊβΧΉηξ. compute_fitness ΈΛΦ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ 4Ή╢Χ signature ΉαΑΉε╝ΈΓα `_write_baseline`
  / `_load_baseline` Ά░Α dim ΈπΝ persist ΊΨΙΈΞα GAP ΉζΕ closure. seed-generation
  Ήζα `BaselineSnapshot` ΈΠΕ 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε field Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (`ux_means` / `admire_means`
  / `bench_means`) έΑΦ ΈςρΈΣΡ default `{}` Έκε pre-S3 baseline Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε graceful
  ΈκεΈΦσ. `autoresearch/train.py`: (a) `_write_baseline` Ά░Α 3 ΉΜιΆ╖ε axis
  kwarg-optional (`None`/`{}` ΉζΑ payload omit, backwards compat),
  (b) `_load_baseline` 5-tuple Έ░αΊβα + ΉΜιΆ╖ε `_coerce_axis_dict` helper
  Έκε per-axis graceful drop (ΈΜρΉζ╝ axis ΉΗΡΉΔΒΉζ┤ load-bearing dim Έ╢ΑΈ╢ΕΉζΕ
  invalidate Ές╗ΊΧρ), (c) main Ήζα `compute_fitness` Ία╕Ή╢εΉζ┤ baseline_bench_means
  ΈΠΕ ΉιΕΈΜυ έΗΤ S6 cross-validation gate Ήζα baseline Ή╕κΉζΑ disk ΊΗ╡ΊΧσ ΉβΕΈμΝ
  (current `bench_means`/`ux_means`/`admire_means` collector wiring ΉζΑ
  S1b/S2b/S6b ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR έΑΦ Ά╖╕ PR Ά░Α main() ΉΩΡ current axis ΈπΝ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΊΧαΈσ┤
  S6 gate ΉοΚΉΜε Έ░εΊβΦ),
  (d) `baseline_decision` journal event ΉΩΡ `baseline_axis_coverage`
  (ux/admire/bench Ήζα entry Ά░ψΉΙα) surface έΑΦ partial baseline Ά░ΑΉΜεΉΕ▒.
  `plugins/seed_generation/baseline_reader.py`: `BaselineSnapshot` ΉΩΡ
  ux/admire/bench 3 field Ή╢ΦΆ░Α, `load_baseline` Ά░Α 3 axis ΈΠΕ `_coerce_dim_dict`
  ΊΗ╡ΊΧ┤ graceful ΈκεΈΦσ. **14 invariant test** έΑΦ loader 6 (5-tuple shape +
  missing file + pre-S3 BC + full S3 + per-axis corruption isolation +
  missing dim_means) + writer 3 (default omit + full 4-axis + empty-axis
  omit) + round-trip 1 + snapshot 3 (3 new fields + populated + pre-S3
  empty) + main wiring source-grep 1. ADR-012 S1/S2/S6 Ήζα in-memory 4Ή╢Χ
  fitness Ά░Α Ήζ┤Ήιε disk Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΊΗ╡ΊΧσ έΑΦ joint ratchet ΉβΕΉΕ▒.

- **PR-T6 έΑΦ Heuristic indicators JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator Ά░Α keyword/phrase library Έξ╝ evolve έΑΦ task-triage ΉΜε ΈπνΉ╣φΈΡαΈΛΦ
  complexity / high_risk / time_pressure ΊΣεΉπΑΉΨ┤. Promptbreeder-ΉΜζ
  ΉπΕΊβΦ: 3 group Ήζα phrase list Ά░Α JSON ΉΩΡΉΕε mutate έΗΤ agent Ήζα task
  classification ΉιΧΊβΧΈΠΕ έΗΤ ΉιΒΉιΙΊΧε strategy ΉΕιΊΔζ (careful/fast,
  confirm-first/proceed) έΗΤ ux_means.success_rate ΉαΒΊΨξ. **T3 (style
  guide enum)** Ά│╝ Έ╢ΕΈου: T3 ΈΛΦ fixed style ΉΕιΊΔζ, T6 ΈΛΦ concrete phrase
  library. **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/heuristics.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/heuristics.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_HEURISTICS_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_HEURISTICS_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/agent/heuristics_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_heuristics_override` + `apply_heuristics_policy`, schema
  `{complexity_indicators / high_risk_indicators / time_pressure_indicators:
  list[str]}`) / `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` Ά░Α
  T3 style-guide apply ΉπΒΊδΕ `static = apply_heuristics_policy(static,
  _load_heuristics_override())` Ία╕Ή╢ε έΗΤ static (cache-eligible) ΉαΒΉΩφΉΩΡ
  `<heuristic_indicators>` Έ╕ΦΈκζ append (ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΜε static Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε έΑΦ
  no behavior change) / `GEODE_HEURISTICS_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_HEURISTICS_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` Ά░Α unknown group +
  empty string + duplicate phrase ΉΖΜ ΈΜν graceful drop (forward-compat +
  order-preserving dedupe). XML escape Έκε `<`, `&`, `"` ΉΧΙΉιΕ Ή▓αΈου.
  **25 invariant test** έΑΦ reader graceful/strict 13 + apply 7 + wiring +
  path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Promptbreeder (Fernando et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop. **T6 Έρ╕ΉπΑ ΉΜε ADR-013 6 surface ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛν ΉλΖΆ▓░**
  (T1 #1416 + T2 #1418 + T3 #1419 + T4 #1420 + T5 #1421 + T6 #1422).

- **PR-T5 έΑΦ Cache breakpoint policy JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator Ά░Α Anthropic API Ήζα `apply_messages_cache_control(messages,
  n_breakpoints=N)` Ήζα N Ά░ΤΉζΕ JSON Ήε╝Έκε mutate (0..3, Anthropic cap Ήζα
  messages-block ΉιΡΉειΈ╢Ε). **trade-off**: έΗΣ έΗΤ cache hit rate έΗΣ but
  per-call overhead έΗΣ (Ά░Β breakpoint Ά░Α $0.10/MTok overhead); έΗΥ έΗΤ cache
  hit έΗΥ but per-call cost έΗΥ. ux_means.token_cost_norm + latency_norm
  ΈΣα ΈΜν ΉαΒΊΨξ. **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/cache-policy.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/cache-policy.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/llm/cache_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_cache_policy_override` + `apply_cache_policy_breakpoints`,
  schema `{messages_breakpoints: int 0..3}`) / `core/llm/providers/
  anthropic.py` Ήζα streaming Ά▓╜Έκε (ΊαΕΉηυ ΊβεΉΕ▒ single consumer) ΉΩΡΉΕε
  `n_breakpoints = apply_cache_policy_breakpoints(MAX_MESSAGE_CACHE_BREAKPOINTS,
  _load_cache_policy_override())` Ία╕Ή╢ε έΗΤ `apply_messages_cache_control(
  messages, n_breakpoints=n_breakpoints)` Έκε wire (ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΜε default
  3 έΑΦ no behavior change) / `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_STRICT=1` env pair. `_validate_schema` Ά░Α Python
  `bool` ΉζΕ ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒΉε╝Έκε int ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΉβ╕ (Python Ήζα bool-is-int subclass
  ΊΧρΉιΧ Έ░σΉΨ┤). out-of-range Ά░Τ (4, -1, ...) ΉζΑ `_coerce` ΉΩΡΉΕε per-axis
  graceful drop. **20 invariant test** έΑΦ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 5 + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Anthropic
  prompt caching docs έΑΦ `cache_control` count Ά░Α canonical knob.

- **PR-T4 έΑΦ Provider routing JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ά░Α per-model preferred plan-chain ΉζΕ JSON Ήε╝Έκε mutate. `resolve_routing(
  model)` Ήζα explicit-chain branch Ά░Α registry's `set_routing` Ά▓░Ά│╝ ΈΝΑΉΜι
  policy override Ήζα chain ΉζΕ iterate έΗΤ ux_means.token_cost_norm ΉπΒΉιΣ
  ΉαΒΊΨξ (Ά░βΉζΑ model ΉζΕ PAYG ΈΝΑΉΜι SUBSCRIPTION Ήε╝Έκε route ΊΧαΈσ┤ per-call
  cost Ά░ΡΉΗΝ). **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/provider-routing.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/provider-routing.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/llm/routing/provider_routing_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_provider_routing_override` +
  `apply_provider_routing_policy`, schema `{model_name: [plan_id_chain]}`) /
  `core/llm/routing/plan_registry.py:resolve_routing` explicit-chain branch
  Ά░Α `apply_provider_routing_policy(model, registry.get_routing(model),
  _load_provider_routing_override())` Ά▓░Ά│╝ iterate (ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΜε default
  chain έΑΦ no behavior change) / `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` Ά░Α empty chain +
  empty string entry ΉιεΆ▒░. ΈΥ▒ΈκζΈΡαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΑ plan_id ΈΛΦ `resolve_routing` Ήζ┤
  ΉηΡΈΠβΉε╝Έκε Ά▒┤ΈΕΙΈεΑ (registry.get Ά▓░Ά│╝ None Ήζ╝ ΈΧΝ skip). **21 invariant
  test** έΑΦ reader graceful/strict 10 + apply 6 Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν (none / empty /
  model-not-in-policy / override / empty-chain-fallthrough / return-copy)
  + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenRouterΉζα explicit
  per-model plan ordering + Anthropic/OpenAI multi-tier credential
  (subscription/PAYG/batch) Ήζα cost lever.

- **PR-T3 έΑΦ Response style guide JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ά░Α 4 typed enum field (`tone` έΙΙ concise/balanced/verbose, `verbosity_level`
  έΙΙ low/medium/high, `response_format` έΙΙ markdown/plain/structured,
  `code_style` έΙΙ show-first/explain-first) ΉζΕ JSON Ήε╝Έκε mutate. wrapper-
  sections.json (G5a/G5b) Ήζα free-form ΊΖΞΉΛνΊΛ╕ mutation Ά│╝ Έ╢ΕΈου έΑΦ T3 ΈΛΦ
  **constrained typed ΉΕιΊΔζΉπΑ** Έζ╝ ΉηΣΉζΑ expressive style space Έξ╝ ΊγρΉερΉιΒΉε╝Έκε
  ΊΔΡΉΔΚ Ά░ΑΈΛξ. fitness 4Ή╢ΧΉζα `ux_means` (success_rate + revert_ratio) ΉπΒΉιΣ
  ΉαΒΊΨξ. **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/style-guide.json` (in-repo, ratchet-tracked) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/style-guide.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/agent/style_guide_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_style_guide_override` + `apply_style_guide_policy`, schema
  `{tone, verbosity_level, response_format, code_style}` enum-typed) /
  `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` Ά░Α `static =
  apply_style_guide_policy(static, _load_style_guide_override())` Έκε
  static ΉαΒΉΩφ (cache-eligible) ΉΩΡ `<response_style>` Έ╕ΦΈκζ append (ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ
  Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΜε static Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε έΑΦ no behavior change) / `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_OVERRIDE`
  + `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_STRICT=1` env pair (`autoresearch/train.py` audit
  subprocess). `_coerce` Ά░Α unknown field + unknown enum value ΈΣα ΈΜν
  graceful drop έΑΦ forward-compat + per-axis isolation (ΊΧε axis Ά░Α Ά╣ρΉι╕ΈΠΕ
  ΈΜνΈξ╕ axes ΈΛΦ ΉειΊγρ). **22 invariant test** έΑΦ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 7 Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν (none / empty / single / all / unknown-enum / empty-base /
  field order) + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenAI /
  Anthropic system prompt guides converge on enum-based response constraints.

- **PR-T2 έΑΦ Skill catalog JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  Ά░Α skill `description` (LLM Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΝΖ ΊΓν) + `user_invocable` (Ά░ΑΉΜεΉΕ▒) ΉζΕ
  per-skill ΈΜρΉεΕΈκε JSON Ήε╝Έκε mutate έΗΤ agent Ήζα skill ΉΕιΊΔζ ΉιΧΊβΧΈΠΕ έΗΣ
  (Voyager ΉΜζ curriculum ΉπΕΊβΦ ΊΝρΊΕ┤). **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ):
  SoT `autoresearch/state/policies/skill-catalog.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) + `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/skill-catalog.json`
  (operator-local) / `GLOBAL_SKILL_CATALOG_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_SKILL_
  CATALOG_PATH` `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α / `core/skills/skill_catalog_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_skill_catalog_override` + `apply_skill_catalog_policy`,
  schema `{skill_name: {description: str, user_invocable: bool}}`) /
  `core/agent/loop/_context.py` Ήζα `_build_system_prompt` Ά░Α Ά╕░Ήκ┤
  `registry.get_context_block()` Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉηΡΈουΉΩΡ `apply_skill_catalog_policy(
  registry, _load_skill_catalog_override())` Ία╕Ή╢ε (ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╢ΑΉηυ ΉΜε base
  registry Ήζα `get_context_block` Ήε╝Έκε ΉεΕΉηΕ έΑΦ no behavior change) /
  `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_OVERRIDE` + `GEODE_SKILL_CATALOG_STRICT=1` env
  pair (`autoresearch/train.py` Ήζα audit subprocess Ά░Α SoT Ήκ┤Ήηυ ΉΜε ΈΣα
  ΈΜν inject έΑΦ strict-fail Ήα╡ΊΛ╕Ήζ╕). `apply_skill_catalog_policy` ΈΛΦ
  registry Ήζα base XML ΈιΝΈΞΦΈπΒ ΈκεΉπΒΉζΕ ΉηυΉΓυΉγσΊΧαΈσ┤ΉΕε per-skill override
  Έξ╝ Ήγ░ΉΕι ΉιΒΉγσ έΑΦ base registry Ά░Α authoritative (unknown skill name ΉζΑ
  Έυ┤ΉΜε). Forward-compat: entry ΈΓ┤ unknown field ΉηΡΈΠβ drop. **23
  invariant test** έΑΦ reader graceful/strict + apply 9 Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν (none /
  empty / desc / visibility true/false / unknown skill / empty registry /
  max_chars ΉιΙΈΜρ / XML escape) + context.py wiring source-grep + path
  ΉΔΒΉΙα 2 + env wiring + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Voyager (Wang et al.,
  2023) curriculum loop έΑΦ agent Ά░Α ΉηΡΉ▓┤ skill library + description ΉζΕ
  loop Ήε╝Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι. AlphaEvolve-ΉΜζ Ή╜ΦΈΥε mutation Έ░░Ήιε (skill body=SKILL.md
  ΈΛΦ Tier 2, Έ│╕ surface Έψ╕ΉιΣΆ╖╝).

- **PR-BACKFILL-SOT έΑΦ Operator-local SoT layer + env-as-SoT for 4 mutation
  surface readers (post-PR-T1 #1416 fix).** PR #1416 Ήζα Codex MCP FAIL #5
  (CHANGELOG/PR-body parity ΉεΕΈ░α έΑΦ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/...`
  operator-local fallback ΉζΕ Ήμ╝ΉηξΊΨΙΉε╝ΈΓα reader Ή╜ΦΈΥε Έ╢ΑΉηυ) Ήζα Ά╖╝ΉδΡ GAP ΉζΕ
  ΈσΦΉδΑ. 4 reader (tool_policy / reflection / decomposition / tool_descriptions)
  Ά░Α **3-layer SoT chain** Ήε╝Έκε ΉιΕΊβα έΑΦ Ήγ┤ΉαΒΉηΡ Ά░Α env ΈπΝ set ΊΧ┤ΈΠΕ SoT Ή▓αΈθ╝
  graceful Έκε ΈΜνΈμ░ ΉΙα ΉηΙΆ│ι, audit subprocess ΈΛΦ ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ STRICT flag opt-in.
  **ΉΜιΆ╖ε helper** `core/self_improving_loop/sot_resolution.py` έΑΦ
  `resolve_sot(env_var, operator_local, in_repo) έΗΤ SoTSelection(path,
  strict) | None` ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΊΧρΉΙα, 4 reader Ά░Α Ά│╡Ήει. `<X>_STRICT` env name ΉζΑ
  `<X>_OVERRIDE` ΉΩΡΉΕε `removesuffix("_OVERRIDE") + "_STRICT"` Έκε ΉηΡΈΠβ
  ΊΝΝΉΔζ έΑΦ per-reader ΈΥ▒Έκζ Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ. **resolution order**: (1) env var
  `GEODE_<X>_OVERRIDE` έΑΦ `GEODE_<X>_STRICT=1` ΈΠβΈ░α ΉΜε strict-fail, Ά╖╕ΈιΘΉπΑ
  ΉΧΛΉε╝Έσ┤ graceful (no fall-through, env Ά░Α authoritative). (2)
  operator-local `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/<file>.json` (graceful).
  (3) in-repo `autoresearch/state/policies/<file>.json` (graceful,
  ratchet-tracked). (4) `None` έΗΤ no-op. **`core/paths.py`** ΉΩΡ 4
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_*_PATH` ΉΔΒΉΙα Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (`GLOBAL_SELF_IMPROVING_LOOP_DIR /
  <file>.json`). **`autoresearch/train.py`** Ήζα audit subprocess Ά░Α 4
  env ΈςρΈΣΡ `_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` ΈΠβΈ░α set έΑΦ Ά╕░Ήκ┤ fail-fast Έ│┤Ήκ┤.
  4 reader Ήζα docstring ΉΩΡΉΕε stale `operator-local` Ήμ╝Ήηξ (S0a/b/c Ήζα
  Codex MCP catch ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ inheritance) ΈΠΕ ΊΧρΆ╗α ΉιΧΊΧσΊβΦ έΑΦ ΉΜνΉιε 3-layer
  chain Ήε╝Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι. **19 ΉΜιΆ╖ε invariant test** (shared resolver 9 +
  reader Έ│Ε env-graceful/operator-local 10) + **8 Ά╕░Ήκ┤ strict test
  Ά░▒ΉΜι** (`_STRICT=1` ΈςΖΉΜε). Read-write parity Έ│┤Ήκ┤ έΑΦ `apply_*_policy`
  Ήζα deep-copy ΊΝρΊΕ┤ (S0b) ΉΩυΉιΕΊηΙ ΉειΊγρ.

### Changed

- **PR-S6-UPDATE έΑΦ `bench_means` schema 2026 frontier Ά░▒ΉΜι (4 outdated έΗΤ 7).**
  2026-05-21 frontier bench audit Ά▓░Ά│╝ 4 Ή▒ΕΊΔζ bench ΈςρΈΣΡ outdated ΊΝΡΉιΧ:
  (a) **SWE-bench** έΑΦ OpenAI 2026-02-23 Ά│╡ΉΜζ **retire** (saturated +
  contaminated). (b) **HumanEval** έΑΦ Top-4 93-95% **saturated**
  (qualification bar ΈπΝ ΉζαΈψ╕). (c) **TAU-bench** έΑΦ Claude Opus 4.6
  telecom 0.993 saturated, Sierra ╧Ε┬▓-bench Ά░Α dual-control ΊδΕΉΗΞ.
  (d) **GAIA** έΑΦ DeepAgent 91.69% saturated, HLE (Nature 2026-01) +
  OSWorld Έκε Έ╢ΕΈου Ά╢ΝΆ│ι.
  **Ά░▒ΉΜι schema (7 field)** έΑΦ Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 + OpenAI GPT-5
  system card Ά│╡ΊΗ╡ Ή▒ΕΊΔζ: `swe_bench_pro_pass` (0.25, Scale AI contam-free
  real PR), `livecodebench_pass1` (0.15, contam-free algo),
  `tau2_bench_success` (0.20, Sierra dual-control), `gpqa_diamond`
  (0.15, NYU PhD), `hle_accuracy` (0.10, Humanity's Last Exam Nature
  2026-01), `osworld_success` (0.10, computer-use agent),
  `mle_bench_medal` (0.05, OpenAI ML engineering έΑΦ self-improving loop
  ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ ΉιΧΊΧσ).
  **ΉΨΣΉζα ΉΧΧΈιξ coverage 30.4% έΗΤ 46.7%** (14/30 axis έΑΦ 4 bench έΗΤ 7 bench
  Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤). compute_fitness Ήζα 4Ή╢Χ Ά░ΑΉνΣΉ╣α (dim 0.30 / ux 0.25 / admire 0.20 /
  bench 0.25) Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΉειΉπΑ έΑΦ schema Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ΈπΝΉε╝Έκε frontier alignment ΊγΝΈ│╡.
  29 invariant test (Ά╕░Ήκ┤ 28 έΗΤ 29) έΑΦ `exact_4_fields` έΗΤ `exact_7_fields_2026_frontier`,
  missing-fields expected ΉΙαΉΜζ generic ΊβΦ (4 έΗΤ 7 field ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉιΒΉγσ).
  ΉΜνΉιε inspect_ai federation Ήζα multi-eval wiring ΉζΑ S6b Έ│ΕΈΠΕ PR.

### Added

- **PR-T1 έΑΦ Tool descriptions JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** ADR-013 Ήζα
  Ή▓τ ΉΜιΆ╖ε ΊΣεΈσ┤ έΑΦ mutator Ά░Α ΈΠΕΆ╡υ description + hint ΈπΝ JSON Ήε╝Έκε mutate έΗΤ
  ΈΠΕΆ╡υ ΊδΕΈ│┤ ΉΕιΊΔζ ΉιΧΊβΧΈΠΕ έΗΣ έΗΤ Petri 17-dim Ήζα `broken_tool_use` (ΉειΉζ╝ΊΧε ΉΨΣΉζα
  ΉΧΧΈιξ dim) ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉαΒΊΨξ. **5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤** (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/tool-descriptions.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) / `GLOBAL_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_PATH` `core/paths.py` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α /
  `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` reader (`_load_tool_descriptions_override`
  + `apply_tool_descriptions_policy`, schema `{tool_name: {description: str,
  hints: [str]}}`) / `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` ΉπΕΉηΖΉιΡ
  (base+registry+MCP merge ΉπΒΊδΕ, `apply_tool_policy` Ήζα forbidden/priority
  filter **ΉπΒΉιΕ** έΑΦ description override Ά░Α Έρ╝ΉιΑ ΉιΒΉγσΈΠ╝ΉΧ╝ policy Ά░Α Ά░▒ΉΜιΈΡε
  description Ά╕░Έ░αΉε╝Έκε ΊΝΡΈΜρ) / `GEODE_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_OVERRIDE` env var
  (`autoresearch/train.py` Ήζα audit subprocess Ά░Α SoT Ήκ┤Ήηυ ΉΜε inject έΑΦ
  strict-fail). `apply_tool_descriptions_policy` ΈΛΦ `copy.deepcopy` ΊδΕ
  mutate (caller Ήζα module-level `_BASE_TOOLS` ΉανΉΩ╝ Έ░σΉπΑ, S0b ΊΝρΊΕ┤).
  hints Ά░Α ΉηΙΉε╝Έσ┤ description ΈΒζΉΩΡ `Hints:\n- έΑο\n- έΑο` ΉνΕΈ░ΦΆ┐Ι append.
  Forward-compat: entry ΈΓ┤ unknown field Έυ┤ΉΜε. 19 invariant test έΑΦ
  reader graceful/strict + apply none/empty/override/hints/deepcopy +
  helpers wiring (descriptions before tool_policy ΉΙεΉΕε Ά▓ΑΉοζ) + path
  constant + train.py env wiring + ALIVE marker (`tool-descriptions.json`
  Ήζ┤ `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` ΉΩΡΉΕε grep ΉΨΣΉΕ▒). Frontier:
  OpenAI function calling docs + Anthropic tool-use guide ("clearer
  descriptions yield more accurate selection").

- **ADR-013 έΑΦ Mutation Surface Expansion via JSON Schema Pattern (Proposed).**
  ADR-012 Ήζα S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζΈΡε ΊΝρΊΕ┤ (JSON SoT + reader + dispatcher) ΉζΕ 6 ΉΜιΆ╖ε
  ΊΣεΈσ┤ (T1-T6) Ήε╝Έκε ΊβΧΉηξ. **AlphaEvolve ΉΜζ Ή╜ΦΈΥε ΉηΡΉ▓┤ mutation ΉζΑ ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ
  Έ░░Ήιε** (ΉηΡΆ╕░ΉΙαΉιΧ ΉηυΆ╖Α / silent breakage / Goodhart on benchmark /
  dependency chain 4 risk). ΈςρΈΥι 6 ΊΣεΈσ┤Ήζ┤ JSON mutation only έΑΦ Ή╜ΦΈΥε
  Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ 0. **6 ΊΣεΈσ┤**: (T1) Tool descriptions (`tool-descriptions.json`,
  OpenAI/Anthropic Ά▓ΑΉοζ) έΗΤ broken_tool_use dim ΉπΒΉιΣ. (T2) Skill registry
  catalog (`skill-catalog.json`, Voyager ΉΜζ) έΗΤ routing ΉπΕΊβΦ. (T3) Response
  style guide (`style-guide.json`) έΗΤ ux_means Ήζα success_rate + revert_ratio.
  (T4) Provider routing (`provider-routing.json`, OpenRouter) έΗΤ ux_means
  Ήζα token_cost_norm. (T5) Cache breakpoint policy (`cache-policy.json`,
  Anthropic prompt caching) έΗΤ M3 ΉβΑ Ά▓░ΊΧσ. (T6) Heuristic indicators
  (`heuristics.json`, Promptbreeder ΉΜζ) έΗΤ gaia_accuracy ΉαΒΊΨξ. **5-element
  ΊΝρΊΕ┤**: SoT ΊΝΝΉζ╝ / Path constant / Reader ΈςρΈΥΙ / Inference ΉπΕΉηΖΉιΡ /
  Env var override (S0a Ά▓ΑΉοζ). **4-step lifecycle**: operator/mutator
  JSON write έΗΤ reader graceful load έΗΤ apply_*_policy default+override
  Ά▓░ΊΧσ έΗΤ ΉΩΡΉζ┤ΉιΕΊΛ╕ ΉζΣΈΜ╡ ΉΜε ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ░αΉαΒ. 16 invariant test έΑΦ ADR Έ│╕Έυ╕Ήζα
  Status/Context/Decision/Consequences/Reference + 6 T-surface ΈςΖΉΕ╕
  + 5-element ΊΝρΊΕ┤ + AlphaEvolve Έ░░Ήιε 4 risk + frontier reference 6
  + ADR-012 cross-reference + Ήγ░ΉΕιΉΙεΉεΕ 6 + ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛν + fitness Ή╢Χ
  ΉαΒΊΨξ cross-check. ΊδΕΉΗΞ PR T1-T6 task ΈΥ▒Έκζ (#78-#83).

- **PR-S6 έΑΦ `bench_means` + Petri/bench cross-validation gate (Path C
  inspect_ai federation).** ADR-012 ┬πS6 έΑΦ frontier capability evaluation
  ΊΗ╡ΊΧσΉε╝Έκε fitness 4Ή╢Χ ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ. Petri (alignment) + bench (capability)
  Ήζα **ΉΨΣΈ░σΊΨξ cross-validation gate** Έκε Goodhart fooling Έ░σΉΨ┤.
  **`autoresearch/bench_means.py` ΉΜιΉΕν** έΑΦ 4-field schema (swe_bench_pass
  0.40 + tau_bench_success 0.30 + humaneval_pass1 0.15 + gaia_accuracy
  0.15, ΊΧσ 1.0) + `compute_bench_aggregate` (None έΗΤ 0.5 neutral) +
  `validate_bench_schema` + `detect_cross_validation_conflict` (Petri
  promote + bench regress = "alignment_only_fooling", bench promote +
  Petri critical regress = "capability_at_alignment_cost") +
  `collect_bench_means_from_inspect_ai` (S6b placeholder).
  **`autoresearch/train.py` 4Ή╢Χ ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ** έΑΦ FITNESS_DIM_4AX (0.30) +
  FITNESS_UX_4AX (0.25) + FITNESS_ADMIRE_4AX (0.20) + FITNESS_BENCH_4AX
  (0.25, ΊΧσ 1.0). dim Έ╣ΕΉνΣΉζ┤ 0.40 έΗΤ 0.30 Ήε╝Έκε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α Ά░ΡΉΗΝ. `compute_fitness`
  ΉΩΡ `bench_means` + `baseline_bench_means` Ήζ╕ΉηΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ ΈκεΉπΒ έΑΦ
  ΉΖΜ ΈΜν None / ux only / admire ΊβεΉΕ▒ (3Ή╢Χ) / bench ΊβεΉΕ▒ (4Ή╢Χ +
  cross-validation gate). Conflict Ά▓ΑΉ╢ε ΉΜε 0.0 strict-reject. **ΉΨΣΉζα
  ΉΧΧΈιξ coverage 7/23 = 30.4% έΗΤ 11/27 = 40.7% ΊβΧΉηξ** (Petri Ήζα 1/17 ΊΧεΆ│Ε
  ΈΠΝΊΝΝ, frontier ΊΧσΉζα ΈΛξΆ░Α). 28 invariant
  test (S6) + 30 (S2) + 27 (S1) = **85/85 ΊΗ╡Ά│╝**. inspect_ai federation
  Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε multi-eval wiring (Petri scenario + SWE/TAU task ΈΠβΉΜε ΉΜνΊΨΚ)
  ΉζΑ S6b (Έ│ΕΈΠΕ PR).

- **PR-S2 έΑΦ `admire_means` fitness Ή╢Χ + 3Ή╢Χ ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ (ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░).**
  S1 Ήζα `ux_means` ΉαΗΉΩΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΈΡαΈΛΦ **Ή▓┤Ά░Ρ ΊΤΙΉπΙ** ΉΨΣΉζα ΉΧΧΈιξ Ή╢ΧΉζα
  **schema + math + hook interface** ΉΜιΉΕν. ΉΜνΉιε `plugins/seed_generation/agents/ranker.py`
  Ήζα ELO + 3-voter panel Ία╕Ή╢ε wiring ΉζΑ S2b (Έ│ΕΈΠΕ PR) έΑΦ Έ│╕ PR ΉΩΡΉΕεΈΛΦ
  hook (`collect_admire_means_from_ranker`) Ά░Α placeholder (None Έ░αΊβα)
  Έκε ranker Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉηΡΈουΈξ╝ ΈςΖΉΜεΈπΝ ΊΧρ. **`autoresearch/admire_means.py` ΉΜιΉΕν** έΑΦ
  2-field schema (`pairwise_win_rate` 0.70 + `human_calibration_corr`
  0.30, ΊΧσ 1.0) + `compute_admire_aggregate` (None έΗΤ 0.5 neutral,
  calibration dampening Ήε╝Έκε Goodhart fooling Έ░σΉΨ┤) +
  `CALIBRATION_THRESHOLD = 0.7` (corr Έψ╕ΈπΝ ΉΜε win_rate Έ╣ΕΈκΑ Ά░ΡΉΘι) +
  `validate_admire_schema` + `collect_admire_means_from_ranker` (S2b
  placeholder, ΊαΕΉηυ None Έ░αΊβα). **`autoresearch/train.py` 3Ή╢Χ ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ** έΑΦ
  `FITNESS_DIM_WEIGHT = 0.40` + `FITNESS_UX_WEIGHT = 0.30` +
  `FITNESS_ADMIRE_WEIGHT = 0.30` ΉΜιΉΕν (ΊΧσ 1.0). `compute_fitness` ΉΩΡ
  `admire_means` optional Ήζ╕ΉηΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ ΈκεΉπΒ: (a) ux + admire ΈΣα ΈΜν
  None έΗΤ dim-only fallback (ΊαΕΉηυ behavior Έ│┤Ήκ┤) (b) ux ΈπΝ έΗΤ S1 Ήζα
  0.7/0.3 (backwards compat) (c) admire ΈπΝ ΈαΡΈΛΦ ΈΣα ΈΜν έΗΤ 3Ή╢Χ ΉηυΈ░░Έ╢Ε
  0.4/0.3/0.3 (ux ΈΙΕΈζ╜ ΉΜε neutral 0.5). critical gate strict-reject ΈΛΦ
  admire ΉβΑ Έυ┤Ά┤Α Έ│┤Ήκ┤. **Goodhart Έ░σΉΨ┤**: judge model Ήμ╝Ά╕░ Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤ + 3-voter
  cross-provider panel (PR-COSCI-1 Ήζα `required_diversity_providers`
  Ά╖εΉΧ╜ ΉηυΉΓυΉγσ) + calibration dampening (corr < threshold ΉΜε win_rate
  Έ╣ΕΈκΑ Ά░ΡΉΘι) + Έ╢ΕΆ╕░ human L4 batch refresh (S2b). **28 invariant test
  (S2)** + 27 invariant test (S1 backwards compat) = **55/55 ΊΗ╡Ά│╝**.
  ranker.py Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε ELO + voter panel Ία╕Ή╢ε wiring ΉζΑ S2b Έ╢ΕΈου έΑΦ
  schema ΉΧΙΉιΧΉΕ▒ Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΊδΕ ΉπΕΊΨΚ.

- **PR-S1 έΑΦ `ux_means` fitness Ή╢Χ ΉΜιΉΕν (ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░).** ADR-012
  ┬πDecision.2 Ήζα fitness ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ Ή▓τ ΈΜρΆ│Ε έΑΦ Petri 17-dim Ήζα ΉζΝΉζα ΉΧΧΈιξ
  (ΉΧΙ ΈπζΆ░ΑΉπΑΆ╕░) ΊΟ╕ΊΨξ risk Έξ╝ Ή░ρΈΜρΊΧαΆ╕░ ΉεΕΊΧε **ΉΨΣΉζα ΉΧΧΈιξ Ή╢Χ**.
  **`autoresearch/ux_means.py` ΉΜιΉΕν** έΑΦ 4-field schema (`success_rate`
  / `token_cost_norm` / `revert_ratio_norm` / `latency_norm`) + Ά░ΑΉνΣΉ╣α
  (0.40 / 0.30 / 0.20 / 0.10, ΊΧσ 1.0) + `normalize_ux_field`
  (lower-is-better metric Ήζα invert Ή▓αΈου) + `compute_ux_aggregate`
  (`None` έΗΤ 0.5 neutral) + `validate_ux_schema` + `collect_ux_means_from_sources`
  (S1b placeholder, ΊαΕΉηυ `None` Έ░αΊβα). **`autoresearch/train.py:compute_fitness`
  ΈΜνΉ╢ΧΊβΦ** έΑΦ `ux_means` optional Ήζ╕ΉηΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. `None` Ήζ┤Έσ┤ dim-only
  fallback (no-op, ΊαΕΉηυ ΊΨΚΈΠβ Έ│┤Ήκ┤). Ήμ╝ΉΨ┤ΉπΑΈσ┤ `dim_part * 0.7 + ux_part
  * 0.3` Ά░ΑΉνΣ ΊΧσ (admire_means ΉΜιΉΕν S2 ΊδΕ 0.4/0.3/0.3 ΉηυΈ░░Έ╢Ε ΉαΙΉιΧ).
  Critical gate (regress ΉΜε `0.0`) ΈΛΦ ux_means ΉβΑ Έυ┤Ά┤ΑΊΧαΆ▓Ν Έ│┤Ήκ┤ έΑΦ
  strict-reject ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ. **27 invariant test** έΑΦ schema Ά░ΑΉνΣΉ╣α ΊΧσ / 4-field
  exact set / normalize invert Ήζα lower-is-better / aggregate
  weighted-sum / validate 5 reject Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν / compute_fitness multi-axis
  4 Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν (ux=None dim-only / perfect ux ΉοζΆ░Α / zero ux Ά░ΡΉΗΝ / critical
  gate strict-reject). 4 source Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε wiring (RunLog / LLMUsageAccumulator
  / git history / OTel trace) ΉζΑ S1b (Έ│ΕΈΠΕ PR) έΑΦ schema ΉΧΙΉιΧΉΕ▒ Ά▓ΑΉοζ ΊδΕ
  Έ╢ΕΈου ΉπΕΊΨΚ. ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░ ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛνΉζα G2 Ά▓ΝΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ (ΉζΝΉζα ΉΧΧΈιξ 90%+ ΊΟ╕ΊΨξ
  4Ήμ╝ Ή╕κΉιΧ) Ά░Α Έ╣ΕΈκεΉΗΝ Ή╕κΉιΧ Ά░ΑΈΛξΊΧ┤ΉπΡ.

### Changed

- **PR-S0d έΑΦ `retrieval` slot deprecate (ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░ ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛν ΉλΖΈμΝ).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT Ήζα 4 dead slot ΉνΣ ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ Ή▓αΉ╣α έΑΦ `TARGET_KINDS` ΉΩΡΉΕε
  `retrieval` ΉιεΆ▒░ έΗΤ **5Ή╢Χ έΗΤ 4Ή╢Χ ΈςΖΉΜε Ή╢ΧΉΗΝ**. `GLOBAL_RETRIEVAL_POLICY_PATH`
  + `_KIND_TO_PATH` Ήζα `retrieval` ΈπνΊΧΣΉζΑ Έ│┤Ήκ┤ (Έ│ΕΈΠΕ ADR Έκε Έψ╕Έηα RAG
  Ήζ╕ΊΦΕΈζ╝ ΉΜιΉΕν ΉΜε Έ│╡ΉδΡ Ά░ΑΈΛξ).
  **Ά▓░ΉιΧ Ά╖╝Ά▒░** έΑΦ frontier 3-source ΊΧσΉζα Wiki injection (ADR-012
  ┬πDecision.3a):
  (1) **Boris Cherny** (Claude Code architect) *Latent Space 2025-05*:
  "Originally we tried RAG... **agentic search outperformed everything.
  By a lot. By a lot**. At the cost of latency and tokens, you now have
  really awesome search **without security downsides**"
  (https://www.latent.space/p/claude-code).
  (2) **arXiv 2605.15184** (PwC, 2026-05): 116-Q LongMemEval ├Ω Claude
  Code/Codex/Gemini CLI/Chronos 4-harness Ά╡ΡΉ░ρ έΑΦ "**grep generally
  yields higher accuracy than vector retrieval**".
  (3) **Anthropic Ά│╡ΉΜζ blog**: "navigates the way a software engineer
  would: traverses file system, reads files, uses grep" + staleness
  ΉαΙΉΜε ("RAG returns a function the team renamed two weeks ago").
  **Frontier embedding ΊηΙΊΛ╕Έπ╡** (ADR ┬πDecision.3a) έΑΦ code/agent ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕
  3/3 (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Devin) Ήζ┤ embedding ΊγΝΊΦ╝, memory
  ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ (Hermes-Agent / OpenClaw) ΈπΝ ΉιΒΆ╖╣ ΉΓυΉγσ. GEODE Ήζα self-improving
  loop ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ ΉπΕΊβΦΈΛΦ code/agent ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ έΗΤ Claude Code Έζ╝Ήζ╕.
  **Cursor ΉΧ╜ΊβΦ 4-Ή╢Χ ΉδΡΉζ╕**: long context ΊβΧΉηξ / prompt caching 92%
  prefix reuse + 81% Έ╣ΕΉγσ ΉιΙΆ░Ρ / agentic search Ήζα Ά▓╜ΊΩαΉιΒ Ήγ░ΉΕ╕ / Bitter
  Lesson tool use ΉΕ▒ΉΙβΈΠΕ.
  Boris Ήζα 6 Ά╖╝Ά▒░ ΉνΣ 4Ά░ε (Performance / Index staleness / Precision /
  Bitter Lesson) Ά░Α GEODE Ήζα retrieval slot ΉΩΡ ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉιΒΉγσ.
  **invariant test Ά░▒ΉΜι**: ADR ALIVE/DEAD/DEPRECATED count
  (`==4/==0/>=1`), `TARGET_KINDS` exact set Ά▓ΑΉοζ
  (`{prompt, tool_policy, decomposition, reflection}`), path constant
  Έ│┤Ήκ┤ Ά▓ΑΉοζ, DEAD parametrize placeholder ΊβΦ. audit doc Post-S0d update
  ΉΕ╣ΉΖα + `4/4 ALIVE` anchor.
  **ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░ S0 ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛν ΉλΖΈμΝ** έΑΦ 5Ή╢Χ ΉπΕΊβΦ Έσ┤ΉιΒ 1Ή╢Χ έΗΤ 4Ή╢Χ ΈςΖΉΜε ΉΧΙΉιΧΊβΦ.
  ΈΜνΉζΝ PR: S1 (`ux_means` fitness Ή╢Χ ΉΜιΉΕν).

### Added

- **PR-S0c έΑΦ `decomposition` reader ΉΜιΉΕν (ADR-012 dead slot ΉΓ┤ΈουΆ╕░ #3).**
  PR-S0a/S0b Ήζα ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Ή░ρΉγσ. **schema** (3 field ΈςρΈΣΡ optional,
  string): `system_prompt` (ΉιΕΉ▓┤ override έΑΦ prefix/suffix Έυ┤ΉΜε) /
  `prefix` (default ΉΧηΉΩΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α) / `suffix` (default ΈΤνΉΩΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α). 3-mode
  ΉιΧΉ▒ΖΉε╝Έκε `load_prompt` Ά▓░Ά│╝Έξ╝ Έ│ΑΊαΧ. **Resolution order**: έΣι
  `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` (audit, strict) έΣκ
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/decomposition.json` (daily, graceful)
  έΣλ `None`. ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΉιΒΉγσ ΉπΑΉιΡ: `core/orchestration/goal_decomposer.py:_llm_decompose`
  Ήζα `load_prompt("decomposer", "system")` Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉπΒΊδΕ έΑΦ
  `apply_decomposition_policy` Έκε system prompt ΉιΧΆ╖εΊβΦ ΊδΕ `call_llm_parsed`
  ΉΩΡ ΉιΕΈΜυ. **ΊγΝΆ╖Α marker**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT
  `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader` parametrize ΉΩΡΉΕε
  `decomposition.json` ΉιεΆ▒░ + ΉΔΙ `test_decomposition_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0c`.
  audit doc Post-S0c update ΉΕ╣ΉΖα + 4/5 ALIVE anchor. ADR-012 Tier 1
  ΊΣε + invariant test ALIVE/DEAD count (`==3/==2` έΗΤ `==4/==1`) ΈΠβΆ╕░ΊβΦ.
  `autoresearch/train.py` env wiring ΉΩΡ `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE`
  Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. ROI: `task_success_rate` (S1 Ήζα `ux_means` ΊΧε Ή╢Χ) ΉαΒΊΨξ έΑΦ ΉηΣΉΩΖ
  Έ╢ΕΊΧ┤ ΊΤΙΉπΙΉζ┤ task ΉβΕΉΙαΉερΈκε ΉπΒΆ▓░. 18 new invariant + Ά╕░Ήκ┤ test ΊΧρΆ╗α
  ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ (Ή┤ζ 91 test Ά╖╕Έο░). **ADR-012 ΈΜρΆ╕░ ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛνΉζα S0a/S0b/S0c ΉβΕΈμΝ**
  έΗΤ 5Ή╢Χ ΉπΕΊβΦ Έσ┤ΉιΒ 1Ή╢Χ έΗΤ 4Ή╢Χ ΊγΝΈ│╡. ΈΓρΉζΑ dead slot ΉζΑ `retrieval` (S0d
  Ή▓αΉ╣α Ά▓░ΉιΧ ΉαΙΉιΧ έΑΦ deprecate or RAG ΉΜιΉΕν).

- **PR-S0b έΑΦ `reflection` reader ΉΜιΉΕν (ADR-012 dead slot ΉΓ┤ΈουΆ╕░ #2).**
  PR-S0a (#1407) Ήζα ΊΝρΊΕ┤ΉζΕ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Ή░ρΉγσΊΧ┤ ΈΣΡ Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ dead slot
  (`reflection`) ΉζΕ ΉΓ┤Έο╝. **schema** (ΈΣΡ field ΈςρΈΣΡ optional, string):
  `description` (`_REFLECTION_TOOL["description"]` override) /
  `system_prompt` (`_SYSTEM_PROMPT` override). `input_schema` ΉβΑ `name`
  ΉζΑ mutate ΈΝΑΉΔΒ ΉΧΕΈΜα έΑΦ `record_reflection` Ήζα typed payload contract
  (`hypotheses` / `confidence` / `next_action_hint`) Έ│┤Ήκ┤. **Resolution
  order**: έΣι `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit
  subprocess, strict έΑΦ schema ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε RuntimeError) έΣκ
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/reflection.json` (daily-run, graceful)
  έΣλ `None`. ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΉιΒΉγσ ΉπΑΉιΡ: `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` Ήζα
  reflection LLM `agentic_call` ΉπΒΉιΕ έΑΦ `apply_reflection_policy` Ά░Α
  `(tool, system_prompt)` ΊΛεΊΦΝ ΉιΧΆ╖εΊβΦ ΊδΕ `tools=[active_tool]` +
  `system=active_system` Ήε╝Έκε ΉιΕΈΜυ. Tool dict ΉζΑ deep-copy ΊδΕ mutate ΊΧ┤ΉΕε
  module-level constant `_REFLECTION_TOOL` Ήζα ΉανΉΩ╝ Έ░σΉπΑ. **Read-Write
  parity**: `write_policy()` Ά░Α `dict[str, str]` ΈπΝ ΉπΒΈιυΊβΦΊΧαΈψΑΈκε reader
  ΈΠΕ string payload Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΉΙαΉγσ (S0a Ήζα list/string ΈΣΡ ΊαΧΊΔε ΉιΧΆ╖εΊβΦΈΛΦ
  reflection ΉΩΡΉΕεΈΛΦ Έ│╕ΉπΙ string Ήζ┤Έζ╝ split Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ). **ΊγΝΆ╖Α marker
  Ήζα ΉζαΈΠΕΈΡε Έ░εΊβΦ**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT Ήζα `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader`
  parametrize ΉΩΡΉΕε `reflection.json` ΉιεΆ▒░ + ΉΔΙ
  `test_reflection_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0b` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α. audit doc Ήζα
  ΉΔΒΊΔεΊΣεΉΩΡ `reflection` ΊΨΚ ALIVE Ά░▒ΉΜι + Post-S0b update ΉΕ╣ΉΖα + 3/5 ALIVE
  anchor. ADR-012 Έ│╕Έυ╕Ήζα Tier 1 ΊΣε + invariant test Ήζα ALIVE/DEAD count
  (`== 2/== 3` έΗΤ `== 3/== 2`) ΈΠβΆ╕░ΊβΦ. `autoresearch/train.py` Ήζα audit
  subprocess env wiring ΉΩΡ `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (S0a
  Ήζα wrapper + tool_policy ΉαΗΉΩΡ). ROI: `admire_means` (S2 ΉΜιΉΕν ΉαΙΉιΧ) +
  `ux_means` (S1 ΉΜιΉΕν ΉαΙΉιΧ) ΉΨΣΉς╜ΉΩΡ ΉαΒΊΨξ έΑΦ reflection ΊΤΙΉπΙΉζ┤ ΉζΣΈΜ╡ ΊΤΙΉπΙΈκε
  ΉπΒΆ▓░ΈΡαΈΛΦ fitness Ά▓╜Έκε. 18 new invariant test + Ά╕░Ήκ┤ PR-AUDIT-5SLOT +
  ADR-012 test ΊΧρΆ╗α ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ (Ή┤ζ 73 test Ά╖╕Έο░).

- **PR-S0a έΑΦ `tool_policy` reader ΉΜιΉΕν (ADR-012 dead slot ΉΓ┤ΈουΆ╕░ #1).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT (#1405) Ήζα ΉπΕΈΜρ έΑΦ 5Ή╢Χ mutation ΉνΣ 4Ή╢ΧΉζ┤ dead policy
  (Ήζ╕ΊΞ╝Έθ░ΉΛν reader Έ╢ΑΉηυ) έΑΦ Ήζα Ή▓τ Ή▓αΉ╣α. `tool-policy.json` ΉιΧΉ▒ΖΉζ┤
  ΉΜνΉιε ΈΠΕΆ╡υ ΊδΕΈ│┤ ΊΧΕΊΕ░ΈπΒΉΩΡ ΉιΒΉγσΈΡαΈΛΦ ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΉπΕΉηΖΉιΡ ΉΜιΉΕν. `wrapper-sections.json`
  reader ΊΝρΊΕ┤ (`system_prompt.py:_load_wrapper_override` +
  `_strict_load`/`_graceful_load`) Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Ή░ρΉγσ. **schema** (3 field
  ΈςρΈΣΡ optional, forward-compatible): `allowed_tools` (whitelist) /
  `forbidden_tools` (blacklist) / `priority_order` (Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΙεΉΕε).
  ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ Έ╢ΑΉηυ έΗΤ no-op (ΊαΕΉηυ ΊΨΚΈΠβ Έ│┤Ήκ┤). **Resolution order**:
  έΣι `GEODE_TOOL_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit subprocess, strict έΑΦ
  schema ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε RuntimeError) έΣκ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/tool-policy.json`
  (daily-run SoT, graceful έΑΦ schema ΉΜνΊΝρ ΉΜε WARNING + no-op) έΣλ `None`.
  ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΉιΒΉγσ ΉπΑΉιΡ: `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` Ήζα
  ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ ΈΜρΆ│Ε έΑΦ base tools + ToolRegistry extras + MCP tools Ά░Α
  ΈςρΈΣΡ ΊΧσΉ│ΡΉπΕ ΉπΒΊδΕ ΉιΧΉ▒Ζ ΊΧΕΊΕ░/ΉηυΉιΧΈιυ ΉιΒΉγσ. ADR-012 Ήζα G2 (5Ή╢Χ mutation
