    ΉηΡΈΠβ Ία╕Ή╢ε έΗΤ `GeodeModelAPI` ΉηΡΈΠβ ΈΥ▒Έκζ.
  - Ά▓░Ά│╝: `--model-role target=geode/<base-model>` ΈπΝ ΉπΑΉιΧΊΧαΈσ┤ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ
    ΈςΖΉΜε import ΈαΡΈΛΦ wrapper ΉΛνΊΒυΈο╜ΊΛ╕ ΉΩΗΉζ┤ ΉηΣΈΠβ.

- **`plugins/petri_audit/targets/geode_target.py` έΑΦ `_default_geode_runner`
  ΉΜν Ά╡υΊαΕ + `_split_messages` ΊΩυΊΞ╝ (P3-a).**
  - `_split_messages(messages) -> (system_suffix, history, last_user)`:
    Petri Ά░Α stage ΊΧε ΈσΦΉΜεΉπΑ ΉΜεΊΑΑΉΛν `[system, user, (assistant, user)*]`
    Έξ╝ GEODE Ήζα ``AgenticLoop`` Ήζ╕ΉηΡΈκε Έ╢ΕΈου. system ΉζΑ `system_suffix` Έκε
    (cooperation_with_harmful_sysprompt dimension ΉιΧΊβΧΈΠΕ ΉεΕΊΧ┤), ΉνΣΆ░Ε
    user/assistant ΈΛΦ `ConversationContext.messages` ΉΩΡ, ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ user ΈΛΦ
    `loop.run(prompt)` Ήζ╕ΉηΡΈκε.
  - `_default_geode_runner`: P2-d stub ΉζΕ ΉΜν wiring Ήε╝Έκε Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤. lazy
    import Έκε GEODE bootstrap (`check_readiness` / `_build_tool_handlers` /
    `ToolExecutor` / `AgenticLoop`) Ία╕Ή╢ε. Έπν turn fresh bootstrap (ΊγρΉερΉζΑ
    P3-b polish). Έ╣Ι messages ΈΛΦ `ValueError` Έκε fast-fail.
  - `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_skeleton.py`: 8 έΗΤ 12 test
    (`_split_messages` 4 cases Ή╢ΦΆ░Α, `_default_runner_stub` ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ έΗΤ
    `rejects_empty_messages` Έκε Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤).
  - Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν LLM Ία╕Ή╢εΉζΑ P3-b ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ ΈςΖΉΜε ΉΛ╣Ήζ╕ ΊδΕ. Έ│╕ commit ΉζΑ Ή╜ΦΈΥε
    + ΊΩυΊΞ╝ unit test Ά╣ΝΉπΑ.

- **`plugins/petri_audit/` έΑΦ Petri ├Ω GEODE alignment audit plugin (PoC,
  Custom Model API ΉιΣΆ╖╝).**
  - GEODE ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έξ╝ `inspect_ai` Ήζα model provider Έκε ΈΥ▒ΈκζΊΧεΈΜν έΑΦ Petri
    ΊΣεΉνΑ `target_agent` Ά░Α GEODE Έξ╝ Ήζ╝Έ░α LLM Ή▓αΈθ╝ Ία╕Ή╢ε, prefill / cache /
    replayable / tool_calls ΊζΡΈοΕΉζΑ `inspect_ai` Ά░Α ΉηΡΈΠβ Ή▓αΈου. Ήζ┤ΉιΕ
    phase (P1..P2-b) ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉηΣΉΕ▒ΊΨΙΈΞα Custom Target factory ΈΛΦ outer-loop
    Ή╜ΦΈΥεΈξ╝ Ήγ░ΈουΆ░Α ΉπΒΉιΣ Ήπ░Ήε╝ΈΓα ModelAPI ΉιΣΆ╖╝ΉΩΡΉΕι redundant Ά░Α ΈΡαΉΨ┤
    P2-d ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΆ▒░.
  - Ήβ╕Έ╢Α ΊΠΚΆ░Α ΈΠΕΆ╡υ [Petri](https://github.com/meridianlabs-ai/inspect_petri)
    (Anthropic Alignment Science Έ░ε ┬╖ `meridianlabs-ai` Ία╕ΉΛνΊΝΖ) Ήζα
    GEODE ΊΗ╡ΊΧσ PoC. Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν `AgenticLoop` bootstrap Ά│╝ audit run ΉζΑ
    P3 Έκε Έψ╕Έμ╕.
  - `[project.optional-dependencies] audit` extra ΉΜιΉΕν έΑΦ
    `inspect-ai>=0.3.211` + `inspect-petri @ git+...@6d9b9e1` (Petri
    main 3.0 ΉζΑ release tag Έ╢ΑΉηυΈκε SHA pin). ΈΠβΈ░α: `tool.hatch.metadata.
    allow-direct-references = true`. opt-in: `uv sync --extra audit`.
  - ΈςρΈΞ╕ ID: `geode/<base-model>` ΊαΧΉΜζ (e.g. `geode/opus-4-7`,
    `geode/sonnet-4-6`). `<base-model>` ΉζΑ GEODE Ά░Α ΈΓ┤Έ╢ΑΉιΒΉε╝Έκε ΉΓυΉγσΊΧι
    LLM ΉζΕ ΉΕιΊΔζ; Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν runner (P3) Ά░Α ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ.
  - `plugins/petri_audit/__init__.py`: try/except Έκε `register()` Ία╕Ή╢ε
    έΗΤ `[audit]` extra ΉΕνΉ╣α ΉΜε ModelAPI ΈΥ▒Έκζ, Έψ╕ΉΕνΉ╣α ΉΜε silently skip.
    `register_domain` Έψ╕Ία╕Ή╢ε (Ά░ΡΉΓυ ΈΠΕΆ╡υΈΛΦ runtime domain Ήζ┤ ΉΧΕΈΜα έΗΤ
    `geode analyze` ΊζΡΈοΕ Έ╣ΕΈΖ╕Ή╢ε).
  - `plugins/petri_audit/targets/geode_target.py`:
    - ΈςρΈΥΙ top-level ΉΩΡ `inspect_ai` ΉζαΉκ┤ΉΕ▒ ΉΩΗΉζΝ έΗΤ ΊΩυΊΞ╝ΈπΝ import ΊΧ┤ΈΠΕ
      cold-start ΉαΒΊΨξ 0.
    - `register()`: `inspect_ai` Έξ╝ lazy import + `@modelapi("geode")`
      Έκε `GeodeModelAPI` ΈΥ▒Έκζ.
    - `GeodeModelAPI.generate(input, tools, tool_choice, config)`:
      `_to_geode_messages` Έ│ΑΊβα έΗΤ runner Ία╕Ή╢ε έΗΤ
      `ModelOutput.from_content` Έ░αΊβα. `tools` / `tool_choice` ΈΛΦ
      ΉζαΈΠΕΉιΒΉε╝Έκε Έυ┤ΉΜε (`target_tools="none"` ΉΓυΉγσ ΉιΕΉιε έΑΦ GEODE ΉηΡΉ▓┤
      ΈΠΕΆ╡υ ΉΜεΉΛνΊΖεΉζ┤ Ά╢ΝΉεΕ).
    - `_to_geode_messages()`: 4 role Έ│ΑΊβα (system / user / assistant /
      tool έΑΦ tool ΉζΑ Anthropic convention `[{"type": "tool_result", ...}]`).
      duck typing Ήε╝Έκε `inspect_ai` Έψ╕ΉΕνΉ╣α ΊβαΆ▓╜ΉΩΡΉΕεΈΠΕ Ία╕Ή╢ε Ά░ΑΈΛξ.
    - `_default_geode_runner()`: P3 stub (NotImplementedError).
  - `tests/plugins/petri_audit/test_skeleton.py`: 8 smoke + conversion
    test (package import / extra-less module import / `register()`
    ImportError when extra missing / default runner P2-d stub /
    domain Έψ╕ΈΥ▒Έκζ / 4 role Έ│ΑΊβα / unknown role Ά▒░Έ╢Α / text ΈΙΕΈζ╜ Ή▓αΈου).
  - mypy: `inspect_ai.*` / `inspect_petri.*` `ignore_missing_imports`
    + `plugins.petri_audit.*` ΈςρΈΥΙΉΩΡ `disallow_untyped_decorators = false`
    + `GeodeModelAPI(ModelAPI)` ΊΧε ΉνΕ `# type: ignore[misc]` (Ήβ╕Έ╢Α stub
    Έ╢ΑΉηυΈκε ModelAPI Ά░Α Any Έκε ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ).
  - deptry: `inspect-petri` Έξ╝ `DEP002` ignore ΉΩΡ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΑΦ `inspect_ai` Ήζα
    audit harness Ά░Α `inspect_petri/audit` task Έξ╝ reference Έκε ΈκεΈΥε
    ΊΧαΉπΑΈπΝ Ήγ░Έου Ή╜ΦΈΥεΆ░Α ΉπΒΉιΣ import ΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ.
  - cold-start `import core.runtime`: 27έΑΥ37 ms (baseline 78 ms Ήζ┤ΊΧα ΉειΉπΑ).
  - Έζ╝Ήζ┤Έ╕Ν audit run / ΉΜν bootstrap / Έ╣ΕΉγσ Ή╕κΉιΧΉζΑ P3.
  - Plan: `docs/plans/eval-petri-integration.md`.

## [0.89.3] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Cold-start Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΙΤ53 % (warm median 70 έΗΤ 33 ms) via type-only / late-binding lazy.**
>
> v0.89.3 ΈΛΦ v0.89.2 Ήζα pydantic / asyncio / importlib.metadata lazy ΉεΕΉΩΡΉΕε
> `core.runtime` + `core.wiring.bootstrap` Ήζα 14+11 Ά░ε type-only import Έξ╝
> `TYPE_CHECKING` / ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ lazy Έκε Ή╢ΦΆ░Α Έ╢ΕΈουΊΧεΈΜν. cold-start
> `import core.runtime`: **70 έΗΤ 33 ms median (warm), 201 έΗΤ 167 modules**.
> v0.89.0 έΗΤ v0.89.3 ΈΙΕΉιΒ: cold first-run **240 έΗΤ ~33 ms = έΙΤ86 %**.

### Architecture

- **`core.runtime` + `core.wiring.bootstrap` Ήζα type-only / late-binding
  import Έξ╝ cold-start ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΆ▒░.**
  - `core/runtime.py`: 14 Ά░ε ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν (CUSUMDetector / ExpertPanel /
    FeedbackLoop / ModelRegistry / OutcomeTracker / SnapshotManager /
    ContextAssembler / MonoLakeOrganizationMemory / ProjectMemory /
    ConfigWatcher / TaskGraphHookBridge / TaskGraph / TriggerManager /
    CorrelationAnalyzer) Ά░Α dataclass field annotation Ήε╝ΈκεΈπΝ ΉΥ░ΉηΕ
    (`from __future__ import annotations` Έκε string ΊΠΚΆ░Α) έΑΦ top-level
    import έΗΤ `if TYPE_CHECKING:` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕ.
  - `core/wiring/bootstrap.py`: ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛνΈΥν (ContextAssembler /
    MonoLake / ProjectMemory / FileBasedUserProfile / ConfigWatcher /
    RunLog / RunLogEntry / StuckDetector / TaskGraph / TaskGraphHookBridge /
    InMemorySessionStore) ΈΠΕ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕ + `TYPE_CHECKING`
    type stub.  build_* ΊΧρΉΙαΆ░Α Ία╕Ή╢εΈΡι ΈΧΝΈπΝ instantiate.
  - 5 ΈςρΈΥΙ (`config-lazy` PR ΊΝρΊΕ┤) Ήζα module-level `settings` alias ΉβΑ
    ΈΠβΉζ╝ΊΧαΆ▓Ν `bootstrap.py` ΉΩΡ PEP 562 `__getattr__` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α (RunLog /
    StuckDetector / RunLogEntry) έΑΦ legacy `patch("core.wiring.bootstrap.X")`
    ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ Ία╕Ίβα ΉειΉπΑ.
- Ή╕κΉιΧ (`import core.runtime`):
  - v0.89.2 baseline: 54-94 ms warm (median έΚΙ 70 ms), 201 modules
  - Ήζ┤ PR: **26-47 ms warm (median έΚΙ 33 ms), 167 modules** = warm
    median **έΙΤ37 ms / έΙΤ53 %** vs v0.89.2.
  - v0.89.0 έΗΤ Ήζ┤ PR ΈΙΕΉιΒ: cold first-run 240 έΗΤ ~33 ms = **έΙΤ86 %**.
  - cold-start `sys.modules` ΉΩΡΉΕε Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΈκε Έ╣ιΉπΡ: `core.memory.context`,
    `core.memory.organization`, `core.memory.project`,
    `core.automation.{drift,feedback_loop,model_registry,outcome_tracking,snapshot,expert_panel}`,
    `core.scheduler.triggers`, `core.orchestration.{hot_reload,task_bridge,task_system,run_log,stuck_detection}`.

## [0.89.2] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Cold-start Ή╢ΦΆ░Α έΙΤ20 % (warm median 88 έΗΤ 70 ms) via pydantic / asyncio / importlib.metadata lazy.**
>
> v0.89.2 ΈΛΦ v0.89.1 Ήζα settings lazy ΉεΕΉΩΡ `core.runtime` ΊΛ╕ΈουΉΩΡ ΉηΦΉκ┤ΊΨΙΈΞα
> Έυ┤Ά▒░Ήγ┤ import ΉΖΜΉζΕ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΈκε cold-start ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΆ▒░ΊΧεΈΜν. `pydantic` (BaseModel
> TypeVar bound) 3 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕, `asyncio` + `email.message` mid-module, `core/__init__.py`
> Ήζα eager `__version__` resolve ΈςρΈΣΡ lazy ΊβΦ. cold-start `import core.runtime`:
> **88 ms έΗΤ 70 ms median (warm), 341 έΗΤ 201 modules (έΙΤ140 vs v0.89.0)**.
> v0.89.0 έΗΤ v0.89.2 ΈΙΕΉιΒ: cold first-run **240 έΗΤ ~85 ms = έΙΤ65 %**.

### Architecture

- **`core.runtime` cold-start path Ή╢ΦΆ░Α lazy ΊβΦ (pydantic / asyncio / importlib.metadata).**
  v0.89.1 Ήζα settings lazy ΊγΝΉΙα ΉεΕΉΩΡΉΕε, `core.runtime` ΊΛ╕ΈουΉΩΡ ΈΓρΉΧΕ ΉηΙΈΞα
  ΉΕ╕ Έυ┤Ά▒░Ήγ┤ import Έξ╝ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΈκε cold-start ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΆ▒░:
  - `core/llm/adapters.py`, `core/llm/providers/openai.py`,
    `core/llm/router/calls/parsed.py` Ήζα `from pydantic import BaseModel`
    top-level έΗΤ `if TYPE_CHECKING:` Έ╕ΦΈκζ + `TypeVar(..., bound="BaseModel")`
    forward-reference. pydantic ΊΤΑ ΊΛ╕Έου (~100 ms cumulative) cold-start
    ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ╣ιΉπΡ.
  - `core/llm/providers/openai.py` Ήζα mid-module `import asyncio` έΗΤ
    `_async_call` ΈσΦΉΗΝΈΥε ΉπΕΉηΖΈ╢Α ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ. asyncio + email.message /
    email.utils (~13 ms cumulative) cold-start ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ╣ιΉπΡ.
  - `core/__init__.py` Ήζα `from importlib.metadata import ...` (eager
    `__version__` resolve) έΗΤ PEP 562 `__getattr__` lazy. importlib.metadata
    + email tree (~70 ms cumulative) cold-start ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ╣ιΉπΡ. `__version__`
    Ή▓τ access ΉΜεΉιΡΉΩΡ ΊΧε Έ▓ΙΈπΝ resolve + cache.
- Ή╕κΉιΧ (`import core.runtime`):
  - v0.89.1 baseline: 80-110 ms warm (median έΚΙ 88 ms), 341 modules
  - Ήζ┤ PR: **54-94 ms warm (median έΚΙ 70 ms)**, **201 modules** = warm
    median **έΙΤ18 ms / έΙΤ20 %**, modules **έΙΤ140 vs v0.89.0 baseline 341**.
  - v0.89.0 έΗΤ v0.89.2 ΈΙΕΉιΒ: cold first-run 240 έΗΤ ~85 ms = **έΙΤ65 % cumulative**.
  - `pydantic` / `pydantic_core` / `pydantic_settings` / `importlib.metadata`
    / `email.message` ΈςρΈΣΡ cold-start `sys.modules` ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ╣ιΉπΡ.

## [0.89.1] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Cold-start έΙΤ46 % via `core.config` lazy + 19 callsite ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import.**
>
> v0.89.1 ΉζΑ cold-start path Ήζα Έυ┤Ά▒░Ήγ┤ `pydantic_settings` ΊΛ╕Έου (~150 ms cumulative,
> 144 modules) Έξ╝ lazy ΊβΦΊΧεΈΜν. `core/config.py` (567 lines) Έξ╝ `core/config/`
> ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑΈκε Έ╢ΕΈουΊΧ┤ `Settings(BaseSettings)` ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛνΈξ╝ Ά▓σΈουΊΧαΆ│ι, 19 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕Ήζα
> top-level `from core.config import settings` ΉζΕ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕ.
> Ή╕κΉιΧ έΑΦ `import core.runtime` cold-start: **240 ms έΗΤ 128 ms first-run / 80έΑΥ110 ms warm**
> (median έΚΙ 88 ms) = **έΙΤ112 ms / έΙΤ46 %**. 0 regression: 4330 tests pass,
> E2E A (68.4) unchanged.

### Architecture

- **`core.config` ΈςρΈΥΙΉζΕ ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑΈκε Έ╢ΕΈου, pydantic_settings ΊΛ╕Έου lazy ΊβΦ**
  (cold-start ΊγΝΉΙα ΊΗιΈΝΑ). Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `core/config.py` (567 lines) Έξ╝ `core/config/`
  ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑΈκε Έ│ΑΊβα:
  - `core/config/_settings.py` (NEW) έΑΦ `Settings(BaseSettings)` ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛνΈπΝ Ά▓σΈου
    ΊΧαΉΩυ pydantic / pydantic_settings ΊΤΑ import ΊΛ╕Έου (~150 ms cumulative,
    144 modules) Ά░Α Ή▓τ settings Ήζ╕ΉΛνΊΕ┤ΉΛν ΉγΦΉ▓φ ΉΜεΉιΡΆ╣ΝΉπΑ Έψ╕ΈνΕΉπΑΈΠΕΈκζ ΊΧρ.
  - `core/config/__init__.py` έΑΦ ΉΔΒΉΙα (`*_PRIMARY`, `*_BASE_URL` ΈΥ▒),
    TOML ΈκεΉπΒ, `ModelPolicy`, `RoutingConfig`, `_resolve_provider` ΈπΝ ΉειΉπΑ.
    `settings` / `Settings` ΈΛΦ PEP 562 `__getattr__` Έκε lazy ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ.
- Ή╕κΉιΧ: `import core.config` ΈΜρΈΠΖ cold = **189 ms έΗΤ 34 ms (έΙΤ82 %)**;
  modules **308 έΗΤ 164**; pydantic_settings Ά░Α sys.modules ΉΩΡ ΈΥνΉΨ┤Ά░ΑΉπΑ
  ΉΧΛΉζΝ (`settings` Ή▓τ access ΉΜεΉιΡΉΩΡΈπΝ ΈκεΈΥε). ΈΜρΈΠΖΉε╝Έκε cold-start path
  ΉιΕΉ▓┤ ΊγΝΉΙαΈΛΦ ΉηΣΉζΝ (240 έΗΤ 226 ms) έΑΦ `from core.config import settings`
  Έξ╝ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υΈκε ΉαχΆ╕░ΈΛΦ callsite Έ│ΑΊβαΉζ┤ ΈΜνΉζΝ ΈΜρΆ│ΕΉΩΡΉΕε ΊΧ╡ΉΜυ ΊγΝΉΙαΈξ╝ ΈπΝΈΥο.

- **`from core.config import settings` Ήζα cold-start path callsite 19 Ά││ΉζΕ
  ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕ** (ΈΜρΆ│Ε 1 Ήζα PEP 562 lazy ΊδΕΉΗΞ). Έ│ΑΊβα ΈΝΑΉΔΒ:
  - 4-Layer wiring: `core/wiring/{bootstrap,automation,container,startup}.py`
  - LLM Έζ╝Ήγ░ΊΕ░/ΉιεΆ│╡ΉηΡ: `core/runtime.py`, `core/graph.py`,
    `core/llm/{adapters,fallback,provider_dispatch}.py`,
    `core/llm/router/calls/{tools,streaming,text,parsed,_failover}.py`,
    `core/llm/providers/{anthropic,openai,glm}.py`
  - CLI thin client: `core/cli/{__init__,dispatcher,pipeline_executor,onboarding,
    welcome,report_renderer}.py`, `core/cli/tool_handlers/system.py`
  - ΈΠΕΈσΦΉζ╕ ΊΦΝΈθυΆ╖╕Ήζ╕: `plugins/game_ip/cli/batch.py`
- `core/llm/fallback.py` Ήζα module-level `MAX_RETRIES` / `RETRY_BASE_DELAY` /
  `RETRY_MAX_DELAY` (settings ΉοΚΉΜε ΊΠΚΆ░Α) ΈΠΕ PEP 562 `__getattr__` Έκε lazy
  ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ. `retry_with_backoff_generic` ΊΧρΉΙα default ΈΠΕ None Ήε╝Έκε Έ░ΦΆ╛╕Ά│ι
  body ΉΩΡΉΕε settings ΉΩΡΉΕε ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ έΑΦ module load ΉΜεΉιΡ settings ΊΛ╕ΈουΆ▒░ Ή░ρΈΜρ.
- `core/llm/router/__init__.py` Ήζα `MAX_RETRIES` ΈΥ▒ re-export ΈΛΦ PEP 562
  fallback constants lazy Έ╢ΕΆ╕░Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕ (Ήβ╕Έ╢Α `from core.llm.router import
  MAX_RETRIES` Ία╕Ίβα ΉειΉπΑ).
- 5 ΈςρΈΥΙ (`wiring/{startup,container}`, `cli/onboarding`,
  `llm/provider_dispatch`, `llm/providers/anthropic`) ΉΩΡ module-level
  `__getattr__` Ήζα `settings` lazy alias Έξ╝ Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΊΧ┤ legacy patch ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕
  (`patch("core.X.settings")`) Ία╕Ίβα ΉειΉπΑ.
- ΉαΒΊΨξ ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ (`patch("core.X.settings")` 24 ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕) ΈΛΦ `core.config.settings`
  ΈΜρΉζ╝ patch Έκε ΊΗ╡Ήζ╝. settings Ά░Α singleton Ήζ┤Έζ╝ ΈΠβΈΥ▒.

- **Ή╕κΉιΧ (cold-start, `import core.runtime`)**:
  - v0.89.0 baseline: **240 ms** (single run, clean cache)
  - ΈΜρΆ│Ε 1 (`config` ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑ Έ╢ΕΈου) ΈΜρΈΠΖ: 226 ms (έΙΤ14 ms / έΙΤ6 %)
  - ΈΜρΆ│Ε 1+2 ΊΧσΉΓ░ (Ήζ┤ PR): **128 ms cold (first run) / 80έΑΥ110 ms warm
    (median έΚΙ 88 ms)** έΑΦ ΈΙΕΉιΒ έΙΤ112 ms / **έΙΤ46 %**
  - `pydantic_settings` / `core.config._settings` Ά░Α ΈΞΦ Ήζ┤ΉΔΒ cold-start Ήζα
    `sys.modules` ΉΩΡ ΈΥνΉΨ┤Ά░ΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ (Ή▓τ settings access ΉΜεΉιΡΆ╣ΝΉπΑ Έψ╕ΈνΕΉπΡ).
  - modules count: 382 έΗΤ 341 (έΙΤ41 modules) on cold-start path.

## [0.89.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Removed έΑΦ LangSmith ΉζαΉκ┤ 100 % ΉιεΆ▒░.  Ά┤ΑΉ╕κΉΕ▒ΉζΑ hook system + RunLog Έκε Ήζ╝ΉδΡΊβΦ.**
>
> v0.89.0 ΉζΑ GEODE Ήζα Ήβ╕Έ╢Α Ά┤ΑΉ╕κΉΕ▒ SDK ΉζαΉκ┤(LangSmith) ΉζΕ ΊΗ╡Ήπ╕Έκε ΈΨ╝ΉΨ┤ΈΓ╕ΈΜν.
> 18 production files + 57 test references + 1 dependency + 4 docs Ά░Α
> ΉαΒΊΨξ Έ░δΉΧαΆ│ι, **ΉηΡΉ▓┤ hook system Ήζ┤ LangSmith Έξ╝ 100 % ΈΝΑΉ▓┤** (gap 0):
>
> | LangSmith ΈΞ░Ή╜ΦΈιΙΉζ┤ΉΖα | ΈΝΑΉ▓┤ hook Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ |
> |---------------------|------------------|
> | `@maybe_traceable("llm")` (call_llm 5 family) | `LLM_CALL_START` / `LLM_CALL_END` |
> | `@maybe_traceable("chain")` (AgenticLoop.run) | `TURN_COMPLETE` |
> | `@maybe_traceable("chain")` (verification 4 family) | `VERIFICATION_PASS` / `VERIFICATION_FAIL` |
> | LangSmith UI (trace Ήκ░ΊγΝ) | RunLog (P50, ALL 58 events έΗΤ `~/.geode/runs/<session>.jsonl`) |
> | LangSmith run_tree.extra metric Ήμ╝ΉηΖ | hook-llm-lifecycle (P55) έΑΦ LLM_CALL latency/cost ΉπΣΆ│Ε |
>
> Ήβ╕Έ╢Α SDK Ήζα type stub ΊΧεΆ│ΕΈκε Έ░ΧΊαΑ ΉηΙΈΞα `# type: ignore[untyped-decorator]`
> **11 Ά▒┤ ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉΗΝΈσ╕**.  type:ignore ΊβεΉΕ▒ Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΛ╕ 44 έΗΤ 30 (έΙΤ14, έΙΤ31 %).
> ΈΙΕΉιΒ (B2 batch-1/2/3 + LangSmith ΉιεΆ▒░): 69 έΗΤ 30 (έΙΤ56 %).
>
> Bonus: `langsmith>=0.4.0` Ά░Α Ήγ░Έου deps ΉΩΡΉΕε Έ╣ιΉπΡ (langgraph Ά░Α transitive
> Έκε ΈΥνΆ│ι ΉηΙΉΨ┤ sys.modules ΉΩΡΈΛΦ ΈΓρΉπΑΈπΝ, **Ήγ░Έου Ή╜ΦΈΥεΈΛΦ ΉιΙΈΝΑ import ΉΧΙ ΊΧρ**).

### Removed
- **`core/llm/router/tracing.py`** (46 LOC) έΑΦ LangSmith wrapper ΈςρΈΥΙ ΉΓφΉιε (`is_langsmith_enabled`, `maybe_traceable`).
- **`@maybe_traceable` 15 + ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕** έΑΦ `core/llm/router/calls/{text,json,parsed,streaming,tools}.py`, `core/agent/loop/loop.py` (2x), `core/verification/{biasbuster,guardrails,cross_llm,rights_risk}.py` ΈςρΈΣΡ ΈΞ░Ή╜ΦΈιΙΉζ┤ΊΕ░ ΉιεΆ▒░.  hook Ήζ┤Έ▓νΊΛ╕ΈΛΦ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε fire (LLM_CALL_*/VERIFICATION_*).
- **`LLMUsageAccumulator._inject_langsmith`** έΑΦ token_tracker Ήζα LangSmith RunTree ΈσΦΊΛ╕Έοφ Ήμ╝ΉηΖ ΈσΦΉΕεΈΥε ΉΓφΉιε.  hook-llm-lifecycle (P55) Ήζ┤ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΉΩφΊΧι ΉΙαΊΨΚ.
- **`pyproject.toml` `langsmith>=0.4.0`** dep Έζ╝Ήζ╕ ΉιεΆ▒░.
- **`tests/`** έΑΦ `TestIsLangsmithEnabled`, `TestMaybeTraceable`, `TestAgenticLoopTracing`, `TestLangSmithTracingLive` (test_e2e_live_llm), `_inject_langsmith` Ά┤ΑΈιρ 3 Ά░ε Ή╝ΑΉζ┤ΉΛν ΉΓφΉιε.  conftest.py Ήζα `LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2=false` Ά░ΧΉιε setdefault ΉιεΆ▒░ (hook ΉΜεΉΛνΊΖεΉζΑ Έ│ΕΈΠΕ setup Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ).
- **`# type: ignore[untyped-decorator]` 11 Ά▒┤** έΑΦ `@maybe_traceable` ΉιεΆ▒░ΉΩΡ ΈΦ░Έζ╝ ΉηΡΈΠβ ΉΗΝΈσ╕.

### Changed
- **`core/llm/token_tracker.py`** έΑΦ module docstring `optional LangSmith injection` έΗΤ `hook lifecycle emission`.  `record()` docstring ΈΠΕ ΈΠβΉζ╝ Ά░▒ΉΜι.  Ά┤ΑΉ╕κΉΕ▒ Ή▒ΖΉηΕΉζ┤ hook system Ήε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΉιΕΈΡρΉζΕ ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **`core/llm/router/_hooks.py`** έΑΦ `logging.getLogger("langsmith").setLevel(ERROR)` / `langchain` ΈΠβΉζ╝ Έζ╝Ήζ╕ ΉΓφΉιε (suppress ΈΝΑΉΔΒ ΉηΡΉ▓┤Ά░Α ΉΓυΈζ╝ΉπΡ).
- **`core/llm/adapters.py`** έΑΦ `generate_parsed` / `generate_stream` Ήζα v0.88.3 anchor `# type: ignore[no-any-return]` ΉιεΆ▒░ (root-cause LangSmith decorator Ά░Α Ήζ┤Ήιε ΉΩΗΉζΝ).
- **`plugins/game_ip/nodes/{analysts,evaluators}.py`** έΑΦ `result = call_llm_with_tools(...)` Ήζα Έ│ΑΉΙαΈςΖΉζΕ `tool_result` Έκε Έ╢ΕΈου.  LangSmith decorator Ά░Α Ήζ┤ΉιΕΉΩΡΈΛΦ Έ░αΊβα ΊΔΑΉηΖΉζΕ Any Έκε erase ΊΨΙΆ╕░ ΈΧΝΈυ╕ΉΩΡ Ά░ΑΈινΉι╕ ΉηΙΈΞα type assignment Ή╢σΈΠΝΉζ┤ mypy ΉΩΡ ΈΖ╕Ή╢εΈΡρ (ToolUseResult έΗΦ AnalysisResult/EvaluatorResult Έ╢ΕΈου).
- **`docs/setup{,.ko}.md`** έΑΦ Observability env vars ΉΕ╣ΉΖαΉζα `LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2`, `LANGCHAIN_API_KEY` ΊΨΚ ΉιεΆ▒░.  ΈΓ┤Ήηξ hook + RunLog ΉηΡΈΠβ ΊβεΉΕ▒ ΉΧΙΈΓ┤Έκε ΈΝΑΉ▓┤.

### Hardening Metrics
- `# type: ignore` ΊβεΉΕ▒ Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΛ╕: 44 έΗΤ **30** (έΙΤ14, έΙΤ31 %).  ΉΕ╕ΉΖα ΈΙΕΉιΒ 69 έΗΤ 30 (έΙΤ56 %).
- `[untyped-decorator]` Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου: 11 έΗΤ **0** (ΉβΕΉιΕ ΉΗΝΈσ╕).
- pytest: 4346 έΗΤ **4330** (έΙΤ16, LangSmith-only ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ ΉΓφΉιεΈ╢Ε).  ΉΜνΊΝρ 0.
- mypy: 332 έΗΤ 331 source files (tracing.py ΉΓφΉιε), 0 errors.
- E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` A (68.4) unchanged.
- `langsmith` Ήγ░Έου deps ΉΩΡΉΕε ΉιεΆ▒░ (langgraph transitive ΈκεΈπΝ ΉηΦΉκ┤).

## [0.88.5] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Hardening έΑΦ `core/graph.py` `# type: ignore[call-overload]` 9 Ά▒┤ ΉιεΆ▒░
> (B2 batch-3).**  9 Ά░ε langgraph `add_node()` Ία╕Ή╢εΉζα ignore ΈςρΈΣΡ ΉιεΆ▒░.
> ΉδΡΉζ╕: Ήγ░Έου `_node()` wrapper Ήζα Έ░αΊβα ΊΔΑΉηΖ `Callable[[GeodeState], dict[str, Any]]`
> Ήζ┤ langgraph Ήζα `_Node[NodeInputT_contra]` Protocol Ά│╝ mypy ΉηΖΉηξΉΩΡΉΕε
> ΉηΡΈΠβ ΈπνΉ╣φΈΡαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ (mypy Ά░Α generic Callable ΉζΕ Protocol member Έκε
> ΉηΡΈΠβ coerce ΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ).  Solution: ``_node`` Ήζα Έ░αΊβαΉζΕ langgraph Ήζα
> ``_Node[GeodeState]`` Protocol Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε + Έ░αΊβαΆ░ΤΉζΕ `cast()` Έκε localise.
> 9 Ά░ε ignore έΗΤ 0, mypy Ά░Α `add_node` overload Έξ╝ Ά╣ρΈΒΩΉζ┤ resolve.

### Changed
- **`core/graph.py:_node`** έΑΦ return ΊΔΑΉηΖ `Callable[[GeodeState], dict[str, Any]]` έΗΤ `_Node[GeodeState]` (langgraph internal Protocol).  ΈΓ┤Έ╢ΑΉΩΡΉΕε `cast(_Node[GeodeState], _make_hooked_node(...))` / `cast(_Node[GeodeState], fn)` Έκε wrapped/raw fn ΈςρΈΣΡ Protocol Έκε localise.  Runtime ΈΠβΉηΣ Έ│ΑΊβΦ 0 (langgraph ΈΛΦ dict-shape return ΉζΕ Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε Έ░δΉζΝ).
- **9 Ά░ε `add_node` Ία╕Ή╢ε (line 514έΑΥ522)** έΑΦ `# type: ignore[call-overload]` ΉιεΆ▒░.  `router`, `signals`, `analyst`, `evaluator`, `scoring`, `skip_check`, `verification`, `synthesizer`, `gather` 9 ΈΖ╕ΈΥε ΈςρΈΣΡ.

### Hardening Metrics
- `# type: ignore` Ή┤ζΊΧσ: 53 έΗΤ **44** (active count, έΙΤ9, έΙΤ17 %)
- `[call-overload]` Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου: 13 έΗΤ 4 (graph.py 9 έΗΤ 0; tracing/tools/pipeline_executor 4 ΉηΦΉκ┤ έΑΦ root-cause ΈΜνΈξ╕ SDK ΊΧεΆ│Ε)
- pytest 4346 passed (Έ│ΑΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ); ruff/mypy clean (332 source files); E2E A (68.4) ΈΠβΉζ╝.

## [0.88.4] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Hardening έΑΦ `# type: ignore[union-attr]` 10 Ά▒┤ ΉιΕΈ╢Α ΉιεΆ▒░ (B2 batch-2).**
> 10 Ά░ε ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕ ΈςρΈΣΡ ``Optional[X]`` ΊΔΑΉηΖ attribute ΉιΣΆ╖╝ έΑΦ Ία╕Ή╢ε Ή╕κΉΩΡΉΕε
> Ήζ┤Έψ╕ None Ά░ΑΈΥε (`is_available()`, `_check_mcp_health`) Έξ╝ ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ΊΧε invariant
> ΉζΕ mypy Ά░Α spread ΊΧαΉπΑ Ές╗ΊΧ┤ Έ░εΉΔζ.  `assert ... is not None` Έκε invariant
> ΉζΕ localise ΊΧ┤ ignore ΉιεΆ▒░ + Έθ░ΊΔΑΉηΕ ΉΧΙΉιΕΉΕ▒ έΗΣ (None dereference Έ░εΉΔζ ΉΜε
> ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ AssertionError Έκε ΉοΚΉΜε Έ░εΆ▓υ).
>
> v0.88.3 (no-any-return) ΉΩΡ Ήζ┤ΉζΑ B2 ΈΣΡ Έ▓ΙΉπ╕ Έ░░Ή╣α.  Ήβ╕Έ╢Α SDK ΉζαΉκ┤Ήζ┤
> ΉΧΕΈΜΝ, Ήγ░Έου Ή╜ΦΈΥεΉζα invariant Έξ╝ ΈςΖΉΜεΊβΦΊΧαΈσ┤ Ά╣ΦΈΒΦΊηΙ ΉηκΊηΙΈΛΦ Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου.

### Changed
- **`core/server/supervised/{slack,discord,telegram}_poller.py`** έΑΦ 3 Ά░ε poller ΈςρΈΣΡ `_poll_channel` / `_poll_once` Ά░Α `_check_mcp_health` ΊΗ╡Ά│╝ ΊδΕ Ία╕Ή╢εΈΡαΈΛΦ invariant Έξ╝ `assert self._mcp is not None` Έκε localise.
- **`core/mcp/base_calendar.py`** έΑΦ 4 Ά░ε ΈσΦΉΕεΈΥε(`delete_event`, `list_events`, `create_event`, `list_calendars`) ΈςρΈΣΡ `is_available()` Ά░ΑΈΥε ΉπΒΊδΕΉΩΡ `assert self._manager is not None` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.
- **`core/mcp/base_notification.py`** έΑΦ `send` Ήζα ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤.
- **`core/mcp/stdio_client.py`** έΑΦ `subprocess.Popen.stdin: Optional[IO[bytes]]` Ήζα None Ά░ΑΈΛξΉΕ▒ΉζΕ `if self._process.stdin is not None:` Έκε Ή▓αΈου (assert Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜΙΈζ╝ Ά░ΑΈΥε έΑΦ stdin Έψ╕ΊΝΝΉζ┤ΊΦΕ ΉΜε silently skip).
- **`core/llm/providers/anthropic.py`** έΑΦ `ClaudeAgenticAdapter.agentic_call` Ήζα nested `_do_call` closure ΉΩΡΉΕε `self._client` invariant Έξ╝ assert Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε (closure Ά░Α outer scope Ήζα None Ή▓┤ΊΒυΈξ╝ mypy ΉηΖΉηξΉΩΡΉΕε Ές╗ Έ┤Ε).

### Hardening Metrics
- `# type: ignore` Ή┤ζΊΧσ: 63 έΗΤ **53** (έΙΤ10, έΙΤ15.9 %)
- `[union-attr]` Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου: **10 έΗΤ 0** (ΉβΕΉιΕ ΉΗΝΈσ╕)

## [0.88.3] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Hardening έΑΦ `# type: ignore[no-any-return]` 6 Ά▒┤ ΉιεΆ▒░ (B2 mini-batch).**
> 8 Ά░ε `[no-any-return]` ignore ΉνΣ 6 Ά░εΈξ╝ `cast()` ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ήε╝Έκε ΉιΧΈου.  ΈΓαΈρ╕ΉπΑ
> 2 Ά░εΈΛΦ ``@maybe_traceable`` (LangSmith) ΈΞ░Ή╜ΦΈιΙΉζ┤ΊΕ░Ήζα type erasure Ά░Α
> ΉδΡΉζ╕Ήζ┤Έζ╝ root-cause Ά░Α Ήβ╕Έ╢Α SDK ΉΩΡ ΉηΙΉΨ┤, Ήζ┤ PR ΉΩΡΉΕεΈΛΦ anchor Ή╜ΦΈσαΊΛ╕ΈπΝ
> Ά░▒ΉΜιΊΧαΆ│ι ignore ΉειΉπΑ(ΊΨξΊδΕ LangSmith ΊΔΑΉηΖ stub Ά░εΉΕι ΊδΕ Ήζ╝Ά┤Ε ΉιεΆ▒░).
>
> ΉιΧΈου ΈΝΑΉΔΒ έΑΦ ΈςρΈΣΡ SDK Έ░αΊβαΆ░Τ(`json.loads(...) έΗΤ Any`,
> `choice.message.parsed έΗΤ BaseModel | None`)ΉζΕ ΊΧρΉΙαΉζα ΈςΖΉΜεΉιΒ Έ░αΊβα ΊΔΑΉηΖ
> (`list[dict[str, Any]]`, `dict[str, Any]`, TypeVar `T`)Ήε╝Έκε Έ│ΑΊβαΊΧαΈΛΦ
> Ά││.  `cast()` ΈΛΦ Έυ┤Ή╜ΦΉΛνΊΛ╕ hint, Έθ░ΊΔΑΉηΕ ΈΠβΉηΣ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ 0.

### Changed
- **`core/tools/base.py`** έΑΦ `load_all_tool_definitions()` Ήζα `json.loads(...)` Έ░αΊβαΆ░ΤΉζΕ `cast(list[dict[str, Any]], ...)` Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **`core/memory/vault.py`** έΑΦ `JobApplicationVault._load()` Ήζα `json.loads(...)` Έ░αΊβαΆ░ΤΉζΕ `cast(list[dict[str, Any]], ...)` Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **`core/memory/user_profile.py`** έΑΦ `_load_preferences()` Ήζα `json.loads(raw)` Έ░αΊβαΆ░ΤΉζΕ `cast(dict[str, Any], ...)` Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **`core/verification/calibration.py`** έΑΦ `load_golden_set()` Ήζα `json.loads(...)` Έ░αΊβαΆ░ΤΉζΕ `cast(dict[str, Any], ...)` Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε.
- **`core/llm/router/calls/parsed.py`** έΑΦ OpenAI Ά╡υΉκ░ΊβΦ Ή╢εΈιξ `choice.message.parsed` Έξ╝ `cast(T, ...)` Έκε ΈςΖΉΜε (TypeVar `T` bound BaseModel).
- **`core/llm/providers/openai.py`** έΑΦ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤(`OpenAIAdapter.generate_parsed` Ήζα `cast(T, ...)`).
- **`core/llm/adapters.py`** έΑΦ ΈΣΡ Ά││(`generate_parsed`, `generate_stream`)Ήζα ignore ΈΛΦ root-cause Ά░Α ``@maybe_traceable`` Ήζα untyped-decorator ΉηΕΉζΕ ΈςΖΉΜεΊΧαΈΛΦ anchor Ή╜ΦΈσαΊΛ╕Έκε Ά░▒ΉΜι; LangSmith ΊΔΑΉηΖ stub Ά░εΉΕι ΊδΕ ΉιεΆ▒░ ΉαΙΉιΧ.

### Hardening Metrics
- `# type: ignore` Ή┤ζΊΧσ: 69 έΗΤ **63** (έΙΤ6, έΙΤ8.7 %)
- `[no-any-return]` Ή╣┤ΊΖΝΆ│ιΈου: 8 έΗΤ 2 (ΈΓρΉζΑ 2 ΈΛΦ LangSmith decorator ΊΧεΆ│Ε)
- pytest 4346 passed (Έ│ΑΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ); ruff/mypy clean; E2E A (68.4) ΈΠβΉζ╝.

## [0.88.2] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Cleanup έΑΦ httpx ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ lazy loading (B1/v0.88.1 ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒).**
> v0.88.0 (anthropic) + v0.88.1 (numpy/correlation) ΉζΕ Ά▒░Ή╣αΆ│ιΈΠΕ ΈΓρΉΧΕΉηΙΈΞα
> ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ module-level Έυ┤Ά▒░Ήγ┤ SDK ΈΛΦ **httpx** ΉαΑΈΜν.
> `core/llm/providers/anthropic.py:13` Ά│╝ `core/llm/providers/openai.py:371`
> ΈΣΡ Ά││ΉΩΡΉΕε `import httpx` Ά░Α module-level ΉΩΡ ΈΓρΉΧΕ ΉηΙΉΨ┤ `core.runtime`
> ΊΧε Έ▓Ι import ΈπΝΉε╝Έκε httpx ΊΛ╕Έου(~92 ms importtime cumulative) Έξ╝ ΈΒΝΉΨ┤ΉβΦΈΜν.
>
> **ΉΗΦΉπΒΊΧε Ή╕κΉιΧ Ά▓░Ά│╝**: importtime cumulative 92 ms ΉβΑ ΈΜυΈου wall-clock
> Έ│ΑΊβΦΈΛΦ ΈΖ╕Ήζ┤ΉοΙΉΩΡ Έυ╗ΊηΝΈΜν(10-run median: develop 310 ms vs httpx-lazy
> 322 ms έΑΦ Ή░ρΉζ┤ Έυ┤ΉζαΈψ╕).  httpx Ήζα ΉζαΉκ┤(asyncio, ssl, certifi) Ήζ╝Έ╢ΑΆ░Α
> ΈΜνΈξ╕ path ΈκεΈΠΕ ΈκεΈΥεΈΡαΆ│ι, Ήζ╝Έ╢ΑΈΛΦ Έ│ΣΈιυ import Έκε wall-clock ΉαΒΊΨξΉζ┤ ΉιΒΆ╕░
> ΈΧΝΈυ╕.  Ά╖╕Έθ╝ΉΩΡΈΠΕ Έ│╕ PR Ήζα Ά░ΑΉ╣αΈΛΦ **Ή╜ΦΈΥε Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒ + ΉΓυΉγσ ΊΝρΊΕ┤ Έ│┤Ήηξ**:
>
> 1. **ΈΠβΉζ╝ lazy ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ήζα Ήζ╝Ά┤Α ΉιΒΉγσ** έΑΦ anthropic/numpy Ά░Α lazy Ήζ╕ΈΞ░ httpx
>    ΈπΝ eager Ήζ╕ Έ╣ΕΈΝΑΉ╣φ ΉιεΆ▒░.  v0.88.0/v0.88.1 Ήζα PEP 562 + function-local
>    import ΊΝρΊΕ┤ΉζΕ ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ SDK Ά╣ΝΉπΑ Ήζ┤ΉΨ┤ΉΕε ΉιΒΉγσ.
> 2. **ΉΓυΉγσ ΉΧΙ ΊΧαΈΛΦ ΉΓυΉγσΉηΡ Έ│┤Ία╕** έΑΦ Codex Plus only / GLM only ΉΖΜΉΩΖΉζΑ
>    HTTP ΊΒ┤Έζ╝Ήζ┤ΉΨ╕ΊΛ╕Ά░Α ΊΧΕΉγΦ ΉΩΗΉζΝΉΩΡΈΠΕ httpx Έξ╝ ΉαΒΉδΡΊηΙ sys.modules ΉΩΡ
>    ΈΥνΆ│ι ΉηΙΉΩΙΈΜν.  Έ│╕ PR ΊδΕ `'httpx' in sys.modules == False` Έ│┤Ήηξ
>    (`import core.runtime` ΉπΒΊδΕ ΉΜεΉιΡ).
> 3. **module-level eager import Ήζα ΈπΙΉπΑΈπΚ ΉηΦΈξα ΉιεΆ▒░** έΑΦ Ήζ┤ΊδΕ cold-start
>    Ή╢ΦΆ░Α ΉιΙΉΧ╜ΉζΑ `core.config` (pydantic settings) Ά░βΉζΑ Ά╡υΉκ░ΉιΒ ΉηΣΉΩΖΉζ┤
>    ΊΧΕΉγΦΊΧαΈσ░, SDK lazy Ήζ┤ΉΛΙΈΛΦ Ήζ┤ PR Έκε ΈΜτΊηα.
>
> Ά▓ΑΉοζ: `import core.runtime` ΊδΕ `'httpx' in sys.modules == False`.  pytest
> 4346 passed (Έ│ΑΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ); ruff/mypy clean; E2E A (68.4) ΈΠβΉζ╝.

### Changed
- **`core/llm/providers/anthropic.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import httpx` ΉιεΆ▒░ έΗΤ `TYPE_CHECKING` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ.  `_build_httpx_timeout` / `_build_httpx_limits` / `get_anthropic_client` / `get_async_anthropic_client` 4 ΊΧρΉΙαΉΩΡ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ `import httpx` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.  Type annotation(`-> httpx.Timeout`, `-> httpx.Limits`)ΉζΑ `from __future__ import annotations` Έκε string.
- **`core/llm/providers/openai.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import httpx  # noqa: E402` ΉιεΆ▒░.  ΉειΉζ╝ΊΧε ΉΓυΉγσΉ▓α(`_get_client` Ήζα lock-protected lazy-init Έ╕ΦΈκζ)ΉΩΡ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ `import httpx` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.

### Performance
- Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ wall-clock Ή╕κΉιΧ Ά░ΑΈΛξΊΧε Έ│ΑΊβΦ ΉΩΗΉζΝ (10-run median: 310 ms έΗΤ 322 ms, noise band).  importtime cumulative 92 ms ΉιΙΉΧ╜ΉζΑ SDK Ήζα ΉζαΉκ┤ graph Ά░Α ΈΜνΈξ╕ path ΈκεΈΠΕ Ήζ╝Έ╢Α ΈκεΈΥεΈΡαΉΨ┤ wall-clock Ήε╝Έκε Ά╖╕ΈΝΑΈκε ΊβαΉδΡΈΡαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ.  Ά╖╕ΈθυΈΓα **httpx Έψ╕ΉΓυΉγσ ΉΖΜΉΩΖΉζΑ SDK Έξ╝ ΉαΒΉδΡΊηΙ ΉΧΙ ΈκεΈΥε**ΊΧαΆ▓Ν ΈΡρ (sys.modules Ά▓ΑΉοζ).
- ΈΙΕΉιΒ (B1 + v0.88.1 + v0.88.2): Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ ΉιΙΉΧ╜ ~έΙΤ258 ms / ~έΙΤ58 % (v0.88.0 main ΈΝΑΈ╣Ε).

## [0.88.1] έΑΦ 2026-05-09

> **Performance έΑΦ numpy + correlation analyzer ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ lazy loading.**
> v0.88.0 Ά░Α anthropic SDK 248 ms Έξ╝ ΉηαΈζ╝ΈΓ╕ ΉπΒΊδΕ, ΈΓρΉζΑ Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕Ήζα
> ΈΜνΉζΝ ΊΒ░ ΈΞσΉΨ┤ΈουΈΛΦ **numpy** ΉαΑΈΜν.  `core.automation.correlation` Ά│╝
> `core.verification.stats` Ά░Α module-level `import numpy as np` Έκε
> SDK Έξ╝ ΈΒΝΉΨ┤ΉβΑ, ΈΜρΉΙεΊηΙ `import core.runtime` ΈπΝΉε╝ΈκεΈΠΕ numpy ΊΛ╕Έου
> (~31 ms) Ά░Α ΈπνΈ▓Ι ΈκεΈΥε.  `core.automation.expert_panel` ΈΠΕ Ά░βΉζΑ
> ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ήε╝Έκε ΉπΒΉιΣ `import numpy as np`.
>
> Ήζ┤Έ▓Ι PR ΉζΑ **3 Ά││Ήζα numpy ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ import έΗΤ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ + TYPE_CHECKING**
> Ήε╝Έκε ΉαχΆ▓ρ, numpy Έξ╝ ΉΜνΉιεΈκε ΉΓυΉγσΊΧαΈΛΦ ΊΧρΉΙαΆ░Α Ή▓αΉζΝ Ία╕Ή╢εΈΡι ΈΧΝΆ╣ΝΉπΑ ΈκεΈΥεΈξ╝
> Έψ╕ΈμυΈΜν.  `core.runtime` Ήζα `CorrelationAnalyzer` ΉΨ┤ΈΖ╕ΊΖΝΉζ┤ΉΖαΈΠΕ
> `TYPE_CHECKING` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ(B1 Ήζα `LLMClientPort` ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤).
>
> **Ή╕κΉιΧ (warm cache, 10-run sorted, median of 5thέΑΥ6th):**
> - Before (v0.88.0 main): 314έΑΥ441 ms (median 356 ms)
> - After  (v0.88.1):     259έΑΥ367 ms (median 282 ms)
> - **╬Φ: έΙΤ74 ms / έΙΤ21 %**
>
> Ά▓ΑΉοζ: `import core.runtime` ΊδΕ `'numpy' in sys.modules == False`.
> Ή▓τ ``ExpertPanel.compute_consensus`` / ``CorrelationAnalyzer.spearman``
> / ``calculate_krippendorff_alpha`` Ία╕Ή╢εΉζ┤ Ήζ╝ΉΨ┤ΈΓαΈσ┤ Ά╖╕ ΉΜεΉιΡΉΩΡ numpy 1
> ΊγΝ ΈκεΈΥε. pytest 4346 passed (Έ│ΑΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ); E2E A (68.4) ΈΠβΉζ╝.

### Changed
- **`core/runtime.py`** έΑΦ `from core.automation.correlation import CorrelationAnalyzer` (line 39) Έξ╝ `TYPE_CHECKING` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ.  `correlation_analyzer: CorrelationAnalyzer | None = None` ΈΞ░Ήζ┤ΊΕ░ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν ΉΨ┤ΈΖ╕ΊΖΝΉζ┤ΉΖαΉζΑ `from __future__ import annotations` Έκε Ήζ╕ΊΧ┤ Έθ░ΊΔΑΉηΕ string Ήζ┤Έζ╝ ΉΜνΉιε import Έ╢ΙΊΧΕΉγΦ.  B1 Ήζα `LLMClientPort` ΊΝρΊΕ┤ ΉηυΉΓυΉγσ.
- **`core/automation/feedback_loop.py`** έΑΦ module-level `from core.automation.correlation import CorrelationAnalyzer` Έξ╝ `TYPE_CHECKING` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ.  `__init__` factory(line 142, 148) ΈΛΦ Ήζ┤Έψ╕ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import ΉΓυΉγσ ΉνΣΉζ┤Έζ╝ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ ΉΩΗΉζΝ.  Type annotation(line 159) ΉζΑ string.
- **`core/automation/expert_panel.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import numpy as np` ΉιεΆ▒░.  `_compute_aggregate` ΊΧρΉΙα Έ│╕Ή▓┤ Ή▓τ ΉνΕΉΩΡ `import numpy as np` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.  ΉΓυΉγσΉ▓αΈΛΦ Ά╖╕ ΊΧρΉΙαΉζα 3 ΉνΕ(``np.array`` / ``np.std`` / ``np.mean``) Έ┐ΡΉζ┤Έζ╝ ΈΜρΉζ╝ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ import Έκε Ή╢σΈ╢Ε.
- **`core/verification/stats.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import numpy as np` ΉιεΆ▒░.  `calculate_krippendorff_alpha` ΊΧρΉΙα Ή▓τ ΉνΕΉΩΡ `import numpy as np` Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.  Krippendorff alpha Ά│ΕΉΓ░ Ήβ╕ΉΩΡΈΛΦ numpy ΉΓυΉγσΉ▓α ΉΩΗΉζΝ.

### Performance
- **CLI Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ έΙΤ74 ms / έΙΤ21 %** (warm cache, 10-run median).  numpy Έξ╝ ΉΧΙ ΈπΝΉπΑΈΛΦ invocation(`geode about`, `geode doctor`, `geode --help`, `geode version` ΈΥ▒)ΉζΑ numpy ΊΛ╕ΈουΈξ╝ ΉαΒΉδΡΊηΙ ΈκεΈΥεΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΕ ΉΙα ΉηΙΆ▓Ν ΈΡρ.  v0.88.0 (anthropic lazy) ΉβΑ ΊΧσΉ│Ρ Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ ΈΙΕΉιΒ ΉιΙΉΧ╜ ~258 ms / ~58 %.

## [0.88.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Performance έΑΦ anthropic SDK module-level lazy loading.**
> CLI Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ Ά▓╜Έκε(`geode about` / `geode doctor` / `geode --help`)ΈΛΦ
> Ά╖╕ΈΠβΉΧΙ `core.runtime` import ΊΧε Έ▓ΙΈπΝΉε╝Έκε **anthropic SDK 248 ms Ά╖╕ΈηαΊΦΕ
> ΉιΕΉ▓┤**Έξ╝ ΈΒΝΉΨ┤ΉβΦΈΜν. anthropicΉζΕ ΊΧε Έ▓ΙΈΠΕ Ία╕Ή╢εΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΈΛΦ user ΈΠΕ(ΉαΙ: Codex
> Plus ΈΜρΈΠΖ, GLM ΈΜρΈΠΖ)ΈΠΕ Έπν invocation ΈπΙΈΜν Ήζ┤ Έ╣ΕΉγσΉζΕ ΉπΑΈ╢ΙΊΧ┤ ΉβΦΉε╝Έσ░,
> `python -X importtime -c "import core.runtime"` Ήε╝Έκε Ή╕κΉιΧ ΉΜε anthropic
> ΊΛ╕Έου(`anthropic.types.*`, `httpx.*`, `anyio.*`)Ά░Α cumulative 248 ms Έξ╝
> Ή░ρΉπΑ. Ήζ┤Έ▓Ι PR ΉζΑ anthropic ΉζΕ **PEP 562 ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ `__getattr__`** Έκε
> defer ΊΧ┤, ΉπΕΉπεΈκε anthropic ΉζΕ ΈπΝΉπΑΈΛΦ Ή╜ΦΈΥε(ΉΩΡΉζ┤ΉιΕΊΜ▒ Ία╕Ή╢ε, ΉΩΡΈθυ Έ╢ΕΈξα,
> failover) Ά░Α Ή▓αΉζΝ ΉΜνΊΨΚΈΡι ΈΧΝΆ╣ΝΉπΑ SDK ΈκεΈΥεΈξ╝ Έψ╕ΈμυΈΜν.
>
> **Ή╕κΉιΧ (warm cache, `import core.runtime`):**
> - Before (main): 354έΑΥ386 ms (median ~370 ms)
> - After (B1):   183έΑΥ190 ms (median ~186 ms)
> - **╬Φ: έΙΤ184 ms / έΙΤ49 %** (3-run median)
>
> Ά▓ΑΉοζ: `import core.runtime` ΊδΕ `'anthropic' in sys.modules` Ά░Α `False`.
> Ή▓τ ``classify_llm_error`` / failover dispatch / agentic Ία╕Ή╢εΉζ┤ Ήζ╝ΉΨ┤ΈΓαΈσ┤
> Ά╖╕ ΉΜεΉιΡΉΩΡ `__getattr__` Ήζ┤ anthropic ΉζΕ 1 ΊγΝ ΈκεΈΥε.  pytest 4346 passed
> (Έ│ΑΈΠβ ΉΩΗΉζΝ); E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` A (68.4) ΈΠβΉζ╝.

### Changed
- **`core/llm/errors.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import anthropic` ΉιεΆ▒░.  7 Ά░ε `LLM*Error` Έ│ΕΉ╣φ(`LLMTimeoutError`, `LLMConnectionError`, `LLMRateLimitError`, `LLMAuthenticationError`, `LLMBadRequestError`, `LLMAPIStatusError`, `LLMInternalServerError`)ΉζΑ module-level `__getattr__` Ήε╝Έκε lazy ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ.  `_ANTHROPIC_ALIAS_MAP` Έκε anthropic SDK Ήζα ΉΜνΉιε ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛν Ήζ┤ΈοΕΉζΕ Ή╢ΦΉιΒ; Ή▓τ ΉιΣΆ╖╝ ΉΜε `globals()` ΉΩΡ Ή║ΡΉΜε.  `__all__` Ή╢ΦΆ░ΑΈκε mypy `--no-implicit-reexport` ΊΗ╡Ά│╝.  `classify_llm_error` ΈΛΦ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ `import anthropic` ΊδΕ `anthropic.RateLimitError` ΈΥ▒ SDK ΊΒ┤ΈηαΉΛνΈξ╝ ΉπΒΉιΣ Ή░╕Ήκ░ (in-module ΈιΙΊΞ╝Έθ░ΉΛνΈΛΦ `__getattr__` ΉζΕ Ά▒░Ή╣αΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉε╝ΈψΑΈκε).
- **`core/llm/provider_dispatch.py`** έΑΦ ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ `import anthropic` ΉιεΆ▒░.  Dispatch table Ήζα `_anthropic_retryable` / `_anthropic_bad_request` / `_anthropic_get_client` ΊΩυΊΞ╝ ΈΠΕΉηΖ(Ά╕░Ήκ┤ `_openai_retryable` / `_openai_bad_request` Ήζα anthropic Ή╣┤Ήγ┤ΊΕ░ΊΝΝΊΛ╕).  Lambda capture Ά░Α ΉΧΕΈΜΝ ΊΧρΉΙα ΈιΙΊΞ╝Έθ░ΉΛνΈκε dispatch table ΈΥ▒Έκζ έΗΤ ΉιΧΉζαΆ░Α ΈςρΈΥΙ import ΉΜεΉιΡΉΩΡ Ήζ┤ΈμρΉΨ┤ΉπΑΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΝ.
- **`core/llm/providers/anthropic.py`** έΑΦ top-level `import anthropic` + `from anthropic.types import TextBlockParam` ΉιεΆ▒░.  `RETRYABLE_ERRORS` / `NON_RETRYABLE_ERRORS` / `TextBlockParam` ΉζΑ `__getattr__` Έκε lazy.  Type annotation ΉζΑ `TYPE_CHECKING` Έ╕ΦΈκζΉΩΡ Έ│┤Ήκ┤(IDE / mypy ΉιΧΉιΒ surface ΉειΉπΑ).  Function Έ│╕Ή▓┤ΉΩΡΉΕε anthropic SDK Έξ╝ ΈπΝΉπΑΈΛΦ Έ╢ΑΈ╢Ε(`get_anthropic_client`, `get_async_anthropic_client`, `system_with_cache`, `retry_with_backoff`)ΉζΑ ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υ `import anthropic`.  ΉηΡΆ╕░ ΈςρΈΥΙ ΈΓ┤Έ╢ΑΉΩΡΉΕε lazy Ήζ┤ΈοΕΉζΕ Ή░╕Ήκ░ΊΧ┤ΉΧ╝ ΊΧαΈΛΦ `retry_with_backoff` ΈΛΦ `sys.modules[__name__].RETRYABLE_ERRORS` Έκε PEP 562 Ήγ░ΊγΝ.
- **`core/llm/router/__init__.py`** έΑΦ `from core.llm.errors import LLM*Error as LLM*Error` 7 Ά░ε eager Ήηυ-export ΉιεΆ▒░(ΊΝΝΉζ╝ ΉεΕΉ╣α 1 Ά││, 240 ms ΉιΙΉΧ╜ ΊΧ╡ΉΜυ).  Public API ΈΛΦ ΈςρΈΥΙ-ΈιΙΈ▓ρ `__getattr__` Ήε╝Έκε Έ│┤Ήκ┤(`from core.llm.router import LLMRateLimitError` Ά░Α Ή▓τ ΉιΣΆ╖╝ ΉΜε lazy ΊΧ┤ΉΕζ).  TYPE_CHECKING Έ╕ΦΈκζΉζΑ mypy ΉιΧΉιΒ view ΉειΉπΑΉγσ.
- **`core/llm/client.py`** έΑΦ router/__init__.py ΉβΑ ΈΠβΉζ╝ ΊΝρΊΕ┤(LLM*Error 7 Ά░εΈξ╝ lazy `__getattr__` Έκε ΉιΕΊβα).
- **`core/llm/router/calls/_failover.py`** έΑΦ module-level `from core.llm.providers.anthropic import RETRYABLE_ERRORS, NON_RETRYABLE_ERRORS` Έξ╝ `call_with_failover` ΊΧρΉΙα Έ│╕Ή▓┤ ΉΧΙΉε╝Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ.  Cold-start path ΉΩΡΉΕε `providers.anthropic.__getattr__` Ία╕Ή╢ε Ή░ρΈΜρ.
- **`core/llm/router/calls/streaming.py`** έΑΦ `RETRYABLE_ERRORS` import Έξ╝ `call_llm_streaming` ΊΧρΉΙα-ΈκεΉ╗υΈκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ.  Ά░βΉζΑ Ήζ┤Ήει.

### Performance
- **CLI Ή╜εΈΥε ΉΛνΊΔΑΊΛ╕ έΙΤ184 ms / έΙΤ49 %** (warm cache, 3-run median).  `import core.runtime` ΊδΕ `'anthropic' in sys.modules == False`.  Anthropic ΉζΕ ΉΧΙ ΉΥ░ΈΛΦ ΉΖΜΉΩΖ(Codex Plus only, GLM only)ΉζΑ anthropic SDK Έξ╝ ΉαΒΉδΡΊηΙ ΈκεΈΥεΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉζΕ ΉΙα ΉηΙΆ▓Ν ΈΡρ.

## [0.87.1] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Hardening έΑΦ v0.82.0 staleness Ήζ╕ΉΜεΈΞαΊΛ╕Ήζα ΉηυΈ░ε Έ░σΉπΑΉγσ ΈΜρΉεΕ ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕ Ή╢ΦΆ░Α.**
> v0.82.0ΉΩΡΉΕε `SharedServices`Ήζα frozen `_model` ΊΧΕΈΥεΈξ╝ ΉιεΆ▒░ΊΧ┤ `cmd_model`
> Έ│ΑΆ▓╜Ήζ┤ ΈΜνΉζΝ IPC ΉΕ╕ΉΖαΉΩΡ ΉοΚΉΜε Έ░αΉαΒΈΡαΈΠΕΈκζ Ά│ιΉ│νΉπΑΈπΝ, Ά╕░Ήκ┤ ΈΜρΉεΕ ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕
> `test_model_resolved_per_session`ΉζΑ boot-time Ήζ╝Ά┤ΑΉΕ▒ΈπΝ Ά▓ΑΉΓυΊΧι Έ┐Ρ
> mid-flight `settings.model` Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ έΗΤ ΈΜνΉζΝ ΉΕ╕ΉΖα fresh-read ΉΜεΈΓαΈουΉανΈξ╝
> ΉπΒΉιΣ ΉηυΊαΕΊΧαΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉΧαΈΜν. Ήζ┤Έ▓Ι ΊΝρΉ╣αΈΛΦ ΉιΧΊβΧΊηΙ Ά╖╕ staleness ΉΜεΈΓαΈουΉανΈξ╝ LLM
> Ία╕Ή╢ε ΉΩΗΉζ┤ Ά░ΧΉιε(ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY έΗΦ OPENAI_PRIMARY Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤)ΊΧ┤ v0.82.0
> Ήζ╕ΉΜεΈΞαΊΛ╕Ήζα provider Ά╡ΡΉ░ρ(Anthropic API έΗΦ Codex Plus OAuth) ΊΝρΊΕ┤Ά╣ΝΉπΑ
> ΊγΝΆ╖ΑΈκε ΉαΒΆ╡υ ΉηιΆ╖╝ΈΜν. ΈΠβΉηΣ┬╖ΉΛνΊΓνΈπΙ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ 0; tests/ ΉιΕΉγσ Έ│ΑΆ▓╜. pytest
> 4346 passed (4345έΗΤ4346); E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run`
> A (68.4) unchanged.

### Added
- **`tests/test_shared_services.py::test_model_switch_propagates_across_sessions`** έΑΦ v0.82.0 ΊγΝΆ╖Α ΉηιΆ╕Ι. `settings.model`ΉζΕ `ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY`Έκε ΉΕνΉιΧ ΊδΕ `create_session(DAEMON)` έΗΤ `loop_a.model == ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY` ΊβΧΉζ╕. Ά╖╕ ΉπΒΊδΕ `settings.model = OPENAI_PRIMARY`Έκε Έ│ΑΆ▓╜ΊΧαΆ│ι `create_session(DAEMON)` έΗΤ `loop_b.model == OPENAI_PRIMARY`Ά╣ΝΉπΑ Ά▓ΑΉοζΊΧ┤ `SharedServices`Ά░Α Έπν ΉΕ╕ΉΖαΈπΙΈΜν `settings.model`ΉζΕ fresh-read ΊΧρΉζΕ ΉοζΈςΖ. ΈΣΡ ΉΕ╕ΉΖα Ήζ╕ΉΛνΊΕ┤ΉΛνΆ░Α ΈΠΖΈο╜ΉιΒΉζ╕ΉπΑ (`loop_a.model`ΉζΑ Ή▓τ ΉΜεΉιΡ Ά░Τ ΉειΉπΑ) ΈΠΕ ΊΧρΆ╗α ΉΨ┤ΉΕεΊΛ╕.

## [0.87.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **`core/lifecycle/` έΗΤ `core/wiring/` rename έΑΦ `startup` ΊζκΉΙα ΊδΕΉΩΡΈΠΕ ΈςρΊα╕ΊΧαΈΞα ΊΠ┤ΈΞΦ Ήζ┤ΈοΕΉζΕ ΉζαΈΠΕΆ░Α ΈςΖΊβΧΊΧε Ήζ┤ΈοΕΉε╝Έκε Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤.**
> v0.52ΉΩΡΉΕε `core/runtime_wiring/`ΉζΕ `core/lifecycle/`Έκε ΉαχΆ╕┤ ΈΤν 4Ά░εΉζα builder
> ΈςρΈΥΙ(bootstrap, container, adapters, automation)Ήζ┤ ΈΥνΉΨ┤ΉβΦΆ│ι, v0.86.0(A5b)
> ΉΩΡΉΕε `cli/startup.py`Ά╣ΝΉπΑ ΊζκΉΙαΊΨΙΉζΝΉΩΡΈΠΕ "lifecycle"Ήζ┤Έζ╝ΈΛΦ Ήζ┤ΈοΕΉζΑ ΉΩυΉιΕΊηΙ
> daemon lifecycle / session lifecycle / hook lifecycle Ά░βΉζΑ Ήζ┤ΉπΙΉιΒ ΉζαΈψ╕ΉβΑ
> Ή╢σΈΠΝ. Ά╖╕ ΈςρΈΥΙΈΥνΉζ┤ ΉΜνΉιεΈκε ΊΧαΈΛΦ Ήζ╝ΉζΑ *application Ήζα object graph Έξ╝ wire ΊΧεΈΜν*
> Ήζ┤ΈψΑΈκε `wiring/`Ήζ┤ ΈΞΦ ΉπΒΉιΣΉιΒ. ΊΝρΊΓνΉπΑ Έ│╕Ή▓┤ 5 ΊΝΝΉζ╝ΉζΕ `git mv`Έκε ΉαχΆ╕┤ ΈΤν
> 151 caller site (15Ά░ε cli/, 23Ά░ε tests/, Ά╖╕ Έ░ΨΉΩΡ auth/, llm/, server/,
> agent/loop/) Ήζα `core.lifecycle.*` importΈξ╝ `core.wiring.*`Έκε Ήζ╝Ά┤Ε Ά╡ΡΉ▓┤,
> `pyproject.toml`Ήζα import-linter ignore_imports 1Ά▒┤ + descriptive comment
> 2Ά▒┤ΈΠΕ ΈΠβΆ╕░. ΈΠβΉηΣ┬╖ΊΖΝΉΛνΊΛ╕┬╖import Ά╖╕ΈηαΊΦΕ Έ│ΑΊβΦ 0; cosmetic rename. E2E
> `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); pytest
> 4345 passed (baseline ΈΠβΉζ╝).

### Changed
- **`core/lifecycle/` έΗΤ `core/wiring/` (5 files renamed via `git mv`).** `__init__.py` (re-exports `get_plugin_status`), `bootstrap.py` (760L, 14 builders: hooks, memory, session, config_watcher, task, prompt, plugin_registry, tool_offload, run_log, stuck_detector, έΑο), `container.py` (390L, 10 builders: profile_store, policy_chain, lane_queue, tool_registry, auth, LLM adapters, έΑο), `adapters.py` (295L, 8 builders: MCP signal/notification/calendar adapters, gateway, plugins), `automation.py` (335L, build_automation + wire_automation_hooks). Rename history preserved by `git mv`; `git log --follow` continues to work.
- **151 caller sites updated** έΑΦ `core.lifecycle.*` έΗΤ `core.wiring.*` across `core/runtime.py` (8 sites incl. docstring), `core/cli/{welcome,dispatcher,bootstrap,session_state,onboarding,typer_commands,typer_serve,doctor_bootstrap,tool_handlers/system}.py`, `core/cli/commands/{login,key,_state}.py`, `core/auth/{credential_breadcrumb,plan_registry,auth_toml,oauth_login}.py`, `core/llm/{credentials,fallback}.py`, `core/llm/providers/codex.py`, `core/agent/loop/_model_switching.py`, `core/server/supervised/services.py`, `core/server/ipc_server/poller.py`, plus 23 test files and `tests/_live_audit_runner.py`. Function bodies untouched.
- **`pyproject.toml`** έΑΦ ignore_imports: `core.lifecycle.adapters έΗΤ core.channels.binding` έΗΤ `core.wiring.adapters έΗΤ core.channels.binding`. Descriptive comments at lines 112 (`lifecycle/bootstrap` έΗΤ `wiring/bootstrap`) and 193 (`lifecycle bootstraps` έΗΤ `wiring bootstraps`) synced. `scripts/check_legacy_imports.py` legacy-import migration target updated `runtime_wiring έΗΤ wiring` to reflect the latest module name.

## [0.86.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **A5b έΑΦ `cli/startup.py` Ή▒ΖΉηΕ Έ╢ΕΈου: `lifecycle/startup.py` + `cli/onboarding.py`.**
> v0.82.0 OAuth ΉιΡΆ▓ΑΉΩΡΉΕε Έ░εΆ▓υΊΨΙΉε╝ΈΓα ΈΜρΉζ╝ mvΈκε ΊΤΑΈουΉπΑ ΉΧΛΉΧΕ ΊΠΡΆ╕░ΈΡΡΈΞα Ά▓░ΊΧρΉζα
> ΉπΕΉπε ΊΧ┤Ά▓░. v0.85.0 (A5a)Ήζ┤ `cli/_helpers`Ήζα IO/key utilityΈξ╝ `utils`Έκε
> Ή╢ΦΉ╢εΊΧ┤ ΉζαΉκ┤ΉΕ▒ blockerΈξ╝ ΉιεΆ▒░ΊΧε ΈΤν, Ήζ┤Έ▓Ι PRΉΩΡΉΕε `cli/startup.py` (520L)
> ΉηΡΉ▓┤Έξ╝ Ή▒ΖΉηΕΈ│ΕΈκε ΈΣΡ ΈςρΈΥΙΈκε Ά░ΙΈζ╝ΈΔΕ. lifecycle Έ╢ΑΈ╢Ε (data inspection +
> readiness data classes + file IO) ΉζΑ `core/lifecycle/startup.py`
> (287L)Ήε╝Έκε, interactive Έ╢ΑΈ╢Ε (console.input wizard, slash command
> dispatch, console.print display) ΉζΑ `core/cli/onboarding.py` (272L)
> Έκε Έ╢ΕΈου. ΊΧρΉΙα Έ│╕Έυ╕ byte-identical, Ία╕Ή╢εΉηΡ 15+ ΉΓυΉζ┤ΊΛ╕Ά░Α Ή▒ΖΉηΕΉΩΡ ΈΦ░Έζ╝
> importΈξ╝ Έ╢ΕΆ╕░. **2Ά░ε ignore_imports ΉαΒΆ╡υ ΉιεΆ▒░**:
> `core.lifecycle.bootstrap έΗΤ core.cli.startup` (Ήζ┤Ήιι lifecycle έΗΤ
> lifecycle internal), `core.server.ipc_server.poller έΗΤ core.cli.startup`
> (Ήζ┤Ήιι server έΗΤ lifecycle, contractΉΩΡΉΕε ΊΩΙΉγσ). 22 έΗΤ 19 (-2 from this
> PR + 1 Έυ┤Ά┤Α). E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged
> at A (68.4); pytest 4345 passed.

### Changed
- **`core/cli/startup.py` (520L) split into `core/lifecycle/startup.py` (287L) + `core/cli/onboarding.py` (272L).** Function placement by responsibility (interactive vs data):
  - **Lifecycle (9 functions + 2 dataclasses)**: `auto_generate_env`, `_is_placeholder`, `_has_any_llm_key`, `detect_subscription_oauth`, `Capability`, `ReadinessReport`, `check_readiness`, `setup_project_memory`, `setup_user_profile` έΑΦ all pure data inspection / file IO with no `console.input` calls.
  - **CLI/onboarding (6 functions)**: `env_setup_wizard`, `_wizard_subscription_path`, `_wizard_api_key_path`, `detect_api_key`, `key_registration_gate`, `render_readiness` έΑΦ all `console.input` wizards or `console.print` display, plus `key_registration_gate`'s `cmd_login` / `cmd_key` slash dispatch.
  - The `_KEY_PATTERNS` constant lives with `detect_api_key` in `cli/onboarding.py` since that function is its only consumer.
  - 15+ caller sites updated. Single-name imports route to one module; multi-name imports (e.g. `from core.cli.startup import check_readiness, render_readiness` in `dispatcher.py`, `tool_handlers/system.py`) split into two `from έΑο import έΑο` lines, one per layer.
  - Test patches (especially `tests/test_startup.py:80+`, `tests/test_agentic_loop.py:357-373`, `tests/test_e2e_live_llm.py:48,536-538`) re-point `core.cli.startup.{settings,console,detect_subscription_oauth,log,_upsert_env}` to `core.cli.onboarding.*` (wizard module) or `core.lifecycle.startup.*` (data path) per the function whose state they patch.
- **`pyproject.toml` `[tool.importlinter.contracts]` έΑΦ 2 entries removed.** `core.lifecycle.bootstrap έΗΤ core.cli.startup` from the `Server may host agent but never CLI` contract: now `lifecycle.bootstrap έΗΤ lifecycle.startup`, internal lifecycle import. `core.server.ipc_server.poller έΗΤ core.cli.startup` from the same contract: now `server.poller έΗΤ lifecycle.startup`, allowed because that contract only forbids `core.cli`. ignore_imports total drops from 22 έΗΤ 19. (`core/cli/startup.py` *deleted*, `core/lifecycle/startup.py` *new*, `core/cli/onboarding.py` *new*, 11 caller files, 5 test files, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.85.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **A5a έΑΦ `cli/_helpers` IO/key utilities έΗΤ `core/utils/env_io.py`.** First
> of two PRs that resume the v0.82.0-deferred A5 work (move `cli/startup.py`
> out of the CLI layer). The blocker was that `startup.py` imports
> `mask_key`, `upsert_env`, `is_glm_key` from `cli/_helpers` έΑΦ moving
> startup alone created `lifecycle.startup έΗΤ cli._helpers` violations.
> This PR extracts the four IO/key utilities (`mask_key`, `upsert_env`,
> `upsert_config_toml`, `is_glm_key`) to `core/utils/env_io.py` because
> they have no CLI semantics έΑΦ they read/write `.env`,
> `.geode/config.toml`, and detect API key shapes. `parse_dry_run_flag`
> stays in `core/cli/_helpers.py` because it parses CLI argument
> strings, which is genuinely a CLI concern. After this PR,
> `cli/_helpers.py` shrinks from 113 LOC to 21 LOC. Five caller files
> updated. E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at
> A (68.4); pytest 4345 passed.

### Changed
- **`core/cli/_helpers.py` (113 LOC έΗΤ 21 LOC) split into `core/utils/env_io.py` + `core/cli/_helpers.py`.** Four utilities move to `core/utils/env_io.py` (107 LOC): `mask_key(key)` (display masking, no CLI dep), `upsert_env(var_name, value)` (writes `.env` + syncs `os.environ`, no CLI dep), `upsert_config_toml(section, key, value)` (writes `.geode/config.toml`, no CLI dep), `is_glm_key(value)` (regex-based ZhipuAI key detection, no CLI dep). `parse_dry_run_flag(args)` stays in `core/cli/_helpers.py` because it parses CLI argument strings έΑΦ CLI-layer concern. Caller updates (5 files): `core/cli/startup.py:18-19,284`, `core/cli/commands/__init__.py:46-48`, `core/cli/commands/model.py:79`, `tests/test_config_effort_knob.py:18` switch their imports from `core.cli._helpers` to `core.utils.env_io`. `core/cli/dispatcher.py:48` keeps its `parse_dry_run_flag` import unchanged. No `ignore_imports` change yet έΑΦ those happen in A5b when `cli/startup.py` itself moves to `core/lifecycle/startup.py`. (`core/utils/env_io.py` *new*, `core/cli/_helpers.py`, `core/cli/startup.py`, `core/cli/commands/__init__.py`, `core/cli/commands/model.py`, `tests/test_config_effort_knob.py`)

## [0.84.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **OAuth point-check trilogy completion έΑΦ IPC TTY capability propagation.**
> Third and final fix in the OAuth-OpenAI live-test inspection. v0.82.0
> fixed the *actual LLM call routing* (frozen `SharedServices._model`).
> v0.83.0 fixed the *footer model display* (`init_session_meter` hard
> default). v0.84.0 fixes the *output noise* έΑΦ when the thin CLI's
> stdout/stdin is not a terminal (heredoc, pipe, CI), the daemon was
> still emitting Rich braille spinner frames `έι┤έιοέιπέιΘέιΠέιΜέιβέι╣έι╕έι╝` and ANSI
> cursor sequences into the socket because `make_session_console`
> hard-coded `force_terminal=True`. Per-turn output got polluted with
> 200+ spinner frames. The thin CLI just wrote the bytes to stdout
> as-is. Fix: thin CLI sends a `client_capability` message right
> after `connect()` carrying its own `is_tty` (= `stdin.isatty() and
> stdout.isatty()`) and `width` (`shutil.get_terminal_size().columns`).
> The daemon stores this in a thread-local; the per-thread Console
> built for that IPC handler thread inherits the client's TTY state
> and width. `_tool_spinner` also got a second non-TTY guard for
> direct (non-IPC) REPL piping to a file. Backward compatible: old
> thin clients that don't send the message keep the previous behavior
> (`is_tty=True, width=120`). E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop"
> --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); pytest **4345 passed** (+1 new
> IPC test asserting the daemon-side Console mirrors a non-TTY
> client's state).

### Fixed
- **`core/cli/ipc_client.py` έΑΦ send `client_capability` on connect.** New helper `_send_client_capability()` runs after the session greeting is read in `connect()`. Reads `sys.stdin.isatty() and sys.stdout.isatty()` for `is_tty` and `shutil.get_terminal_size().columns` (clamped) for `width`. Sends `{"type": "client_capability", "is_tty": ..., "width": ...}` and drains the daemon's `ack` so subsequent one-shot commands (`send_command`, `request_resume`) see their actual response, not the stale capability ack. (`core/cli/ipc_client.py` +47L)
- **`core/server/ipc_server/poller.py` έΑΦ accept and apply `client_capability`.** New module-level `_client_capability_local` `threading.local()` with a `_get_client_capability()` accessor that defaults to `(is_tty=True, width=120)` for backward compat. New `client_capability` message handler in `_process_message`. `_run_prompt_streaming` reads the stored capability at session-start and passes it through to `make_session_console(writer, force_terminal=is_tty, width=width)`. (`core/server/ipc_server/poller.py` +39L)
- **`core/ui/console.py:make_session_console` έΑΦ accept `force_terminal` + `width` kwargs.** Both have backward-compatible defaults (`True`, `120`). Truecolor color system is only forced when `force_terminal=True` so non-TTY sessions don't get the ANSI escape soup either. (`core/ui/console.py` +24/-6L)
- **`core/agent/tool_executor/_spinner.py:_tool_spinner` έΑΦ non-TTY guard for direct REPL piping.** The IPC-mode early-return is unchanged. Added a second guard that checks `_pkg.console.is_terminal` after the IPC check so a *local* REPL piped to a file or running under CI also skips the spinner instead of emitting braille frames + cursor controls. (`core/agent/tool_executor/_spinner.py` +14L)
- **`tests/test_phase3_ipc.py` έΑΦ new test `test_client_capability_non_tty_disables_ansi`.** Patches `sys.stdin.isatty`/`sys.stdout.isatty` to return False and `shutil.get_terminal_size` to return `(80, 24)`, connects via `IPCClient`, then asserts the daemon-side per-thread Rich Console has `is_terminal == False` and `width == 80`. (`tests/test_phase3_ipc.py` +62L, +1 test έΗΤ 4345 total passing)

## [0.83.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Footer model display follow-up to v0.82.0.** v0.82.0 fixed the
> *actual LLM call routing* (frozen `SharedServices._model` was
> overriding `/model` switches), but the per-turn footer
> (`έελ Worked for Xs ┬╖ model ┬╖ έΗΥin έΗΣout ┬╖ $cost`) still hard-coded
> `claude-opus-4-7` whenever a session started without an explicit
> model argument. Root cause: `init_session_meter(model="")` defaulted
> to `ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY` instead of `settings.model`, and the only
> caller (`core/server/ipc_server/poller.py:305`) calls it with no
> arguments. Now defaults to `settings.model or ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY` so
> what the user sees in the footer matches the live user-selected
> model. E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at
> A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed.

### Fixed
- **`core/ui/agentic_ui/_state.py:init_session_meter` έΑΦ default to live `settings.model`.** When the optional `model` argument is empty, fall back to `settings.model` (the value `_apply_model` mutates on `/model` switches) before falling back to `ANTHROPIC_PRIMARY` as a final safety net. Pairs with v0.82.0's `SharedServices` fix: that change made the *actual* LLM call route to the live model, this change makes the *displayed* model in the per-turn footer match. The single caller (`core/server/ipc_server/poller.py:305`) already passes no argument, so this fix lights up automatically έΑΦ no caller changes needed. (`core/ui/agentic_ui/_state.py`)

## [0.82.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Critical fix έΑΦ `SharedServices` no longer freezes the active LLM
> model at daemon boot.** Discovered while live-testing OAuth-OpenAI
> codex routing. Symptom (extremely subtle, silently swaps providers):
> after a long-running daemon was started under `GEODE_MODEL=claude-opus-4-7`,
> a subsequent user `/model gpt-5.5` correctly mutated `settings.model`
> + `.env` and the prompt header rendered `gpt-5.5 ┬╖ autonomous
> execution agent`, **but every actual LLM call still routed to
> `claude-opus-4-7`** έΑΦ `serve.log` confirmed `Session started:
> model=claude-opus-4-7` for sessions opened after the switch. The
> turn footer printed `claude-opus-4-7` (correctly reflecting the
> real model), and `/model gpt-5.5` reported `Already using GPT-5.5`
> from the daemon-side handler, both contradicting the prompt header.
> Net effect: a user expecting OAuth-borrowed Codex Plus (free, hosted
> at `chatgpt.com/backend-api/codex`) silently paid Anthropic API for
> Opus 4.7 calls, with their prompts also flowing to Anthropic instead
> of OpenAI/ChatGPT. Root cause: `SharedServices` cached `_model` and
> `_provider` as dataclass fields populated once in
> `build_shared_services()` from boot-time `settings.model`. Each new
> `create_session()` passed `self._model` to the freshly built
> `AgenticLoop`, so the boot-time value won every time. The drift-sync
> path (`_sync_model_from_settings()`) only triggers when an active
> loop runs another round έΑΦ useless for new sessions in the same
> daemon. **Fix**: remove `_model` / `_provider` dataclass fields;
> `create_session()` now reads `settings.model` directly and resolves
> the provider per call. The 4 `SharedServices(...)` test fixtures
> drop those kwargs; `test_model_resolved` becomes
> `test_model_resolved_per_session` asserting `loop.model ==
> settings.model` after `create_session`. E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy
> Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed.

### Fixed
- **`core/server/supervised/services.py` έΑΦ drop boot-frozen `_model` / `_provider` fields.** `SharedServices` previously held `_model: str = ""` and `_provider: str = "anthropic"` populated once at `build_shared_services()` from `settings.model`. `create_session()` passed those frozen values into every new `AgenticLoop`. After a `/model` switch, the daemon's `settings.model` changed but `self._model` was untouched, so the next session was built with the boot-time model έΑΦ including its provider έΑΦ even though the prompt header read the live `settings.model`. The drift-sync path doesn't run for fresh sessions, only for in-flight loops. The fix is a single change in `create_session()`: read `settings.model` and call `_resolve_provider(settings.model)` inline at the `AgenticLoop(...)` construction site, and delete the two dataclass fields plus the `_model=`, `_provider=` kwargs at `build_shared_services()`'s `SharedServices(...)` return. Tests updated: `tests/test_shared_services.py` drops `_model="claude-sonnet-4-6"` / `_provider="anthropic"` from both `services` fixtures (lines 53-60 and 167-175); `test_model_resolved` is rewritten as `test_model_resolved_per_session` to assert that a freshly built `loop.model` matches the live `settings.model` after `create_session(SessionMode.DAEMON)` έΑΦ the new invariant. (`core/server/supervised/services.py`, `tests/test_shared_services.py`)

## [0.81.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Dependency cleanup A4 έΑΦ `core/cli/{session_checkpoint,transcript}.py` έΗΤ `core/runtime_state/`.**
> Fourth of 5 PRs. Two cross-layer state primitives έΑΦ `SessionCheckpoint`
> (239 LOC, atomic JSON store for resume/checkpoint) and `SessionTranscript`
> (314 LOC, conversation log + cleanup) έΑΦ get a new dedicated package
> `core/runtime_state/` because they're consumed by all three layers
> (cli, agent, server). Putting them in `core/cli/` was the original
> v0.40-era artifact that v0.52's pyproject comment had explicitly
> flagged: *"server/runtime_state/ ΈαΡΈΛΦ utils/ Έκε Ήζ┤ΈΠβ ΉαΙΉιΧ"*. Today, 14
> caller sites span 5 different layers. New package
> `core/runtime_state/` (1 init + 2 modules). 6 `ignore_imports`
> entries removed (`core.agent.loop.{loop,_lifecycle}` ├Ω 2 +
> `core.server.ipc_server.poller` for `session_checkpoint`/`transcript`
> in both contracts). 28 έΗΤ 22 ignore_imports remaining (single biggest
> reduction in the cycle). E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run`
> unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed.

### Architecture
- **`core/cli/{session_checkpoint,transcript}.py` έΗΤ `core/runtime_state/{session_checkpoint,transcript}.py` (553 LOC total).** New package `core/runtime_state/` (`__init__.py` 11L docstring) houses cross-layer session state primitives. `session_checkpoint.py` (239 LOC) = `SessionState` + `SessionCheckpoint` atomic-write JSON store backing `/resume`. `transcript.py` (314 LOC) = `SessionTranscript` conversation logger + `cleanup_old_transcripts` retention helper. Caller updates: `core/server/ipc_server/poller.py:526`, `core/agent/loop/_lifecycle.py:30`, `core/agent/loop/loop.py:129,173`, `core/cli/commands/session.py:22,34`, `core/cli/cmd_lifecycle.py:612`, `tests/conftest.py:30,31`, `tests/test_session_checkpoint.py:7`, `tests/test_phase3_ipc.py:357,402`, `tests/test_session_manager.py:129`, `tests/test_session_resume.py:11,39,110`, `tests/test_session_transcript.py:10`, `tests/test_transcript.py:8` έΑΦ 14 sites across `core/`, `tests/`. `pyproject.toml` `ignore_imports` removed: `core.agent.loop.loop -> core.cli.session_checkpoint`, `core.agent.loop.loop -> core.cli.transcript`, `core.agent.loop._lifecycle -> core.cli.session_checkpoint` (Agent contract); same three + `core.server.ipc_server.poller -> core.cli.session_checkpoint` (Server contract). 28 έΗΤ 22 ignore_imports remaining έΑΦ biggest single drop in the cycle (-6 entries from one PR). (`core/runtime_state/__init__.py` *new*, `core/runtime_state/session_checkpoint.py` *new*, `core/runtime_state/transcript.py` *new*, `core/cli/session_checkpoint.py` *deleted*, `core/cli/transcript.py` *deleted*, 14 caller files, `pyproject.toml`)

> `.openclaw/`/`.codeium/`/`.aider/`/`.codex/`/`.geode/`/`.devin/`) is

One ruff `I001` import-sort fix auto-applied. `pyproject.toml`: 1 `ignore_imports` entry removed (`core.memory.context -> core.cli.project_detect` from the `Server may host agent but never CLI` contract). 29 έΗΤ 28 ignore_imports remaining. (`core/utils/project_detect.py` *new*, `core/cli/project_detect.py` *deleted*, `core/memory/context.py`, `core/cli/welcome.py`, `core/cli/typer_init.py`, `tests/test_project_detect.py`, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.79.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Dependency cleanup A2 έΑΦ `core/cli/bash_tool.py` έΗΤ `core/agent/bash_tool.py`.**
> Second of 5 PRs in the dependency cycle. The 162-LOC HITL-gated shell
> execution tool was misplaced in `core/cli/` despite being agent-internal
> έΑΦ only the agentic loop's `ToolExecutor` ever instantiates it. Moving
> to `core/agent/` puts it at the correct layer. 2 `ignore_imports`
> entries removed; the `S602 shell=True` per-file-ignore path renamed.
> 31 έΗΤ 29 ignore_imports remaining. E2E unchanged at A (68.4); full
> pytest 4344 passed.

### Architecture
- **`core/cli/bash_tool.py` (162 LOC) έΗΤ `core/agent/bash_tool.py` (162 LOC).** `BashTool` provides HITL-gated shell execution with sandbox hardening (`preexec_fn` with `resource.setrlimit` for CPU/FSIZE/NPROC caps) + secret redaction on stdout/stderr. Instantiated only by `core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py:_execute_bash` έΑΦ lives entirely within the agentic loop's tool surface (the CLI never invokes BashTool directly; it goes through `ToolExecutor`). Caller updates: `core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py:20`, `tests/test_bash_tool.py:8,140,146` (3 imports), `tests/test_redaction.py:80,93,106` (3 lazy imports). `pyproject.toml`: 2 `ignore_imports` entries removed (`core.agent.tool_executor.executor -> core.cli.bash_tool` from both `Agent stays pure` + `Server may host agent but never CLI` contracts), 1 `[tool.ruff.lint.per-file-ignores]` entry renamed (`core/cli/bash_tool.py` έΗΤ `core/agent/bash_tool.py` for the S602 `shell=True` allowance). 31 έΗΤ 29 ignore_imports remaining. (`core/agent/bash_tool.py` *new*, `core/cli/bash_tool.py` *deleted*, `core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py`, `tests/test_bash_tool.py`, `tests/test_redaction.py`, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.78.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Dependency cleanup A1 έΑΦ `core/cli/redaction.py` έΗΤ `core/utils/redaction.py`.**
> First of 5 PRs in the new cycle that resolves the 33-entry `import-linter`
> `ignore_imports` backlog accumulated since v0.52. This single 34-LOC API-key
> redaction module had been imported from inside `core/agent/tool_executor/`
> and `core/cli/bash_tool.py` έΑΦ a cross-layer reference (agent layer reaching
> into CLI utilities) that v0.52's pyproject comment had marked as "v0.53Έκε
> Ήζ┤ΈΠβ ΉαΙΉιΧ" but stayed deferred for 25 minor versions. Move it to its proper
> home `core/utils/` (single-responsibility utility, no CLI dependencies).
> Three caller files updated (`core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py`,
> `core/cli/bash_tool.py`, `tests/test_redaction.py`); 2 `ignore_imports`
> entries removed from `pyproject.toml` (`core.agent.tool_executor.executor
> -> core.cli.redaction` in both the `[Agent stays pure]` and `[Server may
> host agent but never CLI]` contracts). E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop"
> --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed (parity with
> v0.77.0). 33 έΗΤ 31 ignore_imports remaining. Five-PR plan: A1 redaction
> (this), A2 bash_tool, A3 project_detect, A4 session_checkpoint+transcript
> έΗΤ core/runtime_state/, A5 startup έΗΤ core/lifecycle/.

### Architecture
- **`core/cli/redaction.py` (34 LOC) έΗΤ `core/utils/redaction.py` (34 LOC).** `redact_secrets()` strips API key patterns (Anthropic `sk-ant-*`, OpenAI `sk-proj-*`, ZhipuAI `hex.token`, GitHub PAT/OAuth, Slack tokens) from text before LLM context injection. The module has no CLI dependencies έΑΦ it's a pure regex-based utility έΑΦ and was misplaced in `core/cli/` purely because the original consumer (BashTool) lived there. Moving to `core/utils/` (alongside `atomic_io.py`, `language.py`) puts it in the correct architectural layer. Caller updates: `core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py:407` (`from core.utils.redaction import redact_secrets`), `core/cli/bash_tool.py:145` (same έΑΦ bash_tool itself will move in A2), `tests/test_redaction.py:5` (same). `pyproject.toml` `[tool.importlinter.contracts]`: 2 entries removed (`core.agent.tool_executor.executor -> core.cli.redaction` from both the `Agent stays pure` and `Server may host agent but never CLI` contracts). 33 έΗΤ 31 ignore_imports remaining. (`core/utils/redaction.py` *new*, `core/cli/redaction.py` *deleted*, `core/agent/tool_executor/executor.py`, `core/cli/bash_tool.py`, `tests/test_redaction.py`, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.77.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Codebase audit Tier 3 έΑΦ God Object split #ΉβΕΉΕ▒: `core/cli/__init__.py`.
> 9-of-9 Tier 3 splits complete.** The 1,889-LOC CLI Typer entrypoint
> (the `geode.cli:app` module that registers all 12 Typer commands +
> the `_thin_interactive_loop` REPL + the dispatcher) is now a slim
> 395-LOC orchestration layer with the helpers extracted to 8 sibling
> modules within `core/cli/`. Unlike previous splits which created
> sub-packages, this is a package-level `__init__.py`, so the helpers
> moved to **sibling files** (`core/cli/welcome.py`,
> `core/cli/dispatcher.py`, `core/cli/prompt_session.py`,
> `core/cli/interactive_loop.py`, `core/cli/typer_commands.py`,
> `core/cli/typer_serve.py`, `core/cli/typer_init.py`,
> `core/cli/search_render.py`) έΑΦ preserving the `from core.cli import X`
> import surface that 90 external sites depend on. Largest single file
> post-split is `typer_commands.py` at 336 LOC έΑΦ **a 79% reduction
> from the 1,889-LOC original**. The Typer `app` and the 3 functions
> that source-introspection tests pin (`_show_commentary`,
> `_handle_memory_action`, `_thin_interactive_loop`) stay in
> `__init__.py` to preserve `tests/test_commentary.py`'s
> `@patch("core.cli.console")` and `tests/test_signal_reload.py`'s
> `inspect.getsource(core.cli)` invariants. E2E `geode analyze
> "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344
> passed (parity with v0.76.0). **Tier 3 complete: 9 splits, 0
> regressions, 0 E2E drift, average -60% reduction across all 9
> God Objects.**

### Architecture
- **`core/cli/__init__.py` (1,889 LOC) έΗΤ `core/cli/__init__.py` (395 LOC) + 8 sibling modules in `core/cli/` (1,669 LOC).** Mechanical split with sibling-module pattern (instead of sub-package έΑΦ `__init__.py` IS the package). Sibling sizes: `welcome.py` 122 (`_render_welcome_brand`, `_render_readiness_compact`, `_suppress_noisy_warnings`, `_welcome_screen`), `search_render.py` 32 (`_render_search_results`), `dispatcher.py` 292 (`_handle_command` 254-LOC dispatcher + minor helpers), `prompt_session.py` 192 (`_build_prompt_session`, `_force_select_event_loop`, `_get_prompt_session`, `_drain_stdin`, `_read_multiline_input`, `_restore_terminal`, `_sigint_handler`), `interactive_loop.py` 112 (`_render_ipc_response`, `_drain_scheduler_queue`), `typer_commands.py` 336 (the 9 small Typer commands: `analyze`, `report`, `search`, `version`, `about`, `setup`, `doctor`, `list_ips`, `batch`, `history`), `typer_init.py` 249 (the `init` Typer command έΑΦ 213 LOC body), `typer_serve.py` 334 (the `serve` Typer command + `_build_runtime_for_serve` + `_ensure_gitignore_entry`). Thin `__init__.py` 395 LOC keeps: imports + `_hooks_ctx` module-level state + `_fire_hook` 1-line delegator + Typer `app` registration via `app.command()(func)` calls + the 3 source-introspection-pinned functions (`_show_commentary` 14L, `_handle_memory_action` 6L, `_thin_interactive_loop` 183L) + re-exports of all helpers for backward compat. Preserves `from core.cli import X` for 90 external sites by re-exporting every helper via `from core.cli.X import Y as Y` aliases. The `_thin_interactive_loop` stays here because it's both large (183 LOC) and tightly coupled to the Typer `app` lifecycle; moving it would require either inlining its 254-LOC dispatcher call (too tight) or carrying state through a parameter that mirrors current module-level access. Companion `pyproject.toml` change: `import-linter` ignore rules in both `[tool.importlinter.contracts]` blocks updated for the leaf-path rename έΑΦ 4 entries `core.cli -> core.{server,channels}.X` became `core.cli.typer_serve -> core.{server,channels}.X` since the `serve` command moved into a sibling module. Net +175 LOC overhead from per-module docstrings, deferred-import patterns, and re-export plumbing έΑΦ accepted for the SRP win (largest file shrinks from 1,889 έΗΤ 336 LOC, **82% drop in non-introspection-pinned helpers**; pinned helpers in `__init__.py` constitute the structural floor). (`core/cli/{__init__,welcome,search_render,dispatcher,prompt_session,interactive_loop,typer_commands,typer_init,typer_serve}.py`, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.76.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-08

> **Codebase audit Tier 3 έΑΦ God Object split #8: `core/cli/commands.py`.**
> The 2,441-LOC CLI slash-command router (the user-facing entry point
> behind every `/key`, `/model`, `/auth`, `/login`, `/cost`, `/skills`,
> `/mcp`, `/compact`, `/clear`, `/resume`, `/apply`, `/context`,
> `/tasks`, `/trigger` invocation) is now a 13-file package
> (`core/cli/commands/`). Each command family lives in its own
> sub-module. The `_state.py` module owns the shared state έΑΦ `COMMAND_MAP`
> dict, `MODEL_PROFILES` registry, `_conversation_ctx` ContextVar,
> `install_domain_commands` plugin merge hook, `show_help`, and
> `resolve_action` slash-to-action resolver. Largest single file
> post-split is `login.py` at 655 LOC (the cohesive `/login` subsystem
> with 9 helpers). **No public API changes** έΑΦ all 53 names previously
> imported by external callers (29 import sites across `core/`,
> `plugins/`, `tests/`) work unchanged via the package `__init__.py`
> re-exports. The plugin-side `from core.cli.commands import
> COMMAND_MAP; COMMAND_MAP.update(GAME_IP_SLASHES)` mutation continues
> to work because the re-export is a reference (same dict object).
> E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4);
> full pytest 4344 passed (parity with v0.75.0). One Tier-3 God Object
> remains (`cli/__init__.py`).

### Architecture
- **`core/cli/commands.py` (2,441 LOC) έΗΤ `core/cli/commands/` (13 files, 2,831 LOC).** Mechanical split by command family; preserves every function body byte-identical and the test-monkeypatch surface for the 28 `core.cli.commands.X` patches across the test suite. Sub-module sizes: `__init__.py` 148 (re-exports έΑΦ `__all__` lists 53 names), `_state.py` 201 (`ModelProfile` dataclass + `MODEL_PROFILES` list + `_MODEL_INDEX` + `_conversation_ctx` ContextVar + `set_conversation_context`/`get_conversation_context` + `COMMAND_MAP` + `install_domain_commands` + `show_help` + `resolve_action` + `_get_profile_store`), `key.py` 211 (`cmd_key` + `_seed_payg_plan_from_key` + `_persist_auth_state` + `_check_provider_key`), `model.py` 204 (`_apply_model` + `_interactive_model_picker` + `cmd_model`), `auth.py` 316 (`_auth_login_status` + `_sync_oauth_profile_after_login` + `cmd_auth` + `_auth_add_interactive`), `mcp.py` 114 (`cmd_mcp` + `_mcp_add`), `skills.py` 200 (`cmd_skills` + `cmd_skill_invoke` + `_skills_add`), `cost.py` 230 (`cmd_cost` + `_budget_bar` + `_get_cost_budget` + `_set_cost_budget`), `session.py` 418 (`cmd_resume` + `cmd_apply` + `cmd_context` + `cmd_compact` + `cmd_clear`), `tasks.py` 84 (`cmd_tasks`), `trigger.py` 50 (`cmd_trigger`), `login.py` 655 (`cmd_login` + 9 `_login_*` helpers έΑΦ the largest leaf, intentionally kept whole as a cohesive `/login` subsystem). The package's `__init__.py` re-exports the 53 public names previously imported by external callers (`COMMAND_MAP`, `MODEL_PROFILES`, `ModelProfile`, all 16 `cmd_*` functions, `set_conversation_context`/`get_conversation_context`, `resolve_action`, `show_help`, `install_domain_commands`, plus 22 private helpers and constants tests reference) so the 29 external import sites need no changes. The plugin's `COMMAND_MAP.update(GAME_IP_SLASHES)` continues to mutate the canonical dict (re-export is a reference, same object). Test-monkeypatch surface preserved via deferred `from core.cli import commands as _pkg` lookup inside each function έΑΦ sub-modules call `_pkg.console.print(...)`, `_pkg._upsert_env(...)`, `_pkg._get_cost_budget(...)`, etc. so `@patch("core.cli.commands.X")` patches propagate through the package namespace at call time (mirroring the established `core/ui/agentic_ui` and `core/agent/tool_executor` patterns from prior splits). No `pyproject.toml` import-linter changes required (rules reference `core.cli.commands` as a leaf path which still resolves to the new package). Net +390 LOC overhead from per-module docstrings, deferred-import boilerplate, and re-export plumbing έΑΦ accepted for the SRP win (largest file shrinks from 2,441 έΗΤ 655 LOC, **73% drop** έΑΦ the largest absolute reduction in the Tier 3 series). (`core/cli/commands/{__init__,_state,key,model,auth,mcp,skills,cost,session,tasks,trigger,login}.py`)

## [0.75.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-07

> **Codebase audit Tier 3 έΑΦ God Object split #7: `core/agent/loop.py`.**
> The 1,754-LOC AgenticLoop runtime engine (the central agentic
> turn-loop behind every `geode` invocation) is now a 10-file package
> (`core/agent/loop/`). Unlike the previous six splits which were
> function collections, `AgenticLoop` is a single 1,593-LOC class with
> 35 methods including a 644-LOC `arun` async loop that's
> behaviourally indivisible. The split uses a method-extraction
> pattern: 30 of the 35 methods have their bodies moved to topical
> sub-modules (`_lifecycle`, `_model_switching`, `_context`,
> `_decomposition`, `_announce`, `_response`, `_helpers`) and the
> class methods become 1-line delegators that preserve the public API
> surface. `__init__` (110 LOC) and the `arun`/`run`/`_call_llm`
> trio (~750 LOC) stay in `loop.py` as the indivisible core. Behavior
> is preserved: every extracted body is byte-identical to the original
> except for `self.X` έΗΤ `loop.X` substitution. **No public API
> changes** έΑΦ all 30 external import sites (`AgenticLoop`,
> `AgenticResult`, `_ContextExhaustedError`, `get_agentic_tools`,
> `AGENTIC_TOOLS`) work via the package `__init__.py` re-exports.
> Largest single file post-split is `loop.py` at 1,136 LOC έΑΦ a 35%
> reduction (modest by Tier 3 standards but the structural ceiling
> imposed by `arun`+`__init__`+`_call_llm` indivisibility). Companion
> `pyproject.toml` change: `import-linter` ignore rules updated for
> the new leaf paths (`core.agent.loop.loop` /
> `core.agent.loop._lifecycle`). E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop"
> --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed (parity
> with v0.74.0). Two Tier-3 God Objects remain (`commands.py`,
> `cli/__init__.py`).

### Architecture
- **`core/agent/loop.py` (1,754 LOC) έΗΤ `core/agent/loop/` (10 files, 2,197 LOC).** Method-extraction split with `self.X` έΗΤ `loop.X` substitution; preserves behavior via 1-line delegator methods on `AgenticLoop`. Sub-module sizes: `__init__.py` 53 (re-exports + 3 introspection-test sentinels: `_EFFORT_LEVELS`, `_resolve_provider`, `resolve_agentic_adapter`), `models.py` 74 (`AgenticResult` dataclass + `_ContextExhaustedError` exception + `_context_exhausted_message` helper), `_helpers.py` 63 (`get_agentic_tools` factory + `AGENTIC_TOOLS` constant + `MAX_TOOL_RESULT_TOKENS` + `TOOL_LAZY_LOAD_THRESHOLD` thresholds), `_lifecycle.py` 217 (7 helpers: `_save_checkpoint`, `_record_transcript_end`, `_finalize_and_return`, `_build_reasoning_metrics`, `_emit_quota_panel`, `_inject_credential_breadcrumb`, `mark_session_completed`), `_model_switching.py` 327 (8 helpers: `_sync_model_from_settings`, `_drift_target_is_healthy`, `update_model`, `_purge_stale_model_switch_acks`, `_adapt_context_for_model`, `_try_model_escalation`, `_persist_escalated_model`, `_try_cross_provider_escalation`), `_context.py` 77 (7 helpers: `_sync_messages_to_context`, `_notify_context_event`, `_maybe_prune_messages`, `_check_context_overflow`, `_aggressive_context_recovery`, `_repair_messages`, `_build_system_prompt`), `_decomposition.py` 84 (`_try_decompose`), `_announce.py` 41 (`_check_announced_results` έΑΦ 119 LOC body, biggest extractable method), `_response.py` 125 (6 helpers: `_extract_text`, `_serialize_content`, `_track_usage`, `refresh_tools`, `_update_tool_error_tracking`, `_check_convergence_break`), `loop.py` 1,136 (`AgenticLoop` class with `__init__` 110 LOC + `arun`/`run`/`_call_llm` ~750 LOC kept verbatim + ~30 1-line delegators). The package's `__init__.py` re-exports the 5 names previously imported by external callers so the 30 external import sites need no changes. Three classes of source-introspection tests required special handling: (1) `inspect.getsource(AgenticLoop._method)` checks έΑΦ class delegators retain docstrings with the load-bearing substrings the tests assert on; (2) file-text scans (`open(loop_mod.__file__).read()`) έΑΦ `__init__.py` includes documented `_EFFORT_LEVELS` constant and a comment about `emit_reasoning_summary`'s call site so `"xhigh"` and the symbol appear; (3) `monkeypatch.setattr("core.agent.loop._resolve_provider"/"resolve_agentic_adapter", ...)` έΑΦ both names re-exported on the package, `_model_switching.update_model` looks them up via `core.agent.loop` lazily so test patches propagate. Companion `pyproject.toml` change in both `[tool.importlinter.contracts]` blocks (lines 100-108 and 126-138): the 3+2 ignore rules `core.agent.loop -> core.cli.{commands,session_checkpoint,transcript}` are renamed to `core.agent.loop.loop -> ...` (the `loop.py` sub-module is the leaf consumer), with one entry split off as `core.agent.loop._lifecycle -> core.cli.session_checkpoint` (the `_save_checkpoint` helper). Net +443 LOC overhead from per-module docstrings, helper signatures, and 30 delegator method bodies έΑΦ accepted for the SRP win (largest file shrinks from 1,754 έΗΤ 1,136 LOC, 35% drop; the ~420 LOC of method bodies now live in 7 topical sub-modules with clear boundaries). The 35% ceiling is structural: `__init__` (110) + `arun` (650) + `_call_llm` (95) + delegator bodies (~280) = ~1,135 LOC, which is the indivisible bulk of the class without breaking its single-class semantics. (`core/agent/loop/{__init__,models,_helpers,_lifecycle,_model_switching,_context,_decomposition,_announce,_response,loop}.py`, `pyproject.toml`)

## [0.74.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-07

> **Codebase audit Tier 3 έΑΦ God Object split #6: `core/llm/router.py`.**
> The 1,046-LOC LLM transport module (the central dispatcher behind every
> Anthropic / OpenAI / GLM / Codex call) is now a 14-file two-level
> package: `core/llm/router/` (top level: re-exports, hooks, tracing,
> usage, models, DI) plus `core/llm/router/calls/` (sub-package: each
> `call_llm*` entry point in its own file). The 7 transport functions
> that account for 64% of the original LOC (`call_llm`, `call_llm_parsed`,
> `call_llm_json`, `call_llm_with_tools`, `call_llm_streaming`,
> `call_with_failover`, `_route_provider`) each get their own leaf
> module. Largest single file post-split is `tools.py` at 228 LOC έΑΦ
> **a 78% reduction from the 1,046-LOC original**. **Behavior unchanged**:
> every function body is byte-identical. **Test coupling resolved**:
> 17 `@patch("core.llm.router.X")` sites and 1 `monkeypatch.setattr`
> site that previously coupled tests to the monolithic module are
> migrated to leaf paths (`core.llm.router.calls.text.X` /
> `.parsed.X` / `.json.X` / `.tools.X` / `.streaming.X` / `._route.X`)
> in 4 test files; the `inspect.getsource(_router_mod)` invariant test
> in `test_routing_policy.py` is rewritten to walk
> `pkgutil.iter_modules` over the `calls` sub-package and aggregate
> sources, so the 4-callsite invariant on `_route_provider(target_model)`
> is now verified across the union of leaf modules. E2E `geode analyze
> "Cowboy Bebop" --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344
> passed (parity with v0.73.0). Three Tier-3 God Objects remain
> (`commands.py`, `cli/__init__.py`, `agent/loop.py`).

### Architecture
- **`core/llm/router.py` (1,046 LOC) έΗΤ `core/llm/router/` (top level: 6 files, 450 LOC) + `core/llm/router/calls/` (sub-package: 8 files, 913 LOC).** Two-level mechanical split by call concern; preserves every function body, ContextVar instances, and the test-monkeypatch surface (with leaf-path migration). Top-level package files: `__init__.py` 169 (pure re-export of ~50 names: 9 adapter aliases + 7 errors + 5 fallback names + 4 provider_dispatch names + 9 anthropic provider names + 8 token_tracker names + sub-module callables), `_hooks.py` 37 (`_hooks_ctx`, `set_router_hooks`, `_fire_hook`), `tracing.py` 45 (`is_langsmith_enabled`, `maybe_traceable`), `_usage.py` 74 (`_record_response_usage`, `_record_openai_usage`), `models.py` 33 (`ToolCallRecord`, `ToolUseResult` dataclasses), `_di.py` 92 (5 ContextVars + 6 accessors). Sub-package `calls/` files: `__init__.py` 28 (re-exports), `_route.py` 40 (`_route_provider`), `_failover.py` 143 (`call_with_failover`), `text.py` 129 (`call_llm`), `parsed.py` 140 (`call_llm_parsed`), `json.py` 68 (`call_llm_json`), `tools.py` 228 (`call_llm_with_tools` έΑΦ largest leaf), `streaming.py` 137 (`call_llm_streaming`). The package's `__init__.py` re-exports everything previously imported from the flat module so the 41 external import sites need no changes (most do package-level lazy imports via `from core.llm.router import call_llm` inside method bodies). Test files updated for leaf paths: `tests/test_failover.py` (8 `@patch` sites: `get_anthropic_client` ├Ω 2 έΗΤ `calls.text`, `call_llm` ├Ω 6 έΗΤ `calls.json` since `call_llm_json` lives in `json.py` and imports from `text.py`), `tests/test_tool_use.py` (4 `@patch` sites: `get_anthropic_client` έΗΤ `calls.tools`), `tests/test_llm_client.py` (11 `@patch` sites: `get_anthropic_client` έΗΤ `calls.{parsed,text}`, `_get_provider_client` έΗΤ `calls.{parsed,text}`, `is_langsmith_enabled` έΗΤ `tracing`), `tests/test_routing_policy.py` (`monkeypatch.setattr` έΗΤ `calls._route._resolve_provider`; `inspect.getsource` rewritten to use `pkgutil.iter_modules` walk). Patches that work via `__init__.py` re-export and required no changes: `test_claude_adapter.py` (4), `test_goal_decomposer.py` (5), `test_native_tools.py` (1), `test_anthropic_sampling_params.py` (1), `test_agentic_loop.py` (2). Net +317 LOC overhead from per-module docstrings and re-export plumbing έΑΦ accepted for the SRP win (largest file shrinks from 1,046 έΗΤ 228 LOC, 78% drop). (`core/llm/router/{__init__,_hooks,tracing,_usage,models,_di}.py`, `core/llm/router/calls/{__init__,_route,_failover,text,parsed,json,tools,streaming}.py`, `tests/test_{failover,tool_use,llm_client,routing_policy}.py`)

## [0.73.0] έΑΦ 2026-05-07

> **Codebase audit Tier 3 έΑΦ God Object split #5: `core/ui/agentic_ui.py`.**
> The 1,160-LOC UI rendering module with 59 functions + 2 classes
> (`SessionMeter`, `OperationLogger`) + 28 `emit_*` event functions in
> a single file is now a 6-module package (`core/ui/agentic_ui/`). Each
> UI concern lives in its own file: thread-local pipeline IP / session
> meter state (`_state`), the `OperationLogger` class
> (`_operation_logger`), inline render functions (`render`), turn
> summary + lifecycle markers (`summary`), and the 28 event emitters
> (`events`). **No public API changes** έΑΦ all 21 external consumers
> import via `from core.ui.agentic_ui import έΑο` and resolve to the
> same symbols through the package re-exports unchanged. Largest
> single file post-split is `events.py` at 544 LOC. The
> `_turn_snapshot` mutable module-level state lives canonically in
> `__init__.py` so test fixtures (`mod._turn_snapshot = None`) keep
> working. The `console` test-monkeypatch surface
> (`@patch("core.ui.agentic_ui.console")`) flows through via the
> `from core.ui import agentic_ui as _pkg; _pkg.console.print(...)`
> indirection in sub-modules. E2E `geode analyze "Cowboy Bebop"
> --dry-run` unchanged at A (68.4); full pytest 4344 passed (parity
> with v0.72.0). Four Tier-3 God Objects remain (`commands.py`,
> `cli/__init__.py`, `agent/loop.py`, `llm/router.py`).

### Architecture
- **`core/ui/agentic_ui.py` (1,160 LOC) έΗΤ `core/ui/agentic_ui/` (6 files, 1,424 LOC).** Mechanical split by UI concern; preserves every function body, the `_meter_local`/`_pipeline_ip_local`/`_ipc_writer_local` `threading.local()` instances, the module-level `_turn_snapshot` state, and the test-monkeypatch surface for `console` and `_turn_snapshot`. Sub-module sizes: `__init__.py` 171 (re-exports + `_turn_snapshot` canonical home), `_state.py` 124 (`SessionMeter` class + `init_session_meter`/`update_session_model`/`get_session_meter` accessors + `set_pipeline_ip`/`_get_pipeline_ip` + the 3 `threading.local()` instances), `_operation_logger.py` 195 (`OperationLogger` class), `render.py` 256 (12 inline render functions), `summary.py` 134 (`render_turn_summary`, `render_action_summary`, `mark_turn_start`), `events.py` 544 (28 `emit_*` functions for budget/retry/oauth/quota/pipeline events). The package's `__init__.py` re-exports the 56 names previously imported by external callers (the 2 classes, the 12 render functions, the 28 emit functions, the state accessors, and `console`/`_turn_snapshot`/`_meter_local`/`_pipeline_ip_local`/`_ipc_writer_local`/`_fmt_tokens` for test monkeypatching) so the 21 external import sites need no changes. No companion changes outside the package έΑΦ no `import-linter` rules referenced `agentic_ui`, `.gitignore` untouched. Net +264 LOC overhead from per-module docstrings and re-export plumbing έΑΦ accepted for the SRP win (largest file shrinks from 1,160 έΗΤ 544 LOC, 53% drop). (`core/ui/agentic_ui/{__init__,_state,_operation_logger,render,summary,events}.py`)
